I have deep gratitude for first responders who are working tirelessly to combat the fires, as well as volunteers and community members who have stepped up to help.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100568645/523194143/2116327045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTcyMzk1NC0yZmQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LnoHQn8Ov031R9twhS2fAIp4q4jl2SZqE6EAUD6AO8=&emci=99160f4e-2fd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6a723954-2fd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6681226)

| Peter,

Yesterday, I spoke on the House floor to recognize the residents of Los Angeles and the surrounding areas who have been impacted by these disastrous wildfires.

I have deep gratitude for first responders who are working tirelessly to combat the fires, as well as volunteers and community members who have stepped up to help.

If you’re safe from the fires and would like to lend a hand, here are a few organizations you can support:
1. _[**American Red Cross - Wildfire Relief:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100568646/523194144/1620771229?subcode=abc-pub&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTcyMzk1NC0yZmQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LnoHQn8Ov031R9twhS2fAIp4q4jl2SZqE6EAUD6AO8=&emci=99160f4e-2fd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6a723954-2fd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6681226)_ This organization is currently supporting recovery efforts for people impacted by the California Wildfires.
2. [_**California Fire Foundation:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100568647/523194145/1677094802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTcyMzk1NC0yZmQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LnoHQn8Ov031R9twhS2fAIp4q4jl2SZqE6EAUD6AO8=&emci=99160f4e-2fd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6a723954-2fd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6681226) This organization supports families of firefighters who have been killed or injured on duty.
3. [_**Los Angeles Regional Food Bank:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100568648/523194146/21397178?df_id=5221&mfc_pref=T&5221.donation=form1&_ga=2.92108499.831923752.1737131197-1625999802.1737131197&NONCE_TOKEN=346848401FE65D6DC5D7E0AE43F3B670&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTcyMzk1NC0yZmQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LnoHQn8Ov031R9twhS2fAIp4q4jl2SZqE6EAUD6AO8=&emci=99160f4e-2fd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6a723954-2fd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6681226) This organization is providing food assistance to those impacted by the California wildfires.
4. **[_YMCA of Metropolitan Los Angeles:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100568649/523194147/168857955?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTcyMzk1NC0yZmQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LnoHQn8Ov031R9twhS2fAIp4q4jl2SZqE6EAUD6AO8=&emci=99160f4e-2fd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6a723954-2fd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6681226) **The YMCA supports victims of the fires with free childcare for children of first responders and displaced families, as well as showers, Wi-Fi, and other essential services.

If you’re able to, I encourage you to support any of the above organizations either by donating or volunteering.

Thank you,

Linda

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: This is our answer to Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Here’s how we’re fighting back:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250117-1&t=1&akid=1648%2E587540%2E8nIb6l)
Peter, Donald Trump’s inauguration is just a few days from now.
No one knows _exactly_ what to expect from a second Trump administration, but we have a pretty good idea based on his last presidency and his campaign promises.
We could be seeing everything from mass deportations and tariffs that would cripple our economy to blatant attacks on our fundamental rights and freedoms.
Thankfully, we have a powerful answer to the oldest president in history. **Young people are going to show up and fight back against the Trump-MAGA agenda.**
Young people like Sarah McBride, who we helped elect in November. She’s already proving to be a leader and much-needed voice of reason in Congress.
Young people like Oscar De Los Santos, Bryce Berry, and Molly Cook, who we helped elect to state legislatures across the country. These leaders are building our progressive bench and serving as a frontline against Trumpism in the states.
**[Young people are the answer to Donald Trump. It’s our job to elect more of them. Will you support this work with a $5 contribution right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250117-1?refcode=em20250117-1648&amount=5&refcode2=1648_587540_8nIb6l&akid=1648%2E587540%2E8nIb6l)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250117-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250117-1648&refcode2=1648_587540_8nIb6l&akid=1648%2E587540%2E8nIb6l)**
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve

name: Senate Republicans
subject: We have the majority–help us keep it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats are targeting key seats. We need your support now to win in 2026! | Fellow American,

The 2026 Senate map is shaping up to be one of the most challenging battlegrounds we've faced. Democrats are already targeting key Republican seats and gearing up to pour MILLIONS into races in North Carolina, Maine, and even "solid red" states like Kentucky.

Kristen Gillibrand, the new head of Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee has made it clear: they're coming for our majority.

[**_"We will protect our Democratic seats, mount strong challenges in our battleground races, and look to expand our efforts into some unexpected states."_**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=95435b55198c45ce954aad68a60e3ab0&_e=GcVtDFcquhNqIGjyqBJzKeJVOM8u1BrZCWjImkE7Iitk0-PuvTLule-btu_HiKDVt4TEC6TgR4Ey6b2Po-1lyom8p9bRi33GoAUnrXBwqdFdmqCiSyEkH0EboImsV7YJYSaOgjcVAcCJnzwwqwHGXi4pL6y6gHl-fnqoUvnHreG9xhl59StoSBfCOqAkiKWm7pao9eDMflIRNCjCXYiwAuhYlNZccjyr5g8OPJAADJGA1LX1KbB9Z4O4uFlt-ctP5VAhAQfB5iy-sOigidg4GwICdwfZhzvW6KdmKxgeZZSQ-3nhM4KAI7xl7j5ALm19Ua2fCyATFSg0U-_X2HedCumRnvXMpd0q5WY-i_Jy-YdozCDBftMuNW44gztSvrihBZ1GIdyVmY9qP-IdDkU4-mTda3VF-AXf15w48XydR_Zqk5CFmpuCCDkrj1kgJR0Z)

clean_body: Democrats are targeting key seats. We need your support now to win in 2026! | Fellow American, The 2026 Senate map is shaping up to be one of the most challenging battlegrounds we've faced. Democrats are already targeting key Republican seats and gearing up to pour MILLIONS into races in North Carolina, Maine, and even "solid red" states like Kentucky. Kristen Gillibrand, the new head of Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee has made it clear: they're coming for our majority. This fight is going to be long, grueling, and expensive. Their goal? Pack the Supreme Court, keep our borders wide open, and seek retribution on their political opponents. We are coming off a cycle of tremendous success in 2024 - but we can't afford to rest on our laurels. Don't get complacent, Fellow American. Together, we can defend our majority and ensure the Senate remains a firewall against the radical left's extremism. | Peter,

Our women of the New American Majority—Black, Brown, Indigenous women, and women of color, as well as young, LGBTQ+, and unmarried women —who won critical down-ballot races are all sworn in and ready to serve their communities!

At the local and state levels, these women have a vital seat at the table and will fight back against the rampant MAGA agenda under the upcoming Trump administration.

This is just the beginning, Peter! Our team at Emerge is hard at work to recruit and train the next generation of Democratic women to join forces with our elected alums to ensure we continue to break barriers and build a firewall to protect our most critical freedoms from Republican attacks.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Save Our Health Care: Setting Our Course Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
NEWSLETTER

Nancy Pelosi Speaker Emerita [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP42/1/88466/images/Nancy_Pelosi_Speaker_Emerita.jpg]

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP42/1/88466/images/20250117_em_ex_b1_np4c_main_grassroots_head.jpg]

Dear Friends,

There is no greater honor for me than to represent and speak for the people of San Francisco in the Congress of the United States. This past weekend, I was joined by hundreds of Grassroots VIPs (Volunteers In Politics) for my community swearing-in and national kickoff to Save Our Health Care.

Honored by the presence of San Francisco’s new Mayor, Daniel Lurie, led in prayer by Michael Pappas, Executive Director of San Francisco Interfaith Council, and regaled with the musical gifts of world-renowned violinist Carlos Reyes and Grammy-winning vocalist Tony Lindsay, I was proud to be sworn in for a new term as your Congresswoman by my granddaughter Bella, in loving community with dear friends and family.

You have heard me say time and again that our firefighters are our nobility — they protect our lives at the risk of their own. In the past election, I was honored to campaign for San Francisco Proposition H to protect the health care of our firefighters. Joined by Firefighters Local Union 798’s Floyd Rollins and past President and former SFFD Deputy Chief Shon Buford on Sunday, I saluted our San Francisco firefighters for their leadership for our city and for their heroic participation in fighting the devastating wildfires in Los Angeles.

Our Heroes in Blue also received high praise in a message of deep gratitude from our new Senator Adam Schiff who joined us on video as he worked tirelessly on behalf of constituents impacted by the wildfires in Southern
California.

Proud of the leadership of the women of Labor on picket lines and at bargaining tables, I welcomed San Francisco Labor Council Executive Director Kim Tavaglione and thanked her and our many friends and partners from the Labor Community for their hard work and support. As I always say, "we don’t agonize, we organize – and we unionize!"

Community Swearing-In and National Kickoff to Save Our Health Care [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mGPIB-pK3gg]

SAVE OUR HEALTH CARE

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mGPIB-pK3gg [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mGPIB-pK3gg]

We are facing a challenging time in our country and, once again, there is a direct assault on the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act. We chose to act this week as we celebrate the birthday of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. who said: “Of all the forms of inequality, injustice in health is the most shocking and the most inhuman because it often results in physical death.” Every single one of us is just one diagnosis, one accident, one tragedy, one phone call away from needing health care and the protections guaranteed by the Affordable Care Act. And studies show that the more people have health care, the more they have housing and food security. Essential kitchen table needs are connected.

And that’s why each of us must not only save our health care but strengthen our health care and strengthen working families. We can do this: the leadership of our San Francisco grassroots VIPs was key to passing the Affordable Care Act in 2010 and to saving it in 2017. Our grassroots organizing started with community events of people telling their personal health stories right here in San Francisco, eventually growing to 10,000 grassroots events across the
country.

That same outside mobilization and groundswell of grassroots action will Save Our Health Care again in 2025 and win back the House in 2026!

Just a few days since we were together in San Francisco and via Zoom nationally with patient advocates from across the country, many of you have already joined our campaign to Save Our Health Care. If you have not done so already, please sign up to get involved and tell your personal health care story here: https://www.saveourhealthcare.org/ [https://www.saveourhealthcare.org/]

Friends, thank you for your generous support, uplifting messages and prayers that enable me to continue fighting alongside you for our shared values. I am grateful for all that you do and all that we will accomplish together this year.

Together, we will defend our freedoms, protect our most vulnerable communities and Save Our Health Care by ensuring that the Affordable Care Act and other vital pillars of health for the American people are here to stay.

Watch our National Kickoff Here [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-NPQxgQpqBc]

Thank you for your support,
NANCY
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District.
She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
DONATE HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2025?refcode=footer&amount=25]
Nancy Pelosi is counting on you. If you want to stay updated but RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS [https://secure.ngpvan.com/TXOXvBTe_023F0ZGa10PBA2?source=em_rfe] , let us know HERE. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/TXOXvBTe_023F0ZGa10PBA2?source=em_rfe]

For an epic rally
Fellow Patriot,

This Sunday, President Trump is holding his _**[final rally](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d97dfd462b2c483f855f7c47b5532992&_e=IChmocNOVJR3scAaEyB6CO6CRPVLGtnYmY6Zbwh8FSInC9sGpS1IhZThvGl90r30cf-F0Q12Nd0dbR9OiWQ4mJYYAfBs8abhux7fx19QZzvnaEyKY7wvV8EyVN6ZJoE0laj1F0s774ElCZryDV6z8OiWkBY77VjwPOAZomvwr5YITjmlJd6uGkuyoL-SggIkhzpTDfnRtQa8F2Ogj8fHqz_4WQWP4Ubx0muawjJ12G8hVWETsxxCxSNDbMWzsRM8Uuh5dzQezin60jYFoMOwmeGHvOV55uNjnmrkJyJKbFToxR3yGn8kRPsZ3XoMKxc6gdxWxz-lWpa9wk7V_3_WypQyRp8oi_GN042VFoRi-tWHD81MUUjEaHEzpbr1L9RvScQ-pHUsUQsSjQUW1-bTbMlZXBEkOq73l3XsSXlgtkrEb89nSf_10hEyDhVeWMTfHnxxowWqIu8Oak8g80iSJLhPWqNq2IqB6loLy8KRo82tfgrlaMgyihQZHIyk3kgM) **_before officially being sworn in as the **47th President of the United States.**

Over the last nine and a half years, President Trump has travelled to every corner of America, held hundreds of campaign events, and celebrated with millions of America First patriots just like you.

[The radical Democrats CAN'T STAND Trump Rallies for one simple reason: They disprove the Left-wing narrative that the MAGA movement is a small minority of Americans.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d97dfd462b2c483f855f7c47b5532992&_e=IChmocNOVJR3scAaEyB6CO6CRPVLGtnYmY6Zbwh8FSInC9sGpS1IhZThvGl90r30cf-F0Q12Nd0dbR9OiWQ4mJYYAfBs8abhux7fx19QZzvnaEyKY7wvV8EyVN6ZJoE0laj1F0s774ElCZryDV6z8OiWkBY77VjwPOAZomvwr5YITjmlJd6uGkuyoL-SggIkhzpTDfnRtQa8F2Ogj8fHqz_4WQWP4Ubx0muawjJ12G8hVWETsxxCxSNDbMWzsRM8Uuh5dzQezin60jYFoMOwmeGHvOV55uNjnmrkJyJKbFToxR3yGn8kRPsZ3XoMKxc6gdxWxz-lWpa9wk7V_3_Wyj67ut5RoGjHc_tLymQoptNxxRACE0t9laU1H9Sg6ey0p67RfM9tchbRqYPgfyJf9M72oVMyXJry27x6Pdj7wf55rMSCcg9y0Th0awLrk9P2-ZHZ7cciIoTwm5oYp2xaYz60qjyiNXaHh_Zc58vwOIQIv7mDIJztP39xq9xAktut)

| | Patriot, The Senate confirmation hearing for Pete Hegseth just concluded and the real work begins **now** to get him confirmed! Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment. We refuse to let that happen. _**[_**That's why I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!**_](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOmzAQhp_G3II8Y4M3Bw7sklCp2rRKVyv1hAZjJ65wIMYhyttXRCiXkeabT_r_IT_2zj4Kpt4Z4tl1E0NkomSI1793H27__M96c_WkNtf84LPlih-rOuNLvmi65nDe1id9mFRd2mP4rWZ46fExmpe8hqbGk-sXqqqkK4TtuExMAUooyIVAnpyLzHIAa6ndSi0JQfE2B0Ocg8wtz2TiCuSYcYA3DghymyqQHMi07ZvtMoHEJH_mpORNcJpgincKYRh8qgef9MU5xnF6Ftsz3JMnTTq64ZIGM8-pHhjupxhUi1ZuOyk45YqJ_S36ZhpuQRsmqveq3hx33wzzBXvTuZtnotp9riSasOz3ACvQ5EdypwsT1VpfNeVn-dV8_Dr82NXYHHffzZ-v8rhZRhKKbry7vndTrpjkp-c_S_u5wP8BAAD__9CrhvY)**_ Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military—something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** , the architect of the disastrous **_Afghanistan withdrawal._** Under Austin’s watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history:
---
| |
* **13 brave service members killed in Kabul.**
* **Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory.**
* **Billions of dollars’ worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban.**

---
My friend, **our military deserves better.** President Trump understands that. That’s why he’s nominated Pete Hegseth—a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests. But we know what’s coming: Democrats will unite to block his confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let RINOs undermine President Trump again! _**[_**If you agree that Pete Hegseth MUST BE CONFIRMED as Secretary of Defense, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH Response Form right away!**_](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOmzAQhp_G3II8Y4M3Bw7sklCp2rRKVyv1hAZjJ65wIMYhyttXRCiXkeabT_r_IT_2zj4Kpt4Z4tl1E0NkomSI1793H27__M96c_WkNtf84LPlih-rOuNLvmi65nDe1id9mFRd2mP4rWZ46fExmpe8hqbGk-sXqqqkK4TtuExMAUooyIVAnpyLzHIAa6ndSi0JQfE2B0Ocg8wtz2TiCuSYcYA3DghymyqQHMi07ZvtMoHEJH_mpORNcJpgincKYRh8qgef9MU5xnF6Ftsz3JMnTTq64ZIGM8-pHhjupxhUi1ZuOyk45YqJ_S36ZhpuQRsmqveq3hx33wzzBXvTuZtnotp9riSasOz3ACvQ5EdypwsT1VpfNeVn-dV8_Dr82NXYHHffzZ-v8rhZRhKKbry7vndTrpjkp-c_S_u5wP8BAAD__9CrhvY)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Pete Hegseth. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans. Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**. If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen! AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – **but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**
---
[ **CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOmzAQhp_G3II8Y4M3Bw7sklCp2rRKVyv1hAZjJ65wIMYhyttXRCiXkeabT_r_IT_2zj4Kpt4Z4tl1E0NkomSI1793H27__M96c_WkNtf84LPlih-rOuNLvmi65nDe1id9mFRd2mP4rWZ46fExmpe8hqbGk-sXqqqkK4TtuExMAUooyIVAnpyLzHIAa6ndSi0JQfE2B0Ocg8wtz2TiCuSYcYA3DghymyqQHMi07ZvtMoHEJH_mpORNcJpgincKYRh8qgef9MU5xnF6Ftsz3JMnTTq64ZIGM8-pHhjupxhUi1ZuOyk45YqJ_S36ZhpuQRsmqveq3hx33wzzBXvTuZtnotp9riSasOz3ACvQ5EdypwsT1VpfNeVn-dV8_Dr82NXYHHffzZ-v8rhZRhKKbry7vndTrpjkp-c_S_u5wP8BAAD__9CrhvY)

Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second. It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen. And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Pete Hegseth will take time, money, and resources. **[That’s why I’m asking you to join AMAC Action with your very best CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH emergency contribution today.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOmzAQhp_G3II8Y4M3Bw7sklCp2rRKVyv1hAZjJ65wIMYhyttXRCiXkeabT_r_IT_2zj4Kpt4Z4tl1E0NkomSI1793H27__M96c_WkNtf84LPlih-rOuNLvmi65nDe1id9mFRd2mP4rWZ46fExmpe8hqbGk-sXqqqkK4TtuExMAUooyIVAnpyLzHIAa6ndSi0JQfE2B0Ocg8wtz2TiCuSYcYA3DghymyqQHMi07ZvtMoHEJH_mpORNcJpgincKYRh8qgef9MU5xnF6Ftsz3JMnTTq64ZIGM8-pHhjupxhUi1ZuOyk45YqJ_S36ZhpuQRsmqveq3hx33wzzBXvTuZtnotp9riSasOz3ACvQ5EdypwsT1VpfNeVn-dV8_Dr82NXYHHffzZ-v8rhZRhKKbry7vndTrpjkp-c_S_u5wP8BAAD__9CrhvY)** Let’s send a clear message:
---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**
* **And Pete Hegseth will be confirmed as Secretary of Defense.**

---
No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force. **_But we have got to move quickly. We have just weeks – maybe days –_**** _to get out ahead of the radical Left and the RINOs –_**** _So please don’t delay!_** Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.
---
| | Thank you, friend!
---
For Freedom,

**Rebecca Weber** **AMAC Action**

name: Tom Fitton
subject: San Francisco Settles Lawsuit with Judicial Watch!
body:
Noncitizens VOTED in DC!

[INSIDE JW]

Judicial Watch Lawsuit Update: San Francisco Shuts Down Woke Racist
Abuse of Tax Dollars

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34281&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1MOTN3a243QWx1YyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b7fc540f103ac4011887abd6df5a1256464af95da087ff8a9681ee9b42eee6fd]

Americans look with amazement at the left-wing extremism in
California, especially in San Francisco. But we’re making a
difference there.

The City of San Francisco authorized a settlement agreement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34272&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BoaWxsaXBzLWV0LWFsLXYtYnJlZWQtZXQtYWwtc2V0bGVtZW50LTYxMTkxNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=0bba58ec7917222a23811e40ed16c9299ef3b695cf54851ed94e915c3d3d1df2]
in
our taxpayer lawsuit, agreeing to discontinue its discriminatory
guaranteed-income program that favored transgender individuals with a
preference for biological black and Latino men who identify as women.

The agreement commits the city to pay $3,250 in attorney’s fees and
costs and not to create a new guaranteed income program with the same
eligibility criteria.

Ordinance No. 290-24
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34273&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BoaWxsaXBzLXYtYnJlZWQtc2FuLWZyYW5zaXNjby1vcmRpbmFuY2UtNjExOTE1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=7df6a32cdeba834566b564e147aa6948cefe3f89058c62a90346ec38a11da518]
as
passed by a 7-3 vote of the Board of Supervisors of the City and
County of San Francisco, and signed by Mayor London Breed, states:

> The [San Francisco] City Attorney is hereby authorized to settle the
> action entitled “_Michael Phillips, et al., v. London Breed, et
> al._,” San Francisco Superior Court, Case No. CGC-24- 611915, on
> substantially the same terms as set forth in the Settlement
> Agreement.

***

> The Settlement Agreement provides: (1) payment of $3,250 in
> attorney’s fees and costs; and (2) injunctive relief agreeing that
> the City will not continue the guaranteed income program that Paul
> Wildes and Reed Sandberg alleged to be unlawful beyond September
> 2024 and an agreement that the City will not create a new guaranteed
> income program with the same eligibility criteria.

The settlement agreement comes in the lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=31261&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2FuLWZyYW4tZGlzY3JpbWluYXRvcnktcGF5bWVudHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b20fb5ae90052c47263cbec37e07428a442b98ee7537a5bcda3af122b047fce4]
we
filed on January 9, 2024, on behalf of taxpayers against San Francisco
Mayor London Breed, City Treasurer Jose Cisneros, the director of the
city’s Office of Transgender Initiatives, and City Administrator
Carmen Chu for violating the Equal Protection Clause of the California
Constitution (_Phillips et al. v Breed et al._
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=31246&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BoaWxsaXBzLWV0LWFsLXYtYnJlZWQtZXQtYWwtc2FuLWZyYW4tZ2lmdC1jb21wbGFpbnQtNjExOTE1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=eb025825157c79884c51d150969e9801f4f724fdf6c05657a89eff230a47043a]
(No.
24-611915)).

Mayor Breed announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=30379&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Nhbi1mcmFuY2lzY28tdHJhbnNnZW5kZXItbW9uZXktMjAyMy1wZ3MtMTItMTQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=9f4db7a75cf7cda63293cbfc0e533f2e7dfa2cca46fc59c21288b592657889d0]
the
launch of the Guaranteed Income for Trans People (GIFT) program on
November 16, 2022. The mayor’s office stated in a press release
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=30379&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Nhbi1mcmFuY2lzY28tdHJhbnNnZW5kZXItbW9uZXktMjAyMy1wZ3MtMTItMTQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=9f4db7a75cf7cda63293cbfc0e533f2e7dfa2cca46fc59c21288b592657889d0]
that
the city would “provide low-income transgender San Franciscans with
$1,200 each month, up to 18 months to help address financial
insecurity within trans communities.”

This settlement is a huge victory for taxpayers who oppose
taxpayer-funded woke racism and transgender extremism. This settlement
agreement puts a stop to the illegal use of taxpayer money to hand out
free cash to transgender individuals based on race and sex in blatant
violation of California’s constitution.

388 NON-CITIZENS VOTED IN DC’S NOVEMBER ELECTION

Citizenship means very little in your nation’s capital.

We received a spreadsheet from the District of Columbia Board of
Elections revealing that 388 noncitizens voted in DC’s November 2024
general election.

While federal law
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34250&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly91c2NvZGUuaG91c2UuZ292L3ZpZXcueGh0bWw/cmVxPSh0aXRsZToxOCBzZWN0aW9uOjYxMSBlZGl0aW9uOnByZWxpbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=348f47ace2421c3104856b4135901858a4a96d66010c7f65da3ff4644cb7d4fe)]
prohibits
noncitizens from voting in federal elections, states and localities
may allow noncitizens to vote in local elections. In 2023, the DC
Council amended
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=32371&F=T&&hash=86374e81d81120abddd33126d48eb2060a0d88883e042ce59946664f4063eb59.]
the
District of Columbia Election Code of 1955 to allow all noncitizen
residents, including illegal aliens, to vote in its local elections.

More than 230 of the noncitizens who voted are registered Democrats,
the list shows. Less than 20 are registered Republicans. The remainder
did not register with a party or registered with a third party. The
list does not detail whether the voters are illegal aliens nor whether
the noncitizen voters were restricted, as law requires, to voting for
only local DC offices.

The noncitizen voter information was produced in response to our
December 2, 2024, DC Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request for:

> Public records identifying the number of non-citizens who voted in
> the November 2024 General Election; including, information about the
> wards in which they are located, their party affiliation, and the
> designators for the ballots they received

In July 2024, we reported that data
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=33090&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbm9uLWNpdGl6ZW5zLXZvdGVkLWluLWRjLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9095fd92a0fe13051745c950a5b6d90cc5df258e90d4084c3d4cb401ccb8a7b5]
from the
District of Columbia Board of Elections revealed that 113 noncitizens
voted in the June “2024 Presidential Primary.”

It is an outrage and insult to every American citizen, and may be a
violation of federal law, that DC allowed 388 foreign nationals to
vote in the 2024 general election. Congress can and should end this
practice immediately.

In May 2024, we received records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=32377&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzLXJldmVhbC1kYy10cmFpbmluZy1ub25jaXRpemVuLXZvdGluZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=681b7d1fcd9add2d549b3ef2f1b8083b65c6d32a604b67c9fd65ef515b6e4c6a]
from
the District of Columbia, explaining to illegal aliens and other
noncitizens how they can register to vote in local elections.

In July 2024, we uncovered records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=32979&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZm9yZWlnbi1uYXRpb25hbHMtcmVnaXN0ZXJlZC12b3RlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=7820aadd2507d73be2f1b0f1504bbc0f34e90109b86727474b2900521fc59819]
showing
that, as of June 2024, 583 foreign nationals are registered to vote in
Washington, DC. The records from the Board of Elections
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=32957&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGNib2Uub3JnLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9f5f59001ce422d28de009ff9bf6a7d4633294d34d61aae53f2418682b7027f6]
also confirm that noncitizens can be
election workers.

In December 2023, a notice letter was
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=30885&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtcmVtb3ZpbmctMTAzMDAwLWluZWxpZ2libGUtbmFtZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e81fbc7d3f8c3674910717882ce9fea86877f982d87ca6a7e38997b95e9101a3]
sent
to election officials in the District of Columbia notifying them of
evident violations of the National Voter Registration Act of 1993
(NVRA), based on their failure to remove inactive voters from their
registration rolls. The letter pointed out that D.C. publicly reported
removing few or no ineligible voter registrations under a key
provision of the NVRA. The letter threatened a federal lawsuit unless
the violations were corrected in a timely fashion. In response to
our inquiries, Washington, DC, officials admitted that they had not
complied with the NVRA, promptly removed 65,544 outdated names from
the voting rolls, promised to remove 37,962 more, and designated
another 73,522 registrations as “inactive.”

Again, the new Congress should follow Judicial Watch’s lead and
takes action to restore the rule of law in Washington DC’s local
government!

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES CALIFORNIA COASTAL COMMISSION FOR RECORDS ON
LAWFARE AGAINST ELON MUSK

The Left’s lawfare is not reserved exclusively for Donald Trump.
Elon Musk is also a victim.

We sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34240&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtY2EtY29hc3RhbC1jb21tLXNwYWNleC01MTg4MjAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8ca4bc236e16aa35660339803a39150ccdafb397e9ecced89c6f9fb2a468f310]
the
California Coastal Commission for records about the decision to
prohibit more Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (SpaceX) rockets
from launching out of Vandenberg Space Force Base (_Judicial Watch
Inc. v. California Coastal Commission_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34240&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtY2EtY29hc3RhbC1jb21tLXNwYWNleC01MTg4MjAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8ca4bc236e16aa35660339803a39150ccdafb397e9ecced89c6f9fb2a468f310]
(No.
CPF-24-518820)).

Are you surprised that a member of the Commission specifically tied
her vote against Musk and SpaceX to Musk’s support for President
Trump?

Judicial Watch sued in the Superior Court for the County of San
Francisco after the Coastal Commission failed to comply with an
October 16, 2024, California Public Records Act request for records
and communications of commissioners regarding SpaceX, Elon Musk,
Starlink, Donald Trump, and rocket launches from Vandenberg Space
Force Base.

On October 15, 2024, SpaceX sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34241&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3NwYWNleC12LWNhLWNvYXN0YWwtY29tbWlzc2lvbi0wODg5My8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e8dc0d44f217bf94ea9761724e9139be47c83aa7ddb459eb55be695c82b95b55]
the
California Coastal Commission citing that the agency “egregiously
and unlawfully overreaching its authority” when it “engaged in
naked political discrimination,” punishing “a company for the
political views and statements of its largest shareholder and CEO,”
who is Elon Musk.

The suit recounts an extensive history of SpaceX launches of the
Falcon 9 rockets from Vandenberg: “For decades, the Commission has,
without fail, agreed with the longstanding position of the U.S.
Department of the Air Force (Air Force) that the Base’s commercial
space launch programs are federal agency activities that are not
subject to Commission’s permitting authority or control.” Further:

> Now, however ... the Commission has decided to ignore longstanding
> federal policy and law, its own established practices ... to impose
> a different standard on SpaceX. Specifically, the Commission refused
> to concur with a proposal by the United States Department of the Air
> Force to increase from 36 to 50 the number of launches that SpaceX
> can perform at the Base.

The suit refers to an October 10, 2024, Coastal Commission meeting
during which they voted 6-4 to deny the request to allow more SpaceX
Falcon 9 rockets to launch from Vandenberg Space Force Base:

> As Commissioner Caryl Hart said: the basis for the decision was not
> that a commercial operator with a space launch program at the Base
> was increasing its annual launch cadence, but rather that SpaceX was
> doing so: “The concern is with SpaceX increasing its launches, not
> with the other companies increasing their launches . . . we’re
> dealing with a company . . . the head of which has aggressively
> injected himself into the Presidential race and made it clear what
> his point of view is.”

***

> To make it even clearer that the Commission’s decision was based
> on its political biases and other irrelevant, misplaced concerns,
> the Commission recently approved another commercial space launch
> operator launching up to 60 launches a year from the same Base,
> accepting that this operator’s launch program, including
> commercial launches, are federal agency activities.

The powerful California Coastal Commission engaged in naked lawfare
and abuse against Elon Musk and SpaceX because of his support for
Trump. And now the powerful agency wants to cover up its abuse by
illicitly hiding records from the public. Judicial Watch is going to
court to remind this agency that it is not above the law.

BIDEN GUN CONTROL STUDY OMITS OBAMA GUN RUNNING SCANDAL

Remember Barack Obama’s and Eric Holder’s deadly gun running
scandal called Fast and Furious? Joe Biden’s bureaucrats are
pretending they have forgotten. Our _Corruption
Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34282&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZ3VuLWNvbnRyb2wtc3R1ZHktZmlyZWFybXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=35814ed20ecc28875f160f8333b5bae996740ef93bfdbae2a485b396b24e6869].

> The Biden administration’s long-winded project aimed at reducing
> gun violence by examining criminal gun trafficking over two decades
> conveniently omits Obama’s disastrous Mexican gun running
> operation that let drug traffickers obtain U.S.-sold weapons. Known
> as Fast and Furious, the failed experiment was run by the Bureau of
> Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives (ATF) and allowed guns
> from the U.S. to be smuggled into Mexico so they could eventually be
> traced to drug cartels. Instead, federal law enforcement officers
> lost track of hundreds of weapons which were used in an unknown
> number of crimes, including the murder of a U.S. Border Patrol agent
> in Arizona.
>
> In 2021 Attorney General Merrick B. Garland directed the same agency
> that orchestrated that fiasco, the ATF, to lead a drawn-out
> comprehensive study, known as National Firearms Commerce and
> Trafficking Assessment (NFCTA), aimed at curbing gun violence and
> illegal gun trafficking across the nation. This week the Department
> of Justice (DOJ) published the final volume
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34283&F=T&&hash=7a60e1d5b328886d0761422ccfc27e7c8f52e932ce067abb059c115f87132d37]
of
> the extensive four-part series, which claims to include an in-depth
> analysis of how firearms enter illegal markets and fall into the
> wrong hands, including Mexican drug cartels. The analysis covers 20
> years of data and is vital to helping law enforcement nationwide
> solve crimes and take shooters off the street, according to Garland.
> “This landmark series represents the most thorough research,
> analysis, and examination ever of firearms commerce and how firearms
> enter illegal markets and fall into the wrong hands,” reads a DOJ
> statement
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34284&F=T&&hash=d7f76fb77d2c3ca76923cfc1066e1cfcf662b0487e7687328aaa9d4cd435928a]
announcing
> the final NFCTA report this week.
>
> The agency, charged with upholding the rule of law and keeping the
> country safe, defines criminal gun trafficking as the intentional
> movement of firearms into the illegal market for a criminal purpose
> or possession. “This final volume of the NFCTA concludes the most
> comprehensive look at America’s crime gun data in over two decades
> and confirms that ATF’s advanced intelligence tools are vital to
> helping law enforcement nationwide solve gun crimes and take
> shooters off the streets,” Garland says in the DOJ statement,
> adding that the expanded use of ATF’s crime gun tracing has
> provided more investigative leads than ever on violent gun crimes
> and improved the apprehension and prosecution of violent criminals.
> In the press release Deputy Attorney General Lisa Monaco is quoted
> saying: “From conducting enhanced background checks to stopping
> firearms trafficking by cartels, the Department has prioritized
> addressing the most significant drivers of violent crime and
> identifying emerging threats to our communities.” She adds that
> the government needs to “bring more crime gun intelligence to more
> law enforcement agencies.”
>
> Yet the exhaustive probe fails to mention Fast and Furious, a major
> scheme that illicitly sent firearms south of the border under the
> leadership of Obama Attorney General Eric Holder, who was cited for
> contempt by Congress for refusing to turn over documents related to
> the botched operation. The portion of the report
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34285&F=T&&hash=077fdd0fbba7a5429582bb3893744aa8ca1e1a24dfdd6c3ea8b8926b81774c79]
dedicated
> to the southwest border only reveals that firearms originating in
> the U.S. and recovered in Mexico between 2017 and 2021 represented
> 74% of all international crime guns traced to a purchaser. It also
> states that crime guns recovered in Mexico often originate from
> firearm transfers at Federal Firearm Licensees (FFLs) in four
> Mexican border states—Arizona, California, New Mexico, and Texas.
> “Further analysis indicates that transnational gun traffickers
> exploit the same criminal channels to divert firearms from legal
> commerce as domestic gun traffickers,” the report states, adding
> that relative to all other states the four Mexican border states had
> a notably higher proportion of “lawful” firearm sales from an
> unlicensed seller to an unlicensed buyer. “For Mexico crime gun
> trace requests submitted between 2022 and 2023, 36% (18,206 of
> 50,409) were traced to a purchaser in the U.S.,” the report says,
> adding that the guns were not part of lawful exports to Mexico.
>
> Perhaps some were part of the Fast and Furious debacle. In 2016,
> Judicial Watch obtained Justice Department documents
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34286&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2F0Zi1mYXN0LWZ1cmlvdXMtcmVjb3Jkcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=63fa835a5eaad6a6e0c47407b4644048ced9be56c61f292819b3b411b447b5fc]
showing
> that Fast and Furious weapons were widely used by members of major
> Mexican drug cartels, including Joaquin “El Chapo” Guzman
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71980&L=34287&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvb2JhbWFzLW1leGljYW4tZ3VucnVubmluZy1vcC1jb3VsZC1oZWxwLXNpbmFsb2EtZHJ1Zy1sb3Jkcy1kZWZlbnNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=d0a9a4d8185fae4a2f80229d578319b0180a3c201a995d1e89f4be9cc7d6cbb7],
> head of the Sinaloa drug cartel. The documents reveal that 94 Fast
> and Furious firearms were recovered in Mexico City and 12 Mexican
> states, with the majority being seized in Sonora, Chihuahua, and
> Sinaloa. Of the weapons recovered, 82 were rifles and 12 were
> pistols. Twenty were involved in “violent recoveries,” which
> means they were utilized in several mass killings. Among them was a

clean_body: Noncitizens VOTED in DC! [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Lawsuit Update: San Francisco Shuts Down Woke Racist Abuse of Tax Dollars [] Americans look with amazement at the left-wing extremism in California, especially in San Francisco. But we’re making a difference there. The City of San Francisco authorized a settlement agreement [] in our taxpayer lawsuit, agreeing to discontinue its discriminatory guaranteed-income program that favored transgender individuals with a preference for biological black and Latino men who identify as women. The agreement commits the city to pay $3,250 in attorney’s fees and costs and not to create a new guaranteed income program with the same eligibility criteria. Ordinance No. 290-24 [] as passed by a 7-3 vote of the Board of Supervisors of the City and County of San Francisco, and signed by Mayor London Breed, states: The [San Francisco] City Attorney is hereby authorized to settle the action entitled “Michael Phillips, et al., v. London Breed, et al.,” San Francisco Superior Court, Case No. CGC-24- 611915, on substantially the same terms as set forth in the Settlement Agreement. * The Settlement Agreement provides: (1) payment of $3,250 in attorney’s fees and costs; and (2) injunctive relief agreeing that the City will not continue the guaranteed income program that Paul Wildes and Reed Sandberg alleged to be unlawful beyond September 2024 and an agreement that the City will not create a new guaranteed income program with the same eligibility criteria. The settlement agreement comes in the lawsuit [] we filed on January 9, 2024, on behalf of taxpayers against San Francisco Mayor London Breed, City Treasurer Jose Cisneros, the director of the city’s Office of Transgender Initiatives, and City Administrator Carmen Chu for violating the Equal Protection Clause of the California Constitution (Phillips et al. v Breed et al. [] (No. 24-611915)). Mayor Breed announced [] the launch of the Guaranteed Income for Trans People (GIFT) program on November 16, 2022. The mayor’s office stated in a press release [] that the city would “provide low-income transgender San Franciscans with $1,200 each month, up to 18 months to help address financial insecurity within trans communities.” This settlement is a huge victory for taxpayers who oppose taxpayer-funded woke racism and transgender extremism. This settlement agreement puts a stop to the illegal use of taxpayer money to hand out free cash to transgender individuals based on race and sex in blatant violation of California’s constitution. 388 NON-CITIZENS VOTED IN DC’S NOVEMBER ELECTION Citizenship means very little in your nation’s capital. We received a spreadsheet from the District of Columbia Board of Elections revealing that 388 noncitizens voted in DC’s November 2024 general election. While federal law [)] prohibits noncitizens from voting in federal elections, states and localities may allow noncitizens to vote in local elections. In 2023, the DC Council amended [.] the District of Columbia Election Code of 1955 to allow all noncitizen residents, including illegal aliens, to vote in its local elections. More than 230 of the noncitizens who voted are registered Democrats, the list shows. Less than 20 are registered Republicans. The remainder did not register with a party or registered with a third party. The list does not detail whether the voters are illegal aliens nor whether the noncitizen voters were restricted, as law requires, to voting for only local DC offices. The noncitizen voter information was produced in response to our December 2, 2024, DC Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request for: Public records identifying the number of non-citizens who voted in the November 2024 General Election; including, information about the wards in which they are located, their party affiliation, and the designators for the ballots they received In July 2024, we reported that data [] from the District of Columbia Board of Elections revealed that 113 noncitizens voted in the June “2024 Presidential Primary.” It is an outrage and insult to every American citizen, and may be a violation of federal law, that DC allowed 388 foreign nationals to vote in the 2024 general election. Congress can and should end this practice immediately. In May 2024, we received records [] from the District of Columbia, explaining to illegal aliens and other noncitizens how they can register to vote in local elections. In July 2024, we uncovered records [] showing that, as of June 2024, 583 foreign nationals are registered to vote in Washington, DC. The records from the Board of Elections [] also confirm that noncitizens can be election workers. In December 2023, a notice letter was [] sent to election officials in the District of Columbia notifying them of evident violations of the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 (NVRA), based on their failure to remove inactive voters from their registration rolls. The letter pointed out that D.C. publicly reported removing few or no ineligible voter registrations under a key provision of the NVRA. The letter threatened a federal lawsuit unless the violations were corrected in a timely fashion. In response to our inquiries, Washington, DC, officials admitted that they had not complied with the NVRA, promptly removed 65,544 outdated names from the voting rolls, promised to remove 37,962 more, and designated another 73,522 registrations as “inactive.” Again, the new Congress should follow Judicial Watch’s lead and takes action to restore the rule of law in Washington DC’s local government! JUDICIAL WATCH SUES CALIFORNIA COASTAL COMMISSION FOR RECORDS ON LAWFARE AGAINST ELON MUSK The Left’s lawfare is not reserved exclusively for Donald Trump. Elon Musk is also a victim. We sued [] the California Coastal Commission for records about the decision to prohibit more Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (SpaceX) rockets from launching out of Vandenberg Space Force Base (Judicial Watch Inc. v. California Coastal Commission [] (No. CPF-24-518820)). Are you surprised that a member of the Commission specifically tied her vote against Musk and SpaceX to Musk’s support for President Trump? Judicial Watch sued in the Superior Court for the County of San Francisco after the Coastal Commission failed to comply with an October 16, 2024, California Public Records Act request for records and communications of commissioners regarding SpaceX, Elon Musk, Starlink, Donald Trump, and rocket launches from Vandenberg Space Force Base. On October 15, 2024, SpaceX sued [] the California Coastal Commission citing that the agency “egregiously and unlawfully overreaching its authority” when it “engaged in naked political discrimination,” punishing “a company for the political views and statements of its largest shareholder and CEO,” who is Elon Musk. The suit recounts an extensive history of SpaceX launches of the Falcon 9 rockets from Vandenberg: “For decades, the Commission has, without fail, agreed with the longstanding position of the U.S. Department of the Air Force (Air Force) that the Base’s commercial space launch programs are federal agency activities that are not subject to Commission’s permitting authority or control.” Further: Now, however ... the Commission has decided to ignore longstanding federal policy and law, its own established practices ... to impose a different standard on SpaceX. Specifically, the Commission refused to concur with a proposal by the United States Department of the Air Force to increase from 36 to 50 the number of launches that SpaceX can perform at the Base. The suit refers to an October 10, 2024, Coastal Commission meeting during which they voted 6-4 to deny the request to allow more SpaceX Falcon 9 rockets to launch from Vandenberg Space Force Base: As Commissioner Caryl Hart said: the basis for the decision was not that a commercial operator with a space launch program at the Base was increasing its annual launch cadence, but rather that SpaceX was doing so: “The concern is with SpaceX increasing its launches, not with the other companies increasing their launches . . . we’re dealing with a company . . . the head of which has aggressively injected himself into the Presidential race and made it clear what his point of view is.” * To make it even clearer that the Commission’s decision was based on its political biases and other irrelevant, misplaced concerns, the Commission recently approved another commercial space launch operator launching up to 60 launches a year from the same Base, accepting that this operator’s launch program, including commercial launches, are federal agency activities. The powerful California Coastal Commission engaged in naked lawfare and abuse against Elon Musk and SpaceX because of his support for Trump. And now the powerful agency wants to cover up its abuse by illicitly hiding records from the public. Judicial Watch is going to court to remind this agency that it is not above the law. BIDEN GUN CONTROL STUDY OMITS OBAMA GUN RUNNING SCANDAL Remember Barack Obama’s and Eric Holder’s deadly gun running scandal called Fast and Furious? Joe Biden’s bureaucrats are pretending they have forgotten. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. The Biden administration’s long-winded project aimed at reducing gun violence by examining criminal gun trafficking over two decades conveniently omits Obama’s disastrous Mexican gun running operation that let drug traffickers obtain U.S.-sold weapons. Known as Fast and Furious, the failed experiment was run by the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives (ATF) and allowed guns from the U.S. to be smuggled into Mexico so they could eventually be traced to drug cartels. Instead, federal law enforcement officers lost track of hundreds of weapons which were used in an unknown number of crimes, including the murder of a U.S. Border Patrol agent in Arizona. In 2021 Attorney General Merrick B. Garland directed the same agency that orchestrated that fiasco, the ATF, to lead a drawn-out comprehensive study, known as National Firearms Commerce and Trafficking Assessment (NFCTA), aimed at curbing gun violence and illegal gun trafficking across the nation. This week the Department of Justice (DOJ) published the final volume [] of the extensive four-part series, which claims to include an in-depth analysis of how firearms enter illegal markets and fall into the wrong hands, including Mexican drug cartels. The analysis covers 20 years of data and is vital to helping law enforcement nationwide solve crimes and take shooters off the street, according to Garland. “This landmark series represents the most thorough research, analysis, and examination ever of firearms commerce and how firearms enter illegal markets and fall into the wrong hands,” reads a DOJ statement [] announcing the final NFCTA report this week. The agency, charged with upholding the rule of law and keeping the country safe, defines criminal gun trafficking as the intentional movement of firearms into the illegal market for a criminal purpose or possession. “This final volume of the NFCTA concludes the most comprehensive look at America’s crime gun data in over two decades and confirms that ATF’s advanced intelligence tools are vital to helping law enforcement nationwide solve gun crimes and take shooters off the streets,” Garland says in the DOJ statement, adding that the expanded use of ATF’s crime gun tracing has provided more investigative leads than ever on violent gun crimes and improved the apprehension and prosecution of violent criminals. In the press release Deputy Attorney General Lisa Monaco is quoted saying: “From conducting enhanced background checks to stopping firearms trafficking by cartels, the Department has prioritized addressing the most significant drivers of violent crime and identifying emerging threats to our communities.” She adds that the government needs to “bring more crime gun intelligence to more law enforcement agencies.” Yet the exhaustive probe fails to mention Fast and Furious, a major scheme that illicitly sent firearms south of the border under the leadership of Obama Attorney General Eric Holder, who was cited for contempt by Congress for refusing to turn over documents related to the botched operation. The portion of the report [] dedicated to the southwest border only reveals that firearms originating in the U.S. and recovered in Mexico between 2017 and 2021 represented 74% of all international crime guns traced to a purchaser. It also states that crime guns recovered in Mexico often originate from firearm transfers at Federal Firearm Licensees (FFLs) in four Mexican border states—Arizona, California, New Mexico, and Texas. “Further analysis indicates that transnational gun traffickers exploit the same criminal channels to divert firearms from legal commerce as domestic gun traffickers,” the report states, adding that relative to all other states the four Mexican border states had a notably higher proportion of “lawful” firearm sales from an unlicensed seller to an unlicensed buyer. “For Mexico crime gun trace requests submitted between 2022 and 2023, 36% (18,206 of 50,409) were traced to a purchaser in the U.S.,” the report says, adding that the guns were not part of lawful exports to Mexico. Perhaps some were part of the Fast and Furious debacle. In 2016, Judicial Watch obtained Justice Department documents [] showing that Fast and Furious weapons were widely used by members of major Mexican drug cartels, including Joaquin “El Chapo” Guzman [], head of the Sinaloa drug cartel. The documents reveal that 94 Fast and Furious firearms were recovered in Mexico City and 12 Mexican states, with the majority being seized in Sonora, Chihuahua, and Sinaloa. Of the weapons recovered, 82 were rifles and 12 were pistols. Twenty were involved in “violent recoveries,” which means they were utilized in several mass killings. Among them was a .50 caliber rifle seized from Guzman’s hideout in Los Mochis, Sinaloa, where he was eventually arrested. subject: You won’t stand with 𝘔𝘚𝘕𝘉𝘊?!?!

body:
Things are going from bad to worse
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22770%2E4449941%2E2eixl9)
---
Hello,

Last week, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to stand with _MSNBC_ as they struggle with low ratings and a potential sale.

**But our records indicate that you still haven’t signed.** We’re still [17] signatures short of our goal!

We can’t abandon _MSNBC_ after all they’ve done for Democrats. [**Click HERE or use the button below to sign »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250117_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22770%2E4449941%2E2eixl9) | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250117_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22770%2E4449941%2E2eixl9)
---
We’ve attached the original petition below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message ---------

From: very concerning... [FFR]
Subject: _MSNBC_ is in DEEP trouble
To: TOP DEMOCRATS
**THIS IS BAD NEWS:**
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250117_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22770%2E4449941%2E2eixl9)
**THIS IS EVEN WORSE NEWS:**
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250117_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22770%2E4449941%2E2eixl9)
We’re **stunned** to see that _MSNBC_ is struggling after years of being one of the top options for progressive news.

**So we’re launching an _URGENT_ petition standing with _MSNBC_ during this trying time for them.**
[**Please, after all that _MSNBC_ has done for Democrats, we can’t abandon them now! Sign our petition to stand with _MSNBC_ »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250117_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=22770%2E4449941%2E2eixl9)
[25,000 SUPPORTERS NEEDED: Add your name immediately to stand with _MSNBC_ »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250117_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=22770%2E4449941%2E2eixl9)

Thank you for adding your voice to our emergency petition!

_– Fight for Reform_

name: Carolina at United We Dream
subject: The Fifth Circuit just ruled against DACA.
body:
Donations to our DACA Renewal Fund urgently needed | | | Peter — After months of deliberation, the Fifth Circuit Court released their decision on the DACA program: **They once again ruled against DACA, but kept renewals open–for now. This ruling is part of ongoing, deliberate attacks to undermine immigrant communities, limit opportunities, and enable mass deportation** For those of us who have DACA right now, we’re still protected and will be able to continue renewing. It’s unclear if or when this decision could be appealed in the courts. We must stay vigilant, organized, and ready to respond as a community. That’s why we’re encouraging all eligible DACA recipients to renew as soon as eligible — and calling on your support to make it one step easier for them by making a contribution toward our DACA Renewal Fund. **[Will you rush a donation to help DACA recipients while we still can? 100% of your contribution will go toward covering the $555 renewal fee for DACA recipients.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvkqBZ6VW_VFbtBGGVx_RZ5Quf9e5Bd4YqW_10f4teBltqowusuU1384QTkgtTmfLdl3kvrusv6hgHRRR_6x61glfy5cEnR9JRmsnz7OndVWt0A2nZC1NbjcrHs0gQ7oYvxz8prQjhKXqwaRd1PLmspN4VyF_Md7BrD1GWhMHbqbZSjZ0TnJRwE53zvIPmkVZbmCGxwDWxOnQ06gcgEiN4kIwUL7I1DIORT2nYlJ_Bk5U8Wdlkg8VO7p8vwFQ81GGb3ypYWBM5b4WppcTXOPwwIfRDx47H1uo_WZ1aeUEcb9cxueyu-K47lP705O5q_mCVp0oMl5Ciw8xCf8NiBZHcpkqWrJ-XZh7AjJt0ykdTs_7ZCOdGnx9nbEI2goKBgyNV0qTox5hiKA0qvnYwxxXnr7lN8CGosYNpy0QCzLFeufUH7ivUVtaNH8JNWkBlKVBw/4d9/MEnAKjS-Q9Gx1rWL6ddXug/h0/h001.g-wfeqXXqjB79a_6uVoLd9OM1ESmBiQKCO1O1E8MuLQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvkqBZ6VW_VFbtBGGVx_RZ5Quf9e5Bd4YqW_10f4teBltqowusuU1384QTkgtTmfLdl3kvrusv6hgHRRR_6x61gtEoI6Krux-EUDth-WA8z0PQ6kUzmiMthRm9FT8HIEOqYWyiQaJHYyd_mH09qNK7306OS3qa4ijyVm9l1LLPJUoGHdXYvo73iYtgfiSjXh0pmnltIn8Ejlcs4AmbREq15aEdaR02HktDGKNTMI1Rx_s9eQJQ9Efpm3eu_Yj3rCdZSHxFokQxS29arNSb_uYoOg0oNpSATei3gVbi8Dypqip-sk80EpT5-xHGBSpYHnMOVIXG00hGo6dxhrCi1-FKMWHQ_iyszOB1pQ77Aa6aIeXTf00gBQIMv1RqNhg07MzirthwB-WRkL3hrfhqQBHG5TmpdaMcXxPfXNq7TDJlhDpihJW5jn5YAbmaVUR1cpPxQhsPU9gAOS01sDz4TESeVUvehK1-vjofKxLa-bnaSfw/4d9/MEnAKjS-Q9Gx1rWL6ddXug/h1/h001.XHudffJHt4YpLnzQvq2sHrGQ6KhyfKMCQO1OFc3wQfE)

Here’s what you need to know about the decision
* DACA renewals are still open. Current DACA recipients across the country, including in Texas, are still protected and authorized to work.
* Current DACA recipients should renew as soon as they’re able.
* Talk to a lawyer or accredited legal service provider. The political landscape could change quickly, especially after January 20, 2025.

We must continue to have each other's backs because this fight is not over. DACA remains under constant attack, threatening the futures of immigrant youth and their families. We must take bold, urgent action to protect immigrants now.
**While we prepare for the fight ahead, our number one priority right now is making sure DACA recipients have the resources they need to renew.**
You can help by making a contribution that will be put right to work covering the $555 cost of renewal fee for current DACA recipients.

clean_body: Donations to our DACA Renewal Fund urgently needed | | | Peter — After months of deliberation, the Fifth Circuit Court released their decision on the DACA program: They once again ruled against DACA, but kept renewals open–for now. This ruling is part of ongoing, deliberate attacks to undermine immigrant communities, limit opportunities, and enable mass deportation For those of us who have DACA right now, we’re still protected and will be able to continue renewing. It’s unclear if or when this decision could be appealed in the courts. We must stay vigilant, organized, and ready to respond as a community. That’s why we’re encouraging all eligible DACA recipients to renew as soon as eligible — and calling on your support to make it one step easier for them by making a contribution toward our DACA Renewal Fund. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. Here’s what you need to know about the decision DACA renewals are still open. Current DACA recipients across the country, including in Texas, are still protected and authorized to work. Current DACA recipients should renew as soon as they’re able. Talk to a lawyer or accredited legal service provider. The political landscape could change quickly, especially after January 20, 2025. We must continue to have each other's backs because this fight is not over. DACA remains under constant attack, threatening the futures of immigrant youth and their families. We must take bold, urgent action to protect immigrants now. While we prepare for the fight ahead, our number one priority right now is making sure DACA recipients have the resources they need to renew. You can help by making a contribution that will be put right to work covering the $555 cost of renewal fee for current DACA recipients. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. Thank you for standing with United We Dream. We’re grateful that we can count on you in times like this. Carolina, United We Dream P.S. Follow us on: | | | | |

| Republicans love to go on about family values but then defund programs like Head Start that provide crucial early education and support to children from low-income families, defund the Department of Education, and so much more.

To me, family values mean, first and foremost, recognizing that families come in all shapes and sizes. And no matter what they look like,_**every family deserves to thrive**_.

That’s why, as I set out on another term in Congress, I’m committed to protecting hardworking families and fighting for:

**🏡 Housing Affordability and Lowering Costs:** Everyone deserves a safe and stable place to live. It’s time we invest in affordable housing and support policies that help families thrive.

**🌎 Clean Environment and Tackling Climate Change:** Here in West Michigan, I’m committed to curbing climate change and protecting our Great Lakes while creating jobs.

**🩺 Lowering Costs of Healthcare:** Healthcare is a right, not a privilege. We need to bring down the cost of prescription drugs and make sure every family has access to the care they need.

**🧡 Common-Sense Gun Safety Reform:** Every family deserves to feel safe in their community, free from the threat of gun violence. We must pass common-sense gun safety laws to protect our children and our neighborhoods.

**When Trump takes office in a few days, I will be spending every spare minute battling any challenges to our values, democracy, and the rule of law. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’d like your thoughts on life, family, and freedom
body:
My team and I are committed to championing the values that strengthen our nation—life, family, and freedom.

My team and I are committed to championing the values that strengthen our nation—life, family, and freedom.
|
---
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1dpvri4r1h0r21os44mt50a24b30asfjf5mbkfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72c9h2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot, [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk0lq6sttp9caa63qo4smi8r1s7gi8cpqdmgiffo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72c9h2bs) My team and I are committed to championing the values that strengthen our nation--life, family, and freedom. We're boldly standing up for pro-life principles and leading the charge for the significant improvement of our education system, with special emphasis on the teaching of true American history.

Although our resolve is unwavering, and our mission is clear, I need your help to refine our strategies and improve our efforts. Your invaluable perspective plays a critical role in shaping the future of our efforts.

I have prepared a brief survey about life, family and freedom that seeks to understand your views better. The survey focuses on the following key areas:
* The value of life for unborn children and the importance of pro-life advocacy.
* The role of family in shaping our future and the influence of education in reinforcing family values.
* Your views on individual freedoms and the significance of teaching our nation's founding principles.

You can start the survey here: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/life-family-freedom-survey/](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt2llolhbusto2vunrlh5ckka76jkncg664jtpeg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72c9h2bs)

Your feedback is crucial as we strive to address the issues that matter most to you. Together, we can work towards meaningful change in our communities and uphold the conservative values that make our nation great.

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. I sincerely appreciate your time, input, and unwavering support!

Best Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlnvvnterguk43r03v3mp0ltjvfd87mt3u2hrv5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdvn2vv3nuq151csq1627ldu2au27pjqta0td8o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze6rqadaf9plbgp7q73hgpervmf8q21i2755njd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

First Look News
---
