As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Lara Trump
subject: If you want truth to win, please open this email.
body:
You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind

| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zvhav950a7sim7ouf7jool8mm57193ka45164tag_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z55145c52hu8uvm7aq94kgqe79jsh5lk0up1goqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zsdlm669s5f2bg23ar1c80tmbmjis2l7h8jsc1bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z0p0b1v4p07tcv4hacqp93b5d4p0j3nvl5dfk5u0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1jpv3snrtq3cv26i64a50hoaqokrs7pn9jk67kg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2znntdtekdhgml2ff7voop1e12558vhc35o8ldou0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zhpgk1ur03k03j870c3hdtl4n1mrcoceaejg3ci8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2znbn79mon308ej3i27l5dde3gdr5kduhcsmj1060_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs)
---
**Lara Trump** **Wife, Mother, and Author**
---
|
---
| | **P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left.[Please help me fight by giving to Brave Books to protect our children today.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zs5s2eie91g1utnq854ljolpr3fghsonpjrg4kig_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs) **Thank you! - Lara
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zc2cdjc4tv1aapcobv44ca25qgpnrs795gsggms0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

Update For America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zj9ao36glm55jtef8mmbk6h31csiqj81q0mfslcg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekpjfcjk6mqj4t5m6gpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpge9o74sdh238h1e8he4937cpjm8p70c3h6aoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z3ovupba585r9m81keon3ro5adhhjmg0jf69p0j8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o72clh2bs)_

[](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4i2itfhhs6mdmrk7ojge71mn4mk6rql2jsusogg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cti69o30s9im49fg)

name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: You can send diapers to the fire victims
body:
As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zppv0aje759m8e7jj9j7lna8n0or16l4hj50aumo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o76cph2bs)
---
#
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv3ppvbdrg5591a618vsqq5mmrlgcuo556452a70_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o76cph2bs)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0hpq59aenjbfrrapljvh001r6egha5nhtpg6v2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o76cph2bs)**

Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6t79rcukpo8a4s8bq49783q2afg0lho73l8934o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o76cph2bs)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi87abho3e462tsiq902r0vrb6qfr4r5hn5tp15o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj0sjge9pr246h22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o76cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf02t0oera29v92fg5t8amu5gubeqal0mtinbff0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o76cph2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv3k79448vm1kmsrf8ps2j5bagntmr7c527pjv08_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cti69o30spj649fg)

name: Trump Senate Majority
subject: Democrats like Tina Smith put illegal immigrants before the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Help defeat her in 2026 >>

Friend,

With your help, we took back the Senate Majority for Republicans by defeating three incumbent Democrats in 2024. _**[But some of the most radical Left-wing Senators aren't up for re-election until 2026, and we need to start laying the groundwork to flip their seats right now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmbu1nl5tebh9uuql2pc9dh0gsjj2i6iv3ku2jo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o74c3h2bs)**_

Take Minnesota Senator Tina Smith, for example. She voted AGAINST the will of her constituents as one of only nine senators to oppose the bipartisan Laken Riley Act. Her whole career has been about putting illegal immigrants first -- NOT the American people.

Minnesota has been teetering on the edge of flipping red for the last several election cycles. With a larger financial investment from grassroots conservative donors like you, President Trump might have won the state this past November. That's why it's paramount we get to work defeating Tina Smith AS SOON AS POSSIBLE.

**[Split a donation right now between the NRSC and our Minnesota Senate GOP Nominee Fund to help DEFEAT Tina Smith.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgmm5ig11rr9aqoi01vhb9ravku3tmuk560abcfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie0o74c3h2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zf9olcshdtm34ee59oibjbm1na68bphldb2oa4h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie8pr4c3h2bs)

| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ze2ar9o9chpnoco3ccd8tiekvfpg6lco597kdjjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie8pr4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: Lara Trump
subject: If you want truth to win, please open this email.
body:
You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind

| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z77vao6r4igqd5k4gmqu7s9g28ufgvalqk6r26hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi20ujua4aapj6t52j70pejfe29hl7j72bij0rc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8lha8ev9u11g6cs79jkhhoit2ufhbsp2g53v4b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp7ui9dg6toitrp3kai43n49q1sipt7bajssbdng_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zea32t6ec6alh44fgf5nfg22nbd27jvr301cu5v8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeavraubcta4be7skgb52k9jpf5iepf5i5t1rl68_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8agthfbm45aijmqp7nl3ok4isc54cc523n8asu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuvckujlhp7ctlhf4vf2f5fbvaucbtfdu7mj8l1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs)
---
**Lara Trump** **Wife, Mother, and Author**
---
|
---
| | **P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left.[Please help me fight by giving to Brave Books to protect our children today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlunq56iph63aco942p0cgpvkinhmaaenlpqcg18_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs) **Thank you! - Lara
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zctcqr1ppu8hsqq7lkvtquebemp8ivhc0hf2og78_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoe5rdn4ltomu4m4f5vj40806gca286igbslg8ag_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6co74sjg6coh1k8gn48n24hjmcpr4cjgm2oj3c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zteguqp9lgr58iuqaq3gbjofd77iu1gd3ika7jlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmp2d0bossdcbc3tmp1n8qr8fanhbfoacp72s0ro_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cti69ob1c9hm49fg)

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: READ NOW: President Trump’s Historic Victory Rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We’ve come so far and this was the most important election in American history.

| |
---
| | | Friend - in less than 24 hours, President Trump will take the rally stage for the FINAL time before Inauguration Day.

We've come so far and this was the most important election in American history. _**[Thankfully, we dealt a crushing blow to the Democrat Machine that...](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfcr9lk7tcdevnj22cinbe9hk3b1grrjb27k90eg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs "Thankfully, we dealt a crushing blow to the Democrat Machine that...")**_
- Prosecuted President Trump over phony crimes
- Smeared our Conservative Supreme Court justices
- Stonewalled our investigation into Biden's corruption
- Spied on President Trump's campaign
- Desecrated our Flag and cherished monuments
- Infiltrated Catholic groups
- Botched the Afghanistan withdrawal
- Forced woke propaganda into our classrooms and military
And the list goes on... and on... and on...

But ever since its humiliating defeat in November, the Democrat Machine has called up billion-dollar megadonors to help kick its anti-Trump campaign into OVERDRIVE. **And Axios just revealed that they 're flooding millions of dollars into key, Republican-held House districts to dismantle our GOP Trifecta in Washington.**

_If we don 't fight back now, we could lose the House...

If we lose the House, we destroy our Republican Trifecta...

If we destroy our Trifecta, President Trump's entire legislative agenda could go up in FLAMES!!!_

_**[That's why I'm issuing one final rallying call before President Donald J. Trump and JD Vance's historic rally in Washington, DC.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zje08mk93spg1k0ig8cm6utf8lhpkara6vettbc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs "That’s why I’m issuing one final rallying call before President Donald J. Trump and JD Vance’s historic rally in Washington, DC.")**_

This rally will be a defining moment for the Republican Party AND the country. If every Patriot does their part, we can make this the greatest GOP fundraising day in American history!

You can play an essential role in this effort - as long as you step up right here and right now.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znfkoi5hj650c8hk9n2kl57ipbrpvb94aeivl5vo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs "Tomorrow: Trump-Vance Rally") | | [PITCH IN NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zce709lhvpe7goqeerf67c60pac4t0p6ajfl6h90_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs "PITCH IN NOW")
---

_It 's you, me, President Trump, and (soon-to-be) Vice President Vance vs. the Democrat Machine._

_**[Remember: The rally is in less than 24 hours so please join us now!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3oh3ugfvldh4pmr33bs78cope877j393on135jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs "Remember: The rally is in less than 24 hours so please join us now!")**_

For America,
Steve Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9899b8ee93q5u2hui7arkm6014b5qotjif304po_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt92f86smbqmdl4b5mfmoibcbaqpp44aoj4eh4uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvhboga55ai9i9urmpmkh04f9uh34502c76hremg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie2ob2cdh2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: READ NOW: President Trump’s Historic Victory Rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We’ve come so far and this was the most important election in American history.

| |
---
| | | Friend - in less than 24 hours, President Trump will take the rally stage for the FINAL time before Inauguration Day.

We've come so far and this was the most important election in American history. _**[Thankfully, we dealt a crushing blow to the Democrat Machine that...](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zom6huligdjrpjcni3m7bbfahm1mkunmkfooh63o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie6oj2cdh2bs "Thankfully, we dealt a crushing blow to the Democrat Machine that...")**_
- Prosecuted President Trump over phony crimes
- Smeared our Conservative Supreme Court justices
- Stonewalled our investigation into Biden's corruption
- Spied on President Trump's campaign
- Desecrated our Flag and cherished monuments
- Infiltrated Catholic groups
- Botched the Afghanistan withdrawal
- Forced woke propaganda into our classrooms and military
And the list goes on... and on... and on...

But ever since its humiliating defeat in November, the Democrat Machine has called up billion-dollar megadonors to help kick its anti-Trump campaign into OVERDRIVE. **And Axios just revealed that they 're flooding millions of dollars into key, Republican-held House districts to dismantle our GOP Trifecta in Washington.**

_If we don 't fight back now, we could lose the House...

If we lose the House, we destroy our Republican Trifecta...

If we destroy our Trifecta, President Trump's entire legislative agenda could go up in FLAMES!!!_

_**[That's why I'm issuing one final rallying call before President Donald J. Trump and JD Vance's historic rally in Washington, DC.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgo9r3edhlp4khb2nni3ftfopiqgv64u02s20vag_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie6oj2cdh2bs "That’s why I’m issuing one final rallying call before President Donald J. Trump and JD Vance’s historic rally in Washington, DC.")**_

This rally will be a defining moment for the Republican Party AND the country. If every Patriot does their part, we can make this the greatest GOP fundraising day in American history!

You can play an essential role in this effort - as long as you step up right here and right now.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcj3prhk99q9oa41lpqps51vnogcgs8t4io4sip8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie6oj2cdh2bs "Tomorrow: Trump-Vance Rally") | | [PITCH IN NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo7knhknadkp9kcfkmc5m1850q6kjg0ev9od3138_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie6oj2cdh2bs "PITCH IN NOW")
---

_It 's you, me, President Trump, and (soon-to-be) Vice President Vance vs. the Democrat Machine._

_**[Remember: The rally is in less than 24 hours so please join us now!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm8vekaev3g330fdbuo04bd419bku0jvgep1rqh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie6oj2cdh2bs "Remember: The rally is in less than 24 hours so please join us now!")**_

For America,
Steve Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkq41hgkiuvjn8bbq96t01droje1f3mpnn7hhc60_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie6oj2cdh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg9fgshu1cah41qgdj7s354n0f78iuj6t5kq2vng_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie6oj2cdh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsva3nnn0n2lv3no7b9g370it9eh42n3o89730pg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie6oj2cdh2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I’m not easily scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
But there’s one thing that keeps me up at night

| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsmlg152fvkg56hhqodvub1sfqt1e4n4vr5vugqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie1o32c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6339if85cvrsmf01idhbnfos5kaa34umbo7896o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie1o32c1h2bs)
|
---
This is President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House, Byron Donalds.
I grew up in Brooklyn, New York, raised by a single mother who sacrificed everything for me and my siblings.
I’ve had _**thick skin**_ from a young age - so if it’s a radical-left news anchor trying to gaslight me for being an unapologetic Black MAGA Patriot, or House Democrats going low with pathetic slurs, I’ll never take my foot off the gas until the fight is won.
I take that to heart even today as I continue the fight for the MAGA Movement, _**and I do it ALL for you**_.
Look, I’m not easily frightened, **but Democrats retaking the House Majority keeps me up at night.**
They’ve already begun building a war chest to sweep-up vulnerable Seats that they lost by a fraction of a percent, and MAGA Congressmembers are the **FIRST** on their target list.
They know if we lose our Majority - President Trump’s America First Agenda WILL come to a screeching halt.
I’m fighting for the _MAGA House Majority_ every single day, but the only way I can continue my efforts is through the support of folks just like you.
With the attacks from the radical-left, Fake News, and Democrats ratcheting up, I’ve never needed your support more.
_**[So I’m humbly asking, can you chip in today to help me keep Congress Red?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk86fkmn4pl77v2itcq6lkti32iuk24f3c5fofc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie1o32c1h2bs)**_ _****__****_

|
---
[KEEP CONGRESS RED](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhlieu455ijblcls5e2ndi2pi39ndkllugop5mbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie1o32c1h2bs)
|
---
Thank you and God Bless,
Byron Donalds
_****__****_

|

name: Senate GOP Alert
subject: Laying the groundwork for 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Help defeat her in 2026 >>

Friend,

With your help, we took back the Senate Majority for Republicans by defeating three incumbent Democrats in 2024. _**[But some of the most radical Left-wing Senators aren't up for re-election until 2026, and we need to start laying the groundwork to flip their seats right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zggo773lh80ap07trhe7t5n6s0bjk1luf32toaf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie1o35cjh2bs)**_

Take Minnesota Senator Tina Smith, for example. She voted AGAINST the will of her constituents as one of only nine senators to oppose the bipartisan Laken Riley Act. Her whole career has been about putting illegal immigrants first -- NOT the American people.

Minnesota has been teetering on the edge of flipping red for the last several election cycles. With a larger financial investment from grassroots conservative donors like you, President Trump might have won the state this past November. That's why it's paramount we get to work defeating Tina Smith AS SOON AS POSSIBLE.

**[Split a donation right now between the NRSC and our Minnesota Senate GOP Nominee Fund to help DEFEAT Tina Smith.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zomkvr78n6t3lia9n6mq3mkngtj7m4lo09q01n20_rp22sh2s8i6epj7chie1o35cjh2bs)**

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I’m not easily scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
But there’s one thing that keeps me up at night

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsi49p6gp4kp2d4ap7li6rnrc0rl300vqh1k96ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9g68or6c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo7itpc36c60thvrkhknd8up1nv38ip4nmdrmu88_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9g68or6c3h2bs)
|
---
This is President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House, Byron Donalds.
I grew up in Brooklyn, New York, raised by a single mother who sacrificed everything for me and my siblings.
I’ve had _**thick skin**_ from a young age - so if it’s a radical-left news anchor trying to gaslight me for being an unapologetic Black MAGA Patriot, or House Democrats going low with pathetic slurs, I’ll never take my foot off the gas until the fight is won.
I take that to heart even today as I continue the fight for the MAGA Movement, _**and I do it ALL for you**_.
Look, I’m not easily frightened, **but Democrats retaking the House Majority keeps me up at night.**
They’ve already begun building a war chest to sweep-up vulnerable Seats that they lost by a fraction of a percent, and MAGA Congressmembers are the **FIRST** on their target list.
They know if we lose our Majority - President Trump’s America First Agenda WILL come to a screeching halt.
I’m fighting for the _MAGA House Majority_ every single day, but the only way I can continue my efforts is through the support of folks just like you.
With the attacks from the radical-left, Fake News, and Democrats ratcheting up, I’ve never needed your support more.
_**[So I’m humbly asking, can you chip in today to help me keep Congress Red?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgu7jj412g6nlcr70k3jb0eqosn29ru9lfe8t1fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9g68or6c3h2bs)**_ _****__****_

|
---
[KEEP CONGRESS RED](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6pncuenfqi0qge0ee64u4r22p3o043h1afg9h40_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9g68or6c3h2bs)
|
---
Thank you and God Bless,
Byron Donalds
_****__****_

subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19870/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/ba590fe40d134c7fef91d735110212c77d021d8c). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

---
|
---
| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19870/6374453/07da5a544b1fa64820020bec4cec4f714fed0cb6/ba590fe40d134c7fef91d735110212c77d021d8c). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19870/6374453/07da5a544b1fa64820020bec4cec4f714fed0cb6/ba590fe40d134c7fef91d735110212c77d021d8c).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19870/6374453/07da5a544b1fa64820020bec4cec4f714fed0cb6/ba590fe40d134c7fef91d735110212c77d021d8c)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

body:

---
This is President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House, Byron Donalds.
I grew up in Brooklyn, New York, raised by a single mother who sacrificed everything for me and my siblings.
I’ve had _**thick skin**_ from a young age - so if it’s a radical-left news anchor trying to gaslight me for being an unapologetic Black MAGA Patriot, or House Democrats going low with pathetic slurs, I’ll never take my foot off the gas until the fight is won.
I take that to heart even today as I continue the fight for the MAGA Movement, _**and I do it ALL for you**_.
Look, I’m not easily frightened, **but Democrats retaking the House Majority keeps me up at night.**
They’ve already begun building a war chest to sweep-up vulnerable Seats that they lost by a fraction of a percent, and MAGA Congressmembers are the **FIRST** on their target list.
They know if we lose our Majority - President Trump’s America First Agenda WILL come to a screeching halt.
I’m fighting for the _MAGA House Majority_ every single day, but the only way I can continue my efforts is through the support of folks just like you.
With the attacks from the radical-left, Fake News, and Democrats ratcheting up, I’ve never needed your support more.
_**[So I’m humbly asking, can you chip in today to help me keep Congress Red?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmcvmadaqvc9dinlkknrinnifout83306hkqlkd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9g64pb4cth2bs)**_ _****__****_

subject: District 46 Newsletter
body:
---
| | | | | | | [ ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=1bfae8795cebadd72dbf1eda9c8adb3a953534f5990ba7b1b00323532e5bceb9ae6bf13903102be426a8a7eea75caffe2103724827a04df8)

---|---
[ ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=1bfae8795cebadd7b1ae477cfb9dcf37fa088fb5b7068ac3650cbf837dbbab228cbdb0545c2265e73db6d27992bd5dbaeea825928d12f38a)| [Instagram](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=1bfae8795cebadd7b1ae477cfb9dcf37fa088fb5b7068ac3650cbf837dbbab228cbdb0545c2265e73db6d27992bd5dbaeea825928d12f38a)
---|---
| | |
---
| |
# _Weekly Recap_
It was a busy second week of session this week with committees and hearing directly from constituents here in the statehouse.

I served on the Committees of Tax and Fiscal Policy, Education and Career Development and as the Ranking Minority Member for the Utilities Committee.

I was also able to join my colleagues in the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus as we set out our priorities for the session.

In some major bill news, SB 111 passed out of the Insurance and Financial Institutions Committee. I had the honor to testify before the committee along with many other brave people who gave their accounts of surviving because of the selflessness of a living organ donor. There is more work to do, as SB 111 now makes its way to the Senate floor for second reading! Stay tuned for more updates.
---
#
* * *
---
|
---
| | | This year, I am carrying the Senator Jean Breaux "MOMnibus" Maternal Health Package to confront Indiana's unprecedented maternal health crisis.

These bills, [Senate Bill (SB) 521](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=1bfae8795cebadd78db57ee779e67960e96a02441b3af0ec14fec8b55d403145f2bbfefebb239bff61bfbe2d1bfc48c8e3ce448c81237f57 "Senate Bill \(SB\) 521") and [SB 522](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=1bfae8795cebadd7f8557b6222daf93e3034be1266f59ae5743a9fd3110b546f26b34907ca700c762ef5e0976e88a2dcd810999120f69937 "SB 522"), aim to provide more mothers with quality postpartum care by increasing insurance coverage, funding and access to care for critical services such as Doula support.
* By requiring doula services to be covered under Medicaid, we are sending a message that every mother should have access to high-quality care that is proven to lead to better health outcomes.

* Stillbirths impact far too many mothers in our state. One thing this package will do to tackle the issue is create a program aimed at providing evidence based information on the importance of tracking fetal movement in the third trimester of pregnancy.

* The MOMnibus package would also establish grant programs to build lactation rooms for mothers who need to nurse their newborns, as well as expand access to postpartum mental health plans and resources, vasectomy coverage and tubal litigation measures.

**With this legislation, we are looking to reform the maternal healthcare system in Indiana to protect mothers and their newborns; by doing so, we are investing directly into our future.**
---
#
* * *
---
# Community Boards and Commissions Spotlight
It's an honor to be a part of the Talent for Indiana Committee, where I work alongside community leaders in connecting IU Indianapolis students to our Indiana workforce.

In our most recent meeting, we reviewed campus priorities that focus on the building of talent initiatives, came up with strategies to foster the development of incredibly talented students, and looked at how we can attract and retain top students from home, around the country, and even the world, to Indiana for a strong education.
---
#
* * *
---
|
---
# Young Leaders of Today
Seeing our young people take an active role in fostering community is something that never ceases to inspire.

I had the opportunity to see an Indianapolis leader in action this past week when Tristan, a senior at Brebeuf Jesuit Preparatory School, hosted Advocacy Day to amplify minority voices.

Tristan's goal of giving more voices to suppressed groups like the Queer, Hispanic, African American, Muslim, and Jewish communities comes from his experiences learning about the Hispanic Community he is a part of, and the hardships that so many face.

Tristan said that he wants people to walk away from these crucial conversations and know that they are "...heard, they are important, and that they can cause change."

I am looking forward to continuing to work with leaders like Tristan to ensure Hoosiers feel empowered and know that they can create change.
---
#
* * *
---
| | | |
---
|
# Take my Pre-Session Survey
I want to continue to hear from you!

Though session has started, there is still time to submit your response to my pre-session survey. This information helps me best represent District 46 in the Statehouse.

Thank you for sharing your thoughts and using your voice to help create change.
---
| | [Take My Survey](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=1bfae8795cebadd7b5ab65d7362dbe18169644acacd86e526f70acb2ad5b0602e49da9f89dc17f6f863e1cf52c5926726369d34a1ce5426d)
---
#
* * *
---
| | | |
---
|
---
# _In the News_
[Governor Braun eliminates DEI initiatives from state government](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=1bfae8795cebadd774a1f265efae8c3581fad58097ab62e3b53c5a53de7a064042ac803ec065e6048c2a566087808db4c07f8ae27fd5db58 "Governor Braun eliminates DEI initiatives from state government") [Local education leaders share wins and updates on attendance and literacy](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=1bfae8795cebadd780614bc989195ec39ccc71dfe6387c4ae8ac1df4464ff26db26696a0f08b3dd5febbde162dc7ed92049baacf206a02b6 "Local education leaders share wins and updates on attendance and literacy") ['Babies in the budget' advocates push paid leave, newborn tax credit proposals](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=1bfae8795cebadd728ecebbf45d8615632515a242317098d71c02649470488f06b4defd92835e7ea58f205c7e04cdd94f9a89c0ab3610fae "‘Babies in the budget’ advocates push paid leave, newborn tax credit proposals")
---
| |
* * *
# COMMUNITY RESOURCES
To view my community resources guide, [_click here_.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=1bfae8795cebadd7532ce8f832cf236e155b32755d219e931d96f9bc0df75dfdf76bc3ee2ed9b028ed3a12f88f3e394b20c862ab1c38c0d4 "click here. ")
* * *
---
| | | | | | |

---

**[Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov](mailto:Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov)**

200 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN, 46204, US

_January 18th, 2025_

When it comes to gear, only the strongest should make the cut.

That's why we're excited to introduce the [**Skull Crusher – the ultimate hand held sword** – the ultimate hand held sword](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19877/6374453/2e85357ebd752214494902428fa55461e8a36fb3/9cbe79434b0ddd515418c618e0533d3e009ea49f) designed for those who demand power, precision, and performance. Crafted for those who understand the value of reliability and strength, the Skull Crusher is more than just a tool – it’s your go-to companion for whatever life throws at you.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19877/6374453/2e85357ebd752214494902428fa55461e8a36fb3/9cbe79434b0ddd515418c618e0533d3e009ea49f)

You don’t settle for mediocrity, and neither should your gear. With the Skull Crusher, you get a tool that’s just as rugged and reliable as you are. **Ready to take your gear to the next level?

[Get the Skull Crusher today and experience the strength and durability that sets it apart.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19877/6374453/2e85357ebd752214494902428fa55461e8a36fb3/9cbe79434b0ddd515418c618e0533d3e009ea49f)**

Melania embodies the values that make AMERICA GREAT —faith, family, and an UNWAVERING commitment to the American people. Yet, the mainstream media viciously ATTACKS her. They want to silence her impact and erase her legacy. But we won’t let them. This is YOUR moment to stand up for Melania—the First Lady who embodies faith, family, and the true spirit of America. What do YOU think? This is YOUR chance to show that Patriots like YOU see and appreciate everything Melania does for this country. Patriot, the Radical Left may try to erase her legacy, but we won’t let them. Peter, I was proud to have voted YES on the Laken Riley Act, a common-sense bill to hold illegal immigrant criminals accountable. I couldn't be more proud to have voted yes as one of my first votes.

Unfortunately, 159 Democrats voted against this bill. __**This shows where their allegiances truly lie. **__

body:
Help defeat her in 2026 >>

Friend,

With your help, we took back the Senate Majority for Republicans by defeating three incumbent Democrats in 2024. _**[But some of the most radical Left-wing Senators aren't up for re-election until 2026, and we need to start laying the groundwork to flip their seats right now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80947eee47a7486290e91c5d726541cc&_e=jnnKoVcuFXH9BbV72d_YMz8z5pJk6-7iImwKSuR_heKTWj8lXKYRSYPnnhUlZVwz7mfue3S_NuHCkaPikVhf55pbCXQS0qiMLhI_Epf5IsU0qty-MQn7EskPJdWkYm9miyEKVMWH8vBe_BPFRvH2ZE35KnuNZogwkvnRvxtAwLvlhzoQxvcsMEY6ywR8XetYk7AqZv1tUjvD5vORbH1_cIy3O2adDgui6DcZcOTwUMgS2jh4vGVXzTKPsVIATrVmAZfYI2VX0otYiJmtG-CfZX_VX9OgimjSH10vISLlxAL_d9jZFWPmt-KGsoTPTfOy2DFZSSvbKkB_0S9EXz5_hzcv54_35ibkioNabtfmlhiOEsMb9TmE3v2-cKDmsdvFlnak_VowMU_pGGRcrZZMWffEIwdYRyGlz0G444Zk5ygG82WxegIUeMlAeFFjCtSIm4LFdxELuS_1ieC-XcoJmg%3D%3D)**_

Take Minnesota Senator Tina Smith, for example. She voted AGAINST the will of her constituents as one of only nine senators to oppose the bipartisan Laken Riley Act. Her whole career has been about putting illegal immigrants first -- NOT the American people.

Minnesota has been teetering on the edge of flipping red for the last several election cycles. With a larger financial investment from grassroots conservative donors like you, President Trump might have won the state this past November. That's why it's paramount we get to work defeating Tina Smith AS SOON AS POSSIBLE.

Take Minnesota Senator Tina Smith, for example. She voted AGAINST the will of her constituents as one of only nine senators to oppose the bipartisan Laken Riley Act. Her whole career has been about putting illegal immigrants first -- NOT the American people. Minnesota has been teetering on the edge of flipping red for the last several election cycles. With a larger financial investment from grassroots conservative donors like you, President Trump might have won the state this past November. That's why it's paramount we get to work defeating Tina Smith AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. #
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? clean_body: This initiative is not merely about economic reform. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-jaBRHZW3n2f0eQpavlr6A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpbiCUP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVdFRklNQUdFX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDExOFcDc3BjQgpnf_mHi2fkuynoUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: READ NOW: President Trump’s Historic Victory Rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We’ve come so far and this was the most important election in American history.

| |
---
| | | Friend - in less than 24 hours, President Trump will take the rally stage for the FINAL time before Inauguration Day.

We've come so far and this was the most important election in American history. _**[Thankfully, we dealt a crushing blow to the Democrat Machine that...](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fde3da13833d41389545cf3d560d6e0f&_e=D_LJxNNIBPrbZWzbNFU4zHk27LrnPeCFmmm56-P_3HXjpH4myWYdhe-D1NOHCQQX8dCxXJQIriLcysNuN0emIh8lVt6daKTgzt5K_N3o1Fs4jN_JabZ3hpqdkM4QJGriLMCQef6wBx0Ez1JJdJTEqbHY3n9xy2lYA2oGVH4ZQ4cAJLuO5ggDLZ1VHVGcIn4p4AgpyrHovhBYUcOwQJC60rqNbZ2uOjZnjWI_pTZzFE-LxJhgTDzu_jgunj3eaczcxzIvRmsRytgguHpxQDhbt50Dn2gzav9m7VwUvR7JtUAROIsQ3itLS_GJSkFRzNUlEWhAvcMJH0fb-49JMjpwkd9d21lkBVhl31MNNQu_abIGN5eOuKoyB_Z5TwB0Inmjd1lpz0NIfpI4BBJ7eyap3aVpkXmGC6R6BvZ1LE0GwGyLGOxEOMK9Dl6cNPhYmALI-Eu_t-7OZXmUDul46ciCNLkYObbnd4WHVwuk2aj8Qqk%3D "Thankfully, we dealt a crushing blow to the Democrat Machine that...")**_
- Prosecuted President Trump over phony crimes
- Smeared our Conservative Supreme Court justices
- Stonewalled our investigation into Biden's corruption
- Spied on President Trump's campaign
- Desecrated our Flag and cherished monuments
- Infiltrated Catholic groups
- Botched the Afghanistan withdrawal
- Forced woke propaganda into our classrooms and military
And the list goes on... and on... and on...

But ever since its humiliating defeat in November, the Democrat Machine has called up billion-dollar megadonors to help kick its anti-Trump campaign into OVERDRIVE. **And Axios just revealed that they 're flooding millions of dollars into key, Republican-held House districts to dismantle our GOP Trifecta in Washington.**

_If we don 't fight back now, we could lose the House...

If we lose the House, we destroy our Republican Trifecta...

If we destroy our Trifecta, President Trump's entire legislative agenda could go up in FLAMES!!!_

_**[That's why I'm issuing one final rallying call before President Donald J. Trump and JD Vance's historic rally in Washington, DC.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fde3da13833d41389545cf3d560d6e0f&_e=D_LJxNNIBPrbZWzbNFU4zHk27LrnPeCFmmm56-P_3HXjpH4myWYdhe-D1NOHCQQX8dCxXJQIriLcysNuN0emIh8lVt6daKTgzt5K_N3o1Fs4jN_JabZ3hpqdkM4QJGriLMCQef6wBx0Ez1JJdJTEqbHY3n9xy2lYA2oGVH4ZQ4cAJLuO5ggDLZ1VHVGcIn4p4AgpyrHovhBYUcOwQJC60rqNbZ2uOjZnjWI_pTZzFE-LxJhgTDzu_jgunj3eaczcxzIvRmsRytgguHpxQDhbt50Dn2gzav9m7VwUvR7JtUAROIsQ3itLS_GJSkFRzNUlEWhAvcMJH0fb-49JMjpwkWgIkIGO5-wCkkS-BrwgR-ymZX4dvPTwFb06INsYoM8sCzLNxyo1PIdLN-r4Hk7xfRiodf4kCfRdFHveKtQdKgKCnHDsD20l7UtMy0aoz-1djCZzB_byyh0w6mH90GDj7L8jlc2DHukDzY8tYxC6NrI%3D "That’s why I’m issuing one final rallying call before President Donald J. Trump and JD Vance’s historic rally in Washington, DC.")**_

This rally will be a defining moment for the Republican Party AND the country. If every Patriot does their part, we can make this the greatest GOP fundraising day in American history!

You can play an essential role in this effort - as long as you step up right here and right now.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fde3da13833d41389545cf3d560d6e0f&_e=D_LJxNNIBPrbZWzbNFU4zHk27LrnPeCFmmm56-P_3HXjpH4myWYdhe-D1NOHCQQX8dCxXJQIriLcysNuN0emIh8lVt6daKTgzt5K_N3o1Fs4jN_JabZ3hpqdkM4QJGriLMCQef6wBx0Ez1JJdJTEqbHY3n9xy2lYA2oGVH4ZQ4cAJLuO5ggDLZ1VHVGcIn4p4AgpyrHovhBYUcOwQJC60rqNbZ2uOjZnjWI_pTZzFE-LxJhgTDzu_jgunj3eaczcxzIvRmsRytgguHpxQDhbt50Dn2gzav9m7VwUvR7JtUAROIsQ3itLS_GJSkFRzNUlEWhAvcMJH0fb-49JMjpwkaUK1dIja0PE0SQ8Bzy-bUN5zK1YQFpXuI3sSdLry_UE5wNzu5mrArYlzeIAHRcCy21hdiV1Cn0ICKrCdOlRGYv8gJQ0zpfWJhu4RhYBlW1q5qcP2H7BsfN2rmJ86WGQ92bqY7qk50DMlu4382Q2bW8%3D "Tomorrow: Trump-Vance Rally") | | [PITCH IN NOW](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fde3da13833d41389545cf3d560d6e0f&_e=D_LJxNNIBPrbZWzbNFU4zHk27LrnPeCFmmm56-P_3HXjpH4myWYdhe-D1NOHCQQX8dCxXJQIriLcysNuN0emIh8lVt6daKTgzt5K_N3o1Fs4jN_JabZ3hpqdkM4QJGriLMCQef6wBx0Ez1JJdJTEqbHY3n9xy2lYA2oGVH4ZQ4cAJLuO5ggDLZ1VHVGcIn4p4AgpyrHovhBYUcOwQJC60rqNbZ2uOjZnjWI_pTZzFE-LxJhgTDzu_jgunj3eaczcxzIvRmsRytgguHpxQDhbt50Dn2gzav9m7VwUvR7JtUAROIsQ3itLS_GJSkFRzNUlEWhAvcMJH0fb-49JMjpwkeXylCA0L1F4CiN2_lrE7F6SUsKbqPlWRMMyTQu-IOzyPXhVFmbdjT9PxBSIQOkgJWQ3vzyGoOe6-McMYpZ4nmEKxBFeg3iksveh5Eogqan1j5NOJpscg4xWu4fErK561ayYWTQXkFYp9VkF-XLrGI8%3D "PITCH IN NOW")

body:
We’ve come so far and this was the most important election in American history.

| |
---
| | | Friend - in less than 24 hours, President Trump will take the rally stage for the FINAL time before Inauguration Day.

We've come so far and this was the most important election in American history. _**[Thankfully, we dealt a crushing blow to the Democrat Machine that...](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c49d052e4db24a7da2f75ff3e96828bd&_e=yENngyVM9Pg68FU_L2G4O8jlBZYxzGF-4YwZKdsXql_TpAIRKq6kvqwtHCK_tJTh_3gcpWwDMEs20zF_F_8_60LXGUMuup6IgNqjZhBn0rl1DqjjR1YxMkuk00eo4wwPfOPKVjCQdoUazwlEC7zwZ1QJbRdZjT9FWNDm4338tvXPHSxLQXQmO_USunY1iZD1GXpuk-XyDSioXe0DVohYo_8vvoeOYIS0BLh98lrCzP48w6Fay-F_eHBAcv62luxvKoGXj7IpDRfQmW9TtDn2nFCg8-4SPvnufLYsgXK3jT5qn-I6PFulNkdZ7UKf1sBNHncIgUbbdtYiptze0szW_j4qjw0sIbUajiNDx9kFf0X2Kkn4BcCOCRlwqb0xuHSzBzxBgfsfLb1aRaQiq1iVftEbsavoqjgkqL57SzKX4ejzXm9wo5FiSO6kaN7xumEGB9qo1ewklUtcsc4a2h1YLRtcby6vLP-Zz5fNxn_P6DY%3D "Thankfully, we dealt a crushing blow to the Democrat Machine that...")**_
- Prosecuted President Trump over phony crimes
- Smeared our Conservative Supreme Court justices
- Stonewalled our investigation into Biden's corruption
- Spied on President Trump's campaign
- Desecrated our Flag and cherished monuments
- Infiltrated Catholic groups
- Botched the Afghanistan withdrawal
- Forced woke propaganda into our classrooms and military
And the list goes on... and on... and on...

But ever since its humiliating defeat in November, the Democrat Machine has called up billion-dollar megadonors to help kick its anti-Trump campaign into OVERDRIVE. **And Axios just revealed that they 're flooding millions of dollars into key, Republican-held House districts to dismantle our GOP Trifecta in Washington.**

_If we don 't fight back now, we could lose the House...

If we lose the House, we destroy our Republican Trifecta...

If we destroy our Trifecta, President Trump's entire legislative agenda could go up in FLAMES!!!_

_**[That's why I'm issuing one final rallying call before President Donald J. Trump and JD Vance's historic rally in Washington, DC.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c49d052e4db24a7da2f75ff3e96828bd&_e=yENngyVM9Pg68FU_L2G4O8jlBZYxzGF-4YwZKdsXql_TpAIRKq6kvqwtHCK_tJTh_3gcpWwDMEs20zF_F_8_60LXGUMuup6IgNqjZhBn0rl1DqjjR1YxMkuk00eo4wwPfOPKVjCQdoUazwlEC7zwZ1QJbRdZjT9FWNDm4338tvXPHSxLQXQmO_USunY1iZD1GXpuk-XyDSioXe0DVohYo_8vvoeOYIS0BLh98lrCzP48w6Fay-F_eHBAcv62luxvKoGXj7IpDRfQmW9TtDn2nFCg8-4SPvnufLYsgXK3jT5qn-I6PFulNkdZ7UKf1sBNHncIgUbbdtYiptze0szW_iNDmfSyWXjKHtox1g7XaAHu8Ri6-zOcCe0E_-rGVdjZ3m3wAFbLgUBl-vexgrHxgdRSTdbUTQdB2jYAckaWI6PIklyEPIxN0S8OzINWSgrlwuBXjC5XMAqIYlMcTkf5mD5nEOyO9bsHCtXqVF0qCPQ%3D "That’s why I’m issuing one final rallying call before President Donald J. Trump and JD Vance’s historic rally in Washington, DC.")**_

This rally will be a defining moment for the Republican Party AND the country. If every Patriot does their part, we can make this the greatest GOP fundraising day in American history!

You can play an essential role in this effort - as long as you step up right here and right now.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c49d052e4db24a7da2f75ff3e96828bd&_e=yENngyVM9Pg68FU_L2G4O8jlBZYxzGF-4YwZKdsXql_TpAIRKq6kvqwtHCK_tJTh_3gcpWwDMEs20zF_F_8_60LXGUMuup6IgNqjZhBn0rl1DqjjR1YxMkuk00eo4wwPfOPKVjCQdoUazwlEC7zwZ1QJbRdZjT9FWNDm4338tvXPHSxLQXQmO_USunY1iZD1GXpuk-XyDSioXe0DVohYo_8vvoeOYIS0BLh98lrCzP48w6Fay-F_eHBAcv62luxvKoGXj7IpDRfQmW9TtDn2nFCg8-4SPvnufLYsgXK3jT5qn-I6PFulNkdZ7UKf1sBNHncIgUbbdtYiptze0szW_ttOFOFQSR2ibGXFlxvAPvI2zQgaXfbK7e26W1WtwBdW3i1u2kOhPJGaryKxWQFBrTq0f-Sl0tSof5HidXaoAPCq6pHoTvbfYVEiVzXfSOSHITrq2hJsdY1jvAQ_CikZ-u-E4SupX12GkwKEkDLRD78%3D "Tomorrow: Trump-Vance Rally") | | [PITCH IN NOW](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c49d052e4db24a7da2f75ff3e96828bd&_e=yENngyVM9Pg68FU_L2G4O8jlBZYxzGF-4YwZKdsXql_TpAIRKq6kvqwtHCK_tJTh_3gcpWwDMEs20zF_F_8_60LXGUMuup6IgNqjZhBn0rl1DqjjR1YxMkuk00eo4wwPfOPKVjCQdoUazwlEC7zwZ1QJbRdZjT9FWNDm4338tvXPHSxLQXQmO_USunY1iZD1GXpuk-XyDSioXe0DVohYo_8vvoeOYIS0BLh98lrCzP48w6Fay-F_eHBAcv62luxvKoGXj7IpDRfQmW9TtDn2nFCg8-4SPvnufLYsgXK3jT5qn-I6PFulNkdZ7UKf1sBNHncIgUbbdtYiptze0szW_sz1IIZeMr0kdwAzyGnmr4HftbY83X1X-v4KTTC2xETCSuEJIElUSPz8Ic3pYaTsYbJaXbO8ziez_xv2ed_obi6ApVIbVmP-uqrlT4Xmw0MtsEDWMKyXw-j1nyuvy8DTM-sw4SnjIJ9zkiIM6vaEN2U%3D "PITCH IN NOW")

clean_body: We’ve come so far and this was the most important election in American history. | | | | | Friend - in less than 24 hours, President Trump will take the rally stage for the FINAL time before Inauguration Day. We've come so far and this was the most important election in American history. "Thankfully, we dealt a crushing blow to the Democrat Machine that..." - Prosecuted President Trump over phony crimes - Smeared our Conservative Supreme Court justices - Stonewalled our investigation into Biden's corruption - Spied on President Trump's campaign - Desecrated our Flag and cherished monuments - Infiltrated Catholic groups - Botched the Afghanistan withdrawal - Forced woke propaganda into our classrooms and military And the list goes on... and on... and on... But ever since its humiliating defeat in November, the Democrat Machine has called up billion-dollar megadonors to help kick its anti-Trump campaign into OVERDRIVE. And Axios just revealed that they 're flooding millions of dollars into key, Republican-held House districts to dismantle our GOP Trifecta in Washington. If we don 't fight back now, we could lose the House... If we lose the House, we destroy our Republican Trifecta... If we destroy our Trifecta, President Trump's entire legislative agenda could go up in FLAMES!!! "That’s why I’m issuing one final rallying call before President Donald J. Trump and JD Vance’s historic rally in Washington, DC." This rally will be a defining moment for the Republican Party AND the country. If every Patriot does their part, we can make this the greatest GOP fundraising day in American history! You can play an essential role in this effort - as long as you step up right here and right now. body:
Early voting JUST BEGAN for his primary and I was proud to endorse him for this can’t-lose seat.

| |
---
| | | Hey - I'll make this email short and sweet.

MAGA Patriot Jimmy Patronis is running in FL-01's Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat. **Early voting JUST BEGAN for his primary and I was proud to endorse him for this can 't-lose seat.**

This is our first real test since Republicans won the House, Senate, and White House so it'll take every single one of us to keep that momentum going.

That's why I'm following up. _I 'm humbly asking you one last time to read Jimmy's message BEFORE early voting ends:_

Sharp. The Sharpstown Scandal implicated dozens of lawmakers and led to significant reforms aimed at increasing government transparency. ## State Employees Fired for SNAP Breach
Seven state employees have been fired for [improperly accessing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2ypCAQhZ8GMyy6_cOAYBOyu-mGVgvNHWpRLGGuM2-_5eQbd_X3nXP-fC1fFFPcv3_Txqa-Ql5Q4SAVSNCLp5jeS994syo_Q8MGpm6CedaDah5mJM3rOKievF5d4M75mQCHkYJGVKqJ5oYpAA2AWkGLYxhD6JxXoAeCWfSKfaz5bOuDK7-ohPTOP3y2Lm9NMo9ajyK6XwKtQHtdV_u3UL2PAu3OVxFoP28C7a0SaBUItDAJtKVSZcnbkfKbucjyLAe7yl7mIEtlunvLcOZNpnzJuLu8sbxxe5HHc03RSSollkq7Y0nO5edeb1VzGn9cMaVYxkn06nujmD6R6383_DH4LwAA__8fbHWS) accounts belonging to 61,104 Texans who receive Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefits. SNAP includes Medicaid, food stamps, and other public assistance programs. The employees allegedly accessed the accounts between June 2021 and December 2024 in what is believed to be the [largest data breach](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8Gb1j3Xtv8DAxdvKVrR4sYiJEwRIbGydtXyd7503eOdH4uy8XGFPPt2-7etGcoCwFNHJCjWpyN6bWMnTNXcBo7b1AOErVWE3SbGWCVk6M1WCGEBhLqGsSgnEaBKKToonnDAFEhkgLsSQQRwrA6QDVZ1GwE72IrR9823_zT1pBe5eGPfi17l8zW2r2y4YvRzGg-z7N_2a2U98pozv6sjObPj9ds7_zqsw-xVR5zKMduWyyZr-U3OU4w4jTCIPut7ak7jLufMaVYhWQj3HYb00fa_q3wMPQXAAD__4XUXqE) in the Texas Health and Human Services Commission’s history. Four of the employees were fired in December. In a separate case, another employee was fired earlier last year for illegally possessing information on 3,392 SNAP accounts. Two others were fired after $270,000 was stolen from around 500 food stamp accounts. The Texas Health and Human Services Office of Inspector General has referred those three individuals to the local district attorney’s office for prosecution. If you have a Lone Star Card, you can check for suspicious activity through [YourTexasBenefits.com](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQQOGnsbugmcGAXbi4DV1uuyXyzzhYMnEE3mx4-1XSb3_0SefrulxdLvl---82tu2V6kJAwwXwgnqJLpdzUTJaD9GgZItTP6ExegC5WghBodfasNGEPAQIQSeHySvPjkhm-8YAUSOSBuxoTGNKfYiAenBohAKOudW9ays3frkjlbM-ee9C3WSxa2uPQ_T_BM2C5rN-75_I851Tbse7EjTL3cbHTy4lH-MkFNw2l8tHaH8uPS39BgAA___5Wk6h) or the Your Texas Benefits mobile app.
## School Board Meeting Gets Heated
Dr. Tracy Johnson, superintendent of Keller ISD, [offered to resign during a heated school board meeting](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAUBOCnwR0WB_9gFxS3cZfbbmkRONhHiyECEidvv_L2203xaTSar9t6MxQobv_Ngbq-fVqlkAMXwGFanaHwWfvG6btwMzSoQXUK5nkaRLNrdDMCGGEnZefed8PdoBqV6nqFo5TYkL7KBMAEICcBrRz96H1nnYBpMDCzXqCjmnJbd6z4NsWHT3phbm06mqD3Wh-Fdf-YXJhczvNsfXr3Ec9yASaXKzK5fGMImDkVx8vzgZlixegwVp68x1x4xkJbNJVS5O6ZKW7cpgtVSs_Ci91TCvyeTHb8QKwUtyZr9zgpBCqjYr3YDkPhd1f986iXlj8BAAD__5QVbz4) Thursday amid discussions about potentially splitting the district in two. [Over 100 speakers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPozAQBeBfY7pBtglgChfRSXS59nTbIAePk9EajOxJSP79ivRbzUhP-vT0_l2mi6NI6-2vW9DyK6RJS92CVKDM5B3F93SqvL1KP6gKreqbXg2DaWV1t6H3Tvad602jnGzaDuc-hGCC6fRgWqzIHphUyiiljVS17kIXQjN7qUzr1CBOEj1xyjXfkfHlSojv9MRcz2mpor0zb0U0Z6FHocd93-ulrEcm9IgrPIrQ44r7cT7_N8aIGTg_CiMW2ClGWBAZ3DU9GOa0cj78Qi7CltOWiovACcoWicFT4UwzA63AexJ6dBnOZ_Wi_3--qmz9dohUul6c5G1xFD9F-dflnlb_BAAA__9yeHNn) addressed the board during four hours of public comment, with around 240 attendees filling the room and dozens more waiting in an overflow area. Many criticized the board for deliberating the possible division of the district behind closed doors. The district serves 34,000 students across Keller and parts of Fort Worth. Some parents are concerned that a split could benefit Keller residents while disadvantaging families in the Alliance area. Keller ISD parent Matthew Mucker, who has three children in the district, [filed a lawsuit](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOpDAQAL_GZD2yGwZMQHAJ2V564aix20NrzUN2z7L796e5_OKSSqr68_H4IMmyP3_TxpN-p-OBFu9gHTj_iCT559E1cVpsHF3DkxvawY2jv9tmnVzXUeuXwTukdljIsg93x9z1aRkc2kamt8w6551Db90N-9Sn1IZonb-TG01nOYoe5aYrK39TTfnn-OJyC8fW5GlVPatpfxmcDc7Xdd2uRPSGBmcqKiGzwXnnqxqcOb4CqRy7wXl97bFwrJDKq2oh5QgnFd61wknhEz45Zy4gNcJyUImwMavsT6BNIpyH8q5CGaJULRIU6plFDc7oB1jGkWPfWxh9j9BRCuC7ROAw0BIRuU2xKVM8L8lZaj-Yzj43kvyvS_87-mvCvwEAAP__hhqBSg) against school board members, alleging they violated the Texas Open Meetings Act by discussing the proposed district split in a closed-door session in December.
## More Million Dollar Homes Selling
The number of luxury homes sold in Texas jumped significantly last year. >From November 2023 to October 2024, the total [number of million-dollar homes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQRp_GdEae4ce4cHEbutx2SzSxh2DJYAROgLdfkX67rzg6-nR-HsODQgzL6z_NbPM5pgEVNlKBhG7wFOI11IW3T-UNFGxBVxqM6RpVTNY9yZnajC3UxK5yrJ3X2rSKsfFP1EWwt0wBdADYKSixHdtxrJxX0DUERtSKfchpK_PEmU_ax3ilD2-lS3MR7ZTzuovqn8BeYH8cRzlfOy205LSEdEMC-40p8p4ps8CethxcvNdXJ-P7fG-XnNLMcr85iQpriUphg6Yr12ktNuvXI8QY9laLWr1mCvF7IP9Z5GPxNwAA__9paWPC) sold rose 10% from the previous year. According to the [2024 Texas Sales of Million-Dollar Homes Report](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFutDAQhJ_GdKDdxYBduPilXyjNpUgipUQGr-8sGYzAOe7ePuL61PPNp9F8X4aLDTEs13c7s8kPnwYCakrAEtXgbIjPQRbOjOA0FmywqzvUWjVQ3IwkoE5Nox9rLRtgQEeoQbcNjoolFcGcMkBUiKQAK2p96309OUDVWNRCAruQ01blG2d-2N3HZ7rzVk1pLqK55bzuov4nqBfUH8dRvaCNbeQ928wndyZrOaUl85IF9T9rTNbtgnoCkl9n4RJiDGn5n2K021ua-fMUfPCatlzaanW-2IxbjxPb205IuM42xNeK_Octd0O_AQAA__-PDGYh), over $21 billion was spent on the more than 12,000 properties that sold for $1 million or more, second only to the same period from 2021-22. Nearly 90% of million-dollar home sales occurred in the Austin, Dallas, Houston, and San Antonio metro areas, with the most—38.7% of the state total—[taking place in the Dallas-Fort Worth region](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuupDAQRL_GZI3czcsOHGxCdjfdEDV-DJYMHmHvMPP3KybfqIKS6pTOn5_lh2OKx-M3797Ud8gLSRpAIqBaHMf0WfrGmVU6jY03OHUTaq0G2WzGjqMOsqNAdmIMnntckTpkGXpiKZto7jGJqBBJSWxpDGMInXUS1cCoRS-9izWfbd189W8uIX3yy5-tzXuTzFbrs4jul6BZ0HxdV3sF5rsUNPNZo01e0Lznw3_ujCnFfIDLKfEJW949FE6-QPl7PjzEA1y4gO2ZS4EvT9BMaoLVyVVZpWGw0wh9tyJo6wJ4GmxnvdZEoTmNe143ooyT6OVj55i-R-t_zb0M_QsAAP__7GNvAQ). The average price per square foot for million-dollar homes was $418.

Abilene ☀️ 48/28° | Amarillo ⛅ 31/20° | Austin ⛅ 61/39° | Brownsville ☁️ 79/51° | Corpus Christi 🌤️ 73/51° | DFW 🌤️ 56/31° | El Paso ☀️ 62/40° | Houston 🌤️ 64/45° | Laredo ⛅ 76/53° | Lubbock ⛅ 44/26° | Midland ☀️ 51/29° | San Antonio ⛅ 67/44° | Tyler 🌥️ 58/33° | Waco ☀️ 56/34° | State Employees Fired for SNAP Breach Seven state employees have been fired for accounts belonging to 61,104 Texans who receive Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefits. SNAP includes Medicaid, food stamps, and other public assistance programs. The employees allegedly accessed the accounts between June 2021 and December 2024 in what is believed to be the in the Texas Health and Human Services Commission’s history. Four of the employees were fired in December. In a separate case, another employee was fired earlier last year for illegally possessing information on 3,392 SNAP accounts. Two others were fired after $270,000 was stolen from around 500 food stamp accounts. The Texas Health and Human Services Office of Inspector General has referred those three individuals to the local district attorney’s office for prosecution. If you have a Lone Star Card, you can check for suspicious activity through or the Your Texas Benefits mobile app. School Board Meeting Gets Heated Dr. Tracy Johnson, superintendent of Keller ISD, Thursday amid discussions about potentially splitting the district in two. addressed the board during four hours of public comment, with around 240 attendees filling the room and dozens more waiting in an overflow area. Many criticized the board for deliberating the possible division of the district behind closed doors. The district serves 34,000 students across Keller and parts of Fort Worth. Some parents are concerned that a split could benefit Keller residents while disadvantaging families in the Alliance area. Keller ISD parent Matthew Mucker, who has three children in the district, against school board members, alleging they violated the Texas Open Meetings Act by discussing the proposed district split in a closed-door session in December. More Million Dollar Homes Selling The number of luxury homes sold in Texas jumped significantly last year. >From November 2023 to October 2024, the total sold rose 10% from the previous year. subject: TikTok Ban Upheld, NFL Playoff Weekend, and Trump's New Portrait
body:
The Supreme Court unanimously [upheld a law requiring TikTok to shut down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFzhCAQBeBfgx3OsqhoQZGG7tKmdBDWkxwnN7o5x3-fMX36_fa9eV-38eZTTuv90z_J8lxGBGwlKKn6MfqUz7Gpop2JkHRFVhltEACgrxbrjdFdN3TQRwPgCUNQGkIIeoJ2GPoq2esbKNUrpTW2NU2oYdI6xmZoTNOKBigmLlv9XdLKC835LG_a6lCeVbYL82sX-kOgE-iO46h_ds8l-vM6EOh2Ltsp0DGFRaC70gQ6UAKdMhdZaJVHyllyenB5yMmvkv2DJM0zBZaR2Ke8C3TGGNMYrQAuWG02vi6Y9s6IBu5Pn_JfK_5vpbfF3wAAAP__eJJllQ) by Sunday unless its Chinese parent company ByteDance sells the app to an American entity.

# Saturday, January 18, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1803, President Thomas Jefferson requested $2,500 from Congress to fund the [Lewis and Clark](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFv8yAQxvFPgzes48Bx3oHhXbyla0eLhCO-lEAKJK6_feWqa-e_9Oin5_00nxxHTtc3dyfbQp4RcJCgpDrO3nHcZtN5G4iQdEdWjXpEAIBjt1hlAgYFgw6jGQ0ikjNwuDgaHKkBdcd2XwOljkppjUNPZ9Rw1tp788-MZhAGyHPLpb9lTm2hELf8otJf8r2LdmntUYX-L3ASOK3r2i9cWy7b3gVObeEqvdskJ_lbBE43CoFKzUkW-nxSbVWGZ_KcrjLkIiOtXKVLXl6iKx-Svh67gXPqivWPlWPkehiFgevdcfyhtL-ueVn8DgAA__84Dmg7) expedition. A vast area of the land the expedition surveyed and explored eventually became part of the Louisiana Purchase. With an Arctic air cold blast on its way, this is a reminder that [freezing cold temperatures](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb8GtiB4D2IyMFSqvKVrR4vwcEyFDQrUVv6-aqYuXa-uzpHO53W6-pTTdv_wa3R9LhNIMCepTspO5FN-TpqTm2OEiDw6NeAAUkpp-eLmyzkYDDiHm6JISMFcjDUevLVaDZ4n90uTSlmlEMGIeAOUN0QifdGDNkzLSKmXh_gqaetLnPOz7PEhQll5dkvvtTF8YzAyGI_jEEcNYguxiq14L-5lZzBSauG7tVS2xmBcavgziLpUhq8Lw_e6UqvEH47qkXJO7TwwLe-rT_ll7P8V2B38BAAA__-_u17U) will sweep across much of the country into next week. If you're in its path, please stay safe and warm. We're sponsored this weekend by [Frontieras](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOozAQxvGnMV3Q2GMwFC5Oiuhy7ZXIwQPMyTbIOFnl7Vek2K1Sz0-f9J9_t_HmOHBa_rpItszbqEA1F5AX2Y3ecXiNuvJ2JlKEFVlp0CgAgK5abQuI0vfG93Ov5WSmHjp5b0k7J7uG5ortuQZSdlIiqqamu0K4I3qve210IzSQ57Ll-v_Gqaw0h9f2pFxPW6yCXUvZD4F_hBqEGjg96Sj1nLdUmLI7TnWecHiUOB7bI08k8Opj_jXBJc9p2d1CQrWni-T5EQVed5dLonysvMsOLtjg-O4Wqi3JRToEXoefoU96lAbbHkyvFFTZ-v2LQ-CjNULDEh2Hd0v59NunVd8BAAD__9aMerE), which is offering an investment opportunity in the energy sector.
