## Supreme Court Upholds TikTok Ban
The Supreme Court unanimously [upheld a law requiring TikTok to shut down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFzhCAQBeBfgx3OsqhoQZGG7tKmdBDWkxwnN7o5x3-fMX36_fa9eV-38eZTTuv90z_J8lxGBGwlKKn6MfqUz7Gpop2JkHRFVhltEACgrxbrjdFdN3TQRwPgCUNQGkIIeoJ2GPoq2esbKNUrpTW2NU2oYdI6xmZoTNOKBigmLlv9XdLKC835LG_a6lCeVbYL82sX-kOgE-iO46h_ds8l-vM6EOh2Ltsp0DGFRaC70gQ6UAKdMhdZaJVHyllyenB5yMmvkv2DJM0zBZaR2Ke8C3TGGNMYrQAuWG02vi6Y9s6IBu5Pn_JfK_5vpbfF3wAAAP__eJJllQ) by Sunday unless its Chinese parent company, ByteDance, sells the app to an American entity. While the Court sided with the government that the law addressing national security concerns doesn't violate First Amendment rights, President Joe Biden announced [he wouldn't enforce the ban](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAQQL_GbCD7bDAMHrqwpWtHdMZHco3BEbmC8vdVund-0nvS-7pMF-TM2_UTVwqylAk0tLU2temnhJxfk6tSWIiAbEXBeOtBa6376hawjzGh0R0us02ddwvYOQ1z9A5bQ77i8LZpY3pjrIW2oQhWR2tTcoPzrlVOU2Ipe_NdeJMbLflVDtqbuaxVDjeRx1PZDwWjgvE8z-aMmOV4YwUj7sJzJgWj8F3KvY641bL_rI86cqKtxrTyxk_ZUbhsCsbOOje4wVd7SI-Tc-Zn55XT1xU5_0XlvwlHgN8AAAD__9_6XwE), leaving the decision to incoming President Donald Trump. TikTok CEO Shou Chew [responded with a video thanking Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuwzAUQ7_G3q6hlyNn0NAlW7p2NPS4itXIkiHJMfL3hYuunUiQAEGcr_t81yGG9PjUK6rm88wIG4FQoNPsdIjvWfROeUSGvEdFJZeMEEKmflGOM0_11Qlp_MQ1xws6aUckRhvGve-DOtcIpROlnLNxQMM4MZw7J65CirETBF1ouQzfOaS2oI_v_MIy2Lz2US2tbbXjHx27dex2HMeQjE141LPv2K2hXf4Ezvj04dnyEyxmaItOzwqt7OsGr-Aww4q16gdC3beCK4LNe2mwb0uOroLRCYpNmk4TlZe-KLcdIcZQL7IT5LHqEH-Ptf9AvRT7CQAA__8KFG0o), who has generated 60 billion views on the platform. Meanwhile, "Shark Tank" investor Kevin O'Leary has [put forward a $20 billion cash offer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFyqzAQAL8GOjHihAwuVLyGzq9NyRzoMBcLxEhnE_L1GadPv7Ozsx-34YYceLv_x5WczHEADVbpWtXd4JHDOTSldzMRkCnJ1a1pQWutu3JxtrPYorUeLrZB6q528td2tp25wDiZtmT3tum67uraGLAVjWD0aIz3zbVpG1s0mjxLTNVn5E0WmsMZX5SqKa5lcIvIngvzr4C-gP44jmqOX-Mz80Y5v5kC-pU8YwH9g168qRgI06n2p2QFelTCD4kPNWFeVJxnSkpwDKTWmEXxJpQoC293NcV1DzyhkFdTwu9TZZYnCsetTM7vB4fA-dIWjb6vyOG3UP469nLwEwAA__9P53EC) to buy the app while warning that service providers could face fines exceeding $1 billion daily after Sunday. Trump remains noncommittal, saying he needs "time to review the situation.”
## Trump Inauguration Moved Indoors
President-elect Donald Trump's inauguration ceremony [will be moved indoors](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMZ2j9RoCKVz8DV3-9kpksgvek7Ej4wTl7U_J1Vd_mhlpvq7T1UuUtP73G7u65AkBOw1Gm2EiL_E1tQ25hRnZNuxMb3sEABia4Gj2A_F5BgCkmWi49GbheZk7Q9idu0bcuw2MGYyxFrsTz2hhtpaovbR926kWmKTmcvrOkmrgJb7yk8vplrcmulDrfVf2n8JR4VgDB4nxbQrHkDdOfOwKR0-bJNlr8VVyUjh2cDGDaXUtj-2uJfnH-vhFLYlyLru-5Uj6YF8DF334PUha6yfcFEf3Q2KU_dyrFtbNy2e0qX8d9HT4EwAA__9Q5Wof) to the Capitol Rotunda due to cold temperatures expected Monday in Washington, D.C., with highs in the low 20s and wind chills in the single digits. The temperatures make this the coldest inauguration since Reagan's 1985 ceremony, which was also forced indoors due to extreme weather. See a [chart of inauguration temperatures here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOqzAQAL_GdKD1rg2kcPEaurz2SmRnl2RPDo7ACcrfn3L91SPNaL7O8zlq1vX6P94l1KXMCOhbsK0dZ46a37NrOCwiKNRIsAMNCAAwNreAyacTnaQnz32iBJGdHezCLgl7GxsNHxtYO1pLhL6ThASJiNmd3OC8cSCstWzdd9G13mTJ7_KSrbuUe5PDrdbHbuifwcngdBxHd6SY6-uDDU5xq3rJYnC6lMyy11bX-Lw-t1i1rC3H925w6sn5Ecax2QI_Ds1Z934wDq73qPk3VP8afwX8CQAA___xoFoO). In a Truth Social post announcing the change, Trump cited safety concerns for law enforcement, first responders, and supporters, noting that traditional [outdoor events will be relocated](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kbuum0AQhp8GurH2AgEXFGnoTtqU1pydAcZadtHuYOS3j5zUqX_pv32_vx5fKFHS-gt3nnTJD2dcD8aCHR-EEt-PrqVpYXbsW57s4AdnjDFju013HmnxA3kXFnvvrOPB9f0yMFkzBupbmT5uxtrRWu9df-Nv582390TdvRu6vukMk2gut2eWpBsv8Z1fXG4h722cNtWjNv5n4-bGzdcz4kdo3Jz4qo2bYw4YGzcfhasQJwWOHBQoJ4wEWs79AEl4rmdBlZxgzy8mkEQ5lwqBC-85veGsEPAQzRFK1jMRwiVJucDFqBsXoAAX1k3SqjlBDRvTGZmgcsiJQGVnKP9iC-OKCZZcOGBVCDkSVwXl_aigBUk-XTBCZVVJKxT-LFGGAwsSt2Wi45IYpf4Yms6sO0r8e4n-D9Frcn8CAAD__wI7nRY) to Capital One Arena.
## Startup Freezes Patients Hoping for Later Revival
Tomorrow.Bio, Europe's first cryonics lab, is [offering to freeze patients after death](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uhDAQhJ8GukX-DVzhIg3dpU2JDF6OjYyNzHKIPH10Udp0I4008-n7vA93T5HS48Ov6HjOgxLKgpAguyF4itdg6uBmRIW6Ridb3SohhOjqxXVyVAqDNHa2prUYpG5t63G8zROKTtTkXmtCyk5KrZVtcFRajFqHYG6mNbYyAgNxLs1XpsQLzvHKTyzNlNc6uoV52yv9Xqm-Uv15ns04Tq-uUv188FGwUr0vTFN8pb8zC1O5cqJpB14QdvaF4diAF89w-sQ7cIa5IH4jXPkASrAf-4YpYACfaPVMOdXFhe2kGGl_aysjHqun-AvG_4l6OvUTAAD__3RQa6A) for $200,000 with the hope of reviving them in the future when medical technology advances sufficiently to cure their cause of death. [The Berlin-based startup](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uKyEQQOGngc6rYQb2p6C4zXa-bcoVGwbvRKyxMDLy20dJnwc4R_o-rts1SJb77X842bdUNgR0FzAXM28xSH5vVkefmJFJszcTTQgAMOvDR2SAkd24JGeXfdlnGoEmSs6GNLqgxf_cwJjZGCJ0A-9IsBPFaBc7WacscJRW6vBV5N4OTvldXlyHz3Lq7I_WHk9F_xSuCtfe-9DKWWotfdilKFx19fHRJWd5jpOycDuD5N-4_YV5efwOAAD__wYtSoQ) has already preserved "three or four" people and five pets, with nearly 700 more signed up, and plans to expand across the U.S. in 2025. However, critics call the concept "preposterous," noting that no one has ever been successfully revived after cryopreservation and that there's no proof complex human brains can be restored. Still, the company's co-founder Emil Kendziorra remains optimistic, comparing initial skepticism of cryonics to early doubts about organ transplantation. [Watch a webinar on how they do it](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQxvGnsbeg850dYPBQtY3UId2qjsjgI7gxcUQcLN6-onvX75N-0v_73J1diOF2-XQz2zymDgHNAdRBNZ13IW6dlt6OzMgk2aqaagQAaORk0fDY1tqBbk0_QNsqTW6kI2kEgz3KYHcNlGqUIkJTcY8EPZH3utW1NkID-5DTUv2kcMsTj3FLKy_VkGYZ7ZTz_SHoReBJ4KmUUm3pmZ897_--uDxMgk6roLf31-Kbr-sHhatcrL-XEGN4HGuh4TK7EP_I_F_iavE3AAD__2tJUQw).

name: Lara Trump
subject: Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids
body:
You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind

| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkU1u2zAQhU9D7WiQHJkSF1rIkZVF6qLQwl0SQ2qkENYfKCq5fuEmPUC3H2Ye8L33-2ZvGKawjD9xpurho427db11ET-ITxiRp3jMG_-0SqgzF5LL0kLWV73xGnVGlSygUEKLXGTvVW6k0IV0RL0ZCnBkQJABBHL6rITMQvXMEVKWUuYG4HQG7V05mKI3JLVAlgucKKbTg2jz6zJG2vdI2-Gm4HE5-XXOpuo9pW1nUDPVMtXu5I9IJ1yoX9Pzgqn2y8Ct62Nnqi2VKqkYNC9RDTw3peZoBs-Ncy5HUyoqBIP2SLPd1yN6YtBcmlfeXe9M6SeeqQ_HzKC53r6Jx3nDMC4Mmi8nAfbSvNpLV9-v9kfd1ba73u2vmr-9dN8_yTNo3l46_q-FLFb99hmmKey6YLkYZwzTX8n0H3N8VOpPAAAA___lTY2p)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkU1u2zAQhU9D7WiQHJkSF1rIkZVF6qLQwl0SQ2qkENYfKCq5fuEmPUC3H2Ye8L33-2ZvGKawjD9xpurho427db11ET-ITxiRp3jMG_-0SqgzF5LL0kLWV73xGnVGlSygUEKLXGTvVW6k0IV0RL0ZCnBkQJABBHL6rITMQvXMEVKWUuYG4HQG7V05mKI3JLVAlgucKKbTg2jz6zJG2vdI2-Gm4HE5-XXOpuo9pW1nUDPVMtXu5I9IJ1yoX9Pzgqn2y8Ct62Nnqi2VKqkYNC9RDTw3peZoBs-Ncy5HUyoqBIP2SLPd1yN6YtBcmlfeXe9M6SeeqQ_HzKC53r6Jx3nDMC4Mmi8nAfbSvNpLV9-v9kfd1ba73u2vmr-9dN8_yTNo3l46_q-FLFb99hmmKey6YLkYZwzTX8n0H3N8VOpPAAAA___lTY2p)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkU1u2zAQhU9D7WiQHJkSF1rIkZVF6qLQwl0SQ2qkENYfKCq5fuEmPUC3H2Ye8L33-2ZvGKawjD9xpurho427db11ET-ITxiRp3jMG_-0SqgzF5LL0kLWV73xGnVGlSygUEKLXGTvVW6k0IV0RL0ZCnBkQJABBHL6rITMQvXMEVKWUuYG4HQG7V05mKI3JLVAlgucKKbTg2jz6zJG2vdI2-Gm4HE5-XXOpuo9pW1nUDPVMtXu5I9IJ1yoX9Pzgqn2y8Ct62Nnqi2VKqkYNC9RDTw3peZoBs-Ncy5HUyoqBIP2SLPd1yN6YtBcmlfeXe9M6SeeqQ_HzKC53r6Jx3nDMC4Mmi8nAfbSvNpLV9-v9kfd1ba73u2vmr-9dN8_yTNo3l46_q-FLFb99hmmKey6YLkYZwzTX8n0H3N8VOpPAAAA___lTY2p)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkU1u2zAQhU9D7WiQHJkSF1rIkZVF6qLQwl0SQ2qkENYfKCq5fuEmPUC3H2Ye8L33-2ZvGKawjD9xpurho427db11ET-ITxiRp3jMG_-0SqgzF5LL0kLWV73xGnVGlSygUEKLXGTvVW6k0IV0RL0ZCnBkQJABBHL6rITMQvXMEVKWUuYG4HQG7V05mKI3JLVAlgucKKbTg2jz6zJG2vdI2-Gm4HE5-XXOpuo9pW1nUDPVMtXu5I9IJ1yoX9Pzgqn2y8Ct62Nnqi2VKqkYNC9RDTw3peZoBs-Ncy5HUyoqBIP2SLPd1yN6YtBcmlfeXe9M6SeeqQ_HzKC53r6Jx3nDMC4Mmi8nAfbSvNpLV9-v9kfd1ba73u2vmr-9dN8_yTNo3l46_q-FLFb99hmmKey6YLkYZwzTX8n0H3N8VOpPAAAA___lTY2p)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkU1u2zAQhU9D7WiQHJkSF1rIkZVF6qLQwl0SQ2qkENYfKCq5fuEmPUC3H2Ye8L33-2ZvGKawjD9xpurho427db11ET-ITxiRp3jMG_-0SqgzF5LL0kLWV73xGnVGlSygUEKLXGTvVW6k0IV0RL0ZCnBkQJABBHL6rITMQvXMEVKWUuYG4HQG7V05mKI3JLVAlgucKKbTg2jz6zJG2vdI2-Gm4HE5-XXOpuo9pW1nUDPVMtXu5I9IJ1yoX9Pzgqn2y8Ct62Nnqi2VKqkYNC9RDTw3peZoBs-Ncy5HUyoqBIP2SLPd1yN6YtBcmlfeXe9M6SeeqQ_HzKC53r6Jx3nDMC4Mmi8nAfbSvNpLV9-v9kfd1ba73u2vmr-9dN8_yTNo3l46_q-FLFb99hmmKey6YLkYZwzTX8n0H3N8VOpPAAAA___lTY2p)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkU1u2zAQhU9D7WiQHJkSF1rIkZVF6qLQwl0SQ2qkENYfKCq5fuEmPUC3H2Ye8L33-2ZvGKawjD9xpurho427db11ET-ITxiRp3jMG_-0SqgzF5LL0kLWV73xGnVGlSygUEKLXGTvVW6k0IV0RL0ZCnBkQJABBHL6rITMQvXMEVKWUuYG4HQG7V05mKI3JLVAlgucKKbTg2jz6zJG2vdI2-Gm4HE5-XXOpuo9pW1nUDPVMtXu5I9IJ1yoX9Pzgqn2y8Ct62Nnqi2VKqkYNC9RDTw3peZoBs-Ncy5HUyoqBIP2SLPd1yN6YtBcmlfeXe9M6SeeqQ_HzKC53r6Jx3nDMC4Mmi8nAfbSvNpLV9-v9kfd1ba73u2vmr-9dN8_yTNo3l46_q-FLFb99hmmKey6YLkYZwzTX8n0H3N8VOpPAAAA___lTY2p), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author
---

clean_body: You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind | | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology. | | | | Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. If you've heard of Brave Books , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on Fox News for countering the Left's horrible poison. Brave Books fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian Kirk Cameron (Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great Brave Books with conservative messages such as: The Test of Lionhood by Kevin Sorbo -- Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good. The Night the Snow Monster Attacked by General Michael Flynn -- Shows children what it takes to be a good leader. Happy No Snake Day byRiley Gaines -- Encourages children to stand up for the truth. Because You're My Family by Missy Robertson -- Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love. | | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several Brave Books. But my favorite is Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at Brave Books aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My Brave Book , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled The Never-Give-Up Pup and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In The Never-Give-Up Pup , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. Your gift helps Brave Books create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your, I'll send you a copy of The Never-Give-Up Pup as a special "Thank you" from me. Sharing the lessons of The Never-Give-Up Pup with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children, | | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author | | | Lara Trump Wife, Mother, and Author | | | P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left. Thank you! - Lara | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Keep Congress Republican PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:

Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EIZXebkLdoj8lv6djGrAIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpbi6GP0SvaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy84MjI4ZTdmNi04YTJmLTQ5ODYtYTlmYy05YmJiNGE5ODJlNzA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTAzX0JER19CUkFWRV9MQVJBX1JFVl9QQS1ST04mdXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI1MDExOFcDc3BjQgpnf96Vi2frjjadUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EIZXebkLdoj8lv6djGrAIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpbi6GP0SvaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy84MjI4ZTdmNi04YTJmLTQ5ODYtYTlmYy05YmJiNGE5ODJlNzA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTAzX0JER19CUkFWRV9MQVJBX1JFVl9QQS1ST04mdXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI1MDExOFcDc3BjQgpnf96Vi2frjjadUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. clean_body: You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind | | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology. | | | | ~~ Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, ~~ Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. ~~ I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. ~~ If you've heard of Brave Books , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on Fox News for countering the Left's horrible poison. Brave Books fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian Kirk Cameron (Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great Brave Books with conservative messages such as: The Test of Lionhood by Kevin Sorbo -- Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good. The Night the Snow Monster Attacked by General Michael Flynn -- Shows children what it takes to be a good leader. Happy No Snake Day byRiley Gaines -- Encourages children to stand up for the truth. Because You're My Family by Missy Robertson -- Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love. | | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several Brave Books. But my favorite is Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at Brave Books aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My Brave Book , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled The Never-Give-Up Pup and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In The Never-Give-Up Pup , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. ~~ Your gift helps Brave Books create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your~~, I'll send you a copy of The Never-Give-Up Pup as a special "Thank you" from me. Sharing the lessons of The Never-Give-Up Pup with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children, | | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author | ~~ | | ~~ Lara Trump Wife, Mother, and Author | | | P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left.~~ Thank you! - Lara ~~ | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

name: Josh (personal)
subject: The MOST Important Thing Democrats Can Do Right Now
body:
I’m a dad and public school teacher, and possibly the only thing standing between Trump and total MAGA control of our government.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016S8cx8myJMrdCMwMFpPLbyLBfrQc5FH19hMYfI5TThAKhUkXIZlEC_Y2hxqQQ6ChS7QvmierE_LPZv0jXALXuvWqN0t9JwUMcgyVUbGehGm6cATNfHdc2_NCfqtOMovwlfzFV17wd6KtQD7MOe62qL5Z174pUXz4Uol845bb83NsI1kf0qjlbU9FttKn0cGCYvqvGODqZ4I41-Waoj9kRQXVxwu75oMn&c=QJnU7R6bbacaFLGOqLB7KAXOpS1XkIWEc3QL9PbdAa4_TzKAHCR4Rg==&ch=H2Wc0s2dDl6IMWr0qM6gWE_5F1XLDb7CeG0B-_rgBT_jQKN1r5lbYA==)
---
| | | | Team,
I've only got a few minutes before I head back out on the campaign trail, but my team asked me to quickly write a message to my most devoted supporters, so here it goes:
I know how exhausting the past few years have been.
We've watched as MAGA extremists dismantled norms, spread lies about our elections, and used their power to roll back decades of progress. After the November defeat, many of us felt hopeless--like no matter how hard we fight, our democracy keeps slipping further out of reach.
I feel it too. But here's the truth: the most important thing we can do right now is dust ourselves off, and figure out a path forward.
I'm Josh Weil, a public school teacher and Democrat running in the special election for Florida's 6th Congressional District. This race is the first major election of 2025--and our best chance to stop Trump's momentum before it begins.
If we win here, we don't just flip a seat. We deliver a crushing blow to Trump's MAGA movement, halt their dangerous agenda in Congress, and show the nation that Democrats are ready to fight for a better future.
This is our moment to turn things around.
But we have to move fast. With less than 75 days left until Election Day, every donation, every volunteer, and every conversation counts.
---
| | | | [Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50 or whatever you can to help us flip this seat and send a powerful message to Trump and his allies?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016S8cx8myJMrdCMwMFpPLbyLBfrQc5FH19hMYfI5TThAKhUkXIZlEC_Y2hxqQQ6ChfPEbE4Ad5RN79pg7T5HlrDGPHNqrUzFwH83OXNzKOgZp5CEeR26QIXVGw_r5236LllhQKa-QuOP5-TQalKh8Yf5vXQPD3-Bc8BAT266sb2_aK7AV6W7L2XsHnB3JxeVoqeyd2o8w3AwN3EhfIRVp3JwlkCDU-eTM2wsNtWpb-8w=&c=QJnU7R6bbacaFLGOqLB7KAXOpS1XkIWEc3QL9PbdAa4_TzKAHCR4Rg==&ch=H2Wc0s2dDl6IMWr0qM6gWE_5F1XLDb7CeG0B-_rgBT_jQKN1r5lbYA==)
---
| | | | | [Donate now >>](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016S8cx8myJMrdCMwMFpPLbyLBfrQc5FH19hMYfI5TThAKhUkXIZlEC_Y2hxqQQ6ChJ1Z9S7hCr0rFLl5mNMiuD2I8t4SlOlbO3TbZUktSOfKRuCRvHdodb79vgVJMbRSI3TnGcb0FGUca53B_To_AhI3YGbdKSkgBl6_WFvpNNlt1iwSMRZ4-IlmRhcG8BWm3UgCPBEYrzWa-v-SHDh_VpgYnoBMkL4PL&c=QJnU7R6bbacaFLGOqLB7KAXOpS1XkIWEc3QL9PbdAa4_TzKAHCR4Rg==&ch=H2Wc0s2dDl6IMWr0qM6gWE_5F1XLDb7CeG0B-_rgBT_jQKN1r5lbYA==)
---
| | | | [Or multiply your impact with a monthly recurring donation!](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016S8cx8myJMrdCMwMFpPLbyLBfrQc5FH19hMYfI5TThAKhUkXIZlEC_Y2hxqQQ6ChHLAP7oQpmum8WTR14wF5Mw-pQtWoBiTZmiod7hMU-_GkXEO7jYIrdqC7uEmowIhJOyvEtWmM8Dlhbor2FdHJG2Afp7t3-rz3MWN6rBYJSKO1KLlu4RJvlPys6Oyk00IGRiaVwZxx443JLrXNbilHwU1TXyRpoIV-exPd112OBgC03MCJVSNNCQ==&c=QJnU7R6bbacaFLGOqLB7KAXOpS1XkIWEc3QL9PbdAa4_TzKAHCR4Rg==&ch=H2Wc0s2dDl6IMWr0qM6gWE_5F1XLDb7CeG0B-_rgBT_jQKN1r5lbYA==)
---
| | | | I won't sugarcoat it - this race won't be a walk in the park. But if we come together, we can show the world that the fight for democracy is far from over.
Special elections are decided by the committed, by those who are willing to stand up and make their voices heard.
Thank you for lending your voice to my campaign, it means the world to me - and my whole team.
Okay, I better get back out on the campaign trail - these doors won't knock themselves!
💙 Josh
---
| | | | | [Let's win this special election >>](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016S8cx8myJMrdCMwMFpPLbyLBfrQc5FH19hMYfI5TThAKhUkXIZlEC_Y2hxqQQ6ChrBwz6ajcQAjxaL907l9JU74Zsak6IavCGnw8phZjKWtP4pJMD8eVuQ0WZwabm5b5bvi_gUmErJL5L0q5YOdu8ZbuhySumtaAfCwG1wQRNNmUSvtTSGHkGsp89uM7fASymu5F9koEEXfEObxzdn3kDvFldUD6efbP&c=QJnU7R6bbacaFLGOqLB7KAXOpS1XkIWEc3QL9PbdAa4_TzKAHCR4Rg==&ch=H2Wc0s2dDl6IMWr0qM6gWE_5F1XLDb7CeG0B-_rgBT_jQKN1r5lbYA==)

body:
We've come so far and this was the most important election in American history.

| |

name: History Facts
subject: The surprising inspiration for “A Spoonful of Sugar”
body:
When inspiration strikes, you have to just go with it — no matter how unexpected the circumstances. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cg8s5k7kb6gmi0486webotjv9sqvhyf6dkx50ethdpanmeve0xpavkwo9ubd7mwazji5n3srr4flfd7oktzuykrbdv8pubz569i5wfm2fgjp960vmwps6to6h7dm97nchsmylaliwxspifl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqa9jl&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Mary Poppins’ “A Spoonful of Sugar” was inspired by the polio vaccine.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqa9jl&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqa9jl&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqa9jl&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W hen inspiration strikes, you have to just go with it — no matter how unexpected the circumstances. Few knew that better than Robert B. Sherman, who, along with his brother Richard, made up one of the best-known songwriting duos in Hollywood history. In addition to _The Jungle Book_ , _The Sword in the Stone_ , and other Disney classics, they collaborated on 1964’s _Mary Poppins_ — including the song “A Spoonful of Sugar,” which was [inspired by the polio vaccine](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqa9jl&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). This was recounted by Robert’s son Jeffrey, who in late 2020 [shared his story](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqa9jl&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of receiving the vaccine as a child. When asked whether it hurt, Jeffrey told his father, “They put it on a sugar cube and you just ate it. He stared at me, then went to the phone and called my uncle Dick.”
---
Robert recalled the incident similarly: “I realized at the moment that I had the spark of a winning song,” he wrote in his autobiography _Moose: Chapters From My Life_. “I couldn’t sleep all night. The lyric mulled around in my mind. The next day, at work, I showed up half an hour earlier than usual so that I could pop the idea on my brother.” Created by virologist Jonas Salk, the polio vaccine (originally administered as a shot) was released in 1955, after which Salk was hailed as a miracle worker and refused to patent it. An oral vaccine, the type Jeffrey Sherman received, was developed later by biomedical scientist Albert Sabin. Within 25 years, the polio vaccine eliminated transmission of the disease in the United States.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqa9jl&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqa9jl&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Julie Andrews wasn’t the first choice to play Mary Poppins.
Despite giving one of the best-known performances in film history, Julie Andrews [wasn’t who the studio had in mind](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqa9jl&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) as the iconic musical’s title character. Both Walt Disney and _Mary Poppins_ author P.L. Travers had Bette Davis as their top choice — understandable, given that the two-time Oscar winner (and the first actor to receive a total of 10 nominations) was essentially Hollywood royalty. Angela Lansbury was considered as well. That changed when Robert B. Sherman, who co-wrote the movie’s songs, saw Andrews on TV one night in 1962. “Before she finished her first song, I knew that Julie was the one,” he recalled later. “My brother, Dick, agreed. The next day, we learned that Walt and half the studio had the same idea we did.” Andrews went on to win an Academy Award of her own for the role.

clean_body: When inspiration strikes, you have to just go with it — no matter how unexpected the circumstances. | W hen inspiration strikes, you have to just go with it — no matter how unexpected the circumstances. Few knew that better than Robert B. Sherman, who, along with his brother Richard, made up one of the best-known songwriting duos in Hollywood history. In addition to The Jungle Book , The Sword in the Stone , and other Disney classics, they collaborated on 1964’s Mary Poppins — including the song “A Spoonful of Sugar,” which was . This was recounted by Robert’s son Jeffrey, who in late 2020 of receiving the vaccine as a child. When asked whether it hurt, Jeffrey told his father, “They put it on a sugar cube and you just ate it. He stared at me, then went to the phone and called my uncle Dick.” Robert recalled the incident similarly: “I realized at the moment that I had the spark of a winning song,” he wrote in his autobiography Moose: Chapters From My Life. “I couldn’t sleep all night. The lyric mulled around in my mind. The next day, at work, I showed up half an hour earlier than usual so that I could pop the idea on my brother.” Created by virologist Jonas Salk, the polio vaccine (originally administered as a shot) was released in 1955, after which Salk was hailed as a miracle worker and refused to patent it. An oral vaccine, the type Jeffrey Sherman received, was developed later by biomedical scientist Albert Sabin. Within 25 years, the polio vaccine eliminated transmission of the disease in the United States. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Countries where polio was endemic in 1988 125 | | Countries where polio was endemic in 2023 2 | Countries where polio was endemic in 2023 2 | | Oscar nominations received by Mary Poppins , the most of any Disney movie 13 | | Box-office gross of Mary Poppins $103 million | Box-office gross of Mary Poppins $103 million | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Julie Andrews wasn’t the first choice to play Mary Poppins. Despite giving one of the best-known performances in film history, Julie Andrews as the iconic musical’s title character. Both Walt Disney and Mary Poppins author P.L. Travers had Bette Davis as their top choice — understandable, given that the two-time Oscar winner (and the first actor to receive a total of 10 nominations) was essentially Hollywood royalty. Angela Lansbury was considered as well. That changed when Robert B. Sherman, who co-wrote the movie’s songs, saw Andrews on TV one night in 1962. “Before she finished her first song, I knew that Julie was the one,” he recalled later. “My brother, Dick, agreed. The next day, we learned that Walt and half the studio had the same idea we did.” Andrews went on to win an Academy Award of her own for the role. name: Scalise, Steve
subject: Please read this Special Election message BEFORE early voting ends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Early voting JUST BEGAN for his primary and I was proud to endorse him for this can’t-lose seat.

| |
---
| | | Hey - I'll make this email short and sweet.

MAGA Patriot Jimmy Patronis is running in FL-01's Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat. **Early voting JUST BEGAN for his primary and I was proud to endorse him for this can 't-lose seat.**

This is our first real test since Republicans won the House, Senate, and White House so it'll take every single one of us to keep that momentum going.

That's why I'm following up. _I 'm humbly asking you one last time to read Jimmy's message BEFORE early voting ends:_
| | [*** CLICK THIS SPECIAL ELECTION MESSAGE ***](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyU0T9r3jAQBvBPI28yOv2z3sFDIBg6pAQ6dBR6JcXvFUsWkuyk3764kKlLMx-_e-7hfr7YF4cb5vW7S3HG1mxttp-2ebfRGl2g_YHNcsYVZUDBWBjCrDiYNzPEGSYxcXYDxobHfGdeMvBGT-ZtUjEyJ6W8MabV_Q46yAHnaw8DMMClUXwEo4zQXvmJG--0IJIdJbgeR8wNQ2x-30vZN-zo27jXddjmR--lEfFE-EL40qI_ahzfMdcYRr8nwpceXaJXAWyR8OUXpvSbFtfrnrHRckGx1AtWzCsRz70ekXB99GS9S8Xhmol4_rzVvj7Rbz9eYQQQWkjbQd3UpAWFSWnCdfywHcMXwN-cPfeY-xV-UmyNfmLC9ceRz38HQ51Decdtw6YnItmaHG5X46H_59_Omf8JAAD__10MloY "*** CLICK THIS SPECIAL ELECTION MESSAGE ***")

- Steve Scalise

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I’m not easily scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
But there’s one thing that keeps me up at night

| | | | [](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkMFu6yAURL8G77DgwoN4weJJlXfpoorUJcJwkyBhgwAnyt9XbtUP6H7m6Mx8nu3ZxRS327tb0fTabW02FRvy5lKg6FpML9q8q2iBwT_KOOUnK4ZgpIYg1ICGa6GBTUqw4W7CiSvvldYBJTrASaJ3k5NBsGnRQQ7RHBzG-YmDnABGvAauQCsvJTB19UQyl7D2NvY7Viz7kqJ3W0e3jj6vQzL33ksj4j-BmcDc0O8Vx2fcKoYjQWBeXjVvPxsagTnkjZbaCsXVxUSXmOkDaMnlIIh576vtnoi3y8cF6K_eUE0oz5hSbEoTyW5H99ug_-Woh4GvAAAA__89LnI5)
---
[](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkMFu6yAURL8G77DgwoN4weJJlXfpoorUJcJwkyBhgwAnyt9XbtUP6H7m6Mx8nu3ZxRS327tb0fTabW02FRvy5lKg6FpML9q8q2iBwT_KOOUnK4ZgpIYg1ICGa6GBTUqw4W7CiSvvldYBJTrASaJ3k5NBsGnRQQ7RHBzG-YmDnABGvAauQCsvJTB19UQyl7D2NvY7Viz7kqJ3W0e3jj6vQzL33ksj4j-BmcDc0O8Vx2fcKoYjQWBeXjVvPxsagTnkjZbaCsXVxUSXmOkDaMnlIIh576vtnoi3y8cF6K_eUE0oz5hSbEoTyW5H99ug_-Woh4GvAAAA__89LnI5)
|
---
This is President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House, Byron Donalds.
I grew up in Brooklyn, New York, raised by a single mother who sacrificed everything for me and my siblings.
I’ve had _**thick skin**_ from a young age - so if it’s a radical-left news anchor trying to gaslight me for being an unapologetic Black MAGA Patriot, or House Democrats going low with pathetic slurs, I’ll never take my foot off the gas until the fight is won.
I take that to heart even today as I continue the fight for the MAGA Movement, _**and I do it ALL for you**_.
Look, I’m not easily frightened, **but Democrats retaking the House Majority keeps me up at night.**
They’ve already begun building a war chest to sweep-up vulnerable Seats that they lost by a fraction of a percent, and MAGA Congressmembers are the **FIRST** on their target list.
They know if we lose our Majority - President Trump’s America First Agenda WILL come to a screeching halt.
I’m fighting for the _MAGA House Majority_ every single day, but the only way I can continue my efforts is through the support of folks just like you.
With the attacks from the radical-left, Fake News, and Democrats ratcheting up, I’ve never needed your support more.
_**[So I’m humbly asking, can you chip in today to help me keep Congress Red?](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkMFu6yAURL8G77DgwoN4weJJlXfpoorUJcJwkyBhgwAnyt9XbtUP6H7m6Mx8nu3ZxRS327tb0fTabW02FRvy5lKg6FpML9q8q2iBwT_KOOUnK4ZgpIYg1ICGa6GBTUqw4W7CiSvvldYBJTrASaJ3k5NBsGnRQQ7RHBzG-YmDnABGvAauQCsvJTB19UQyl7D2NvY7Viz7kqJ3W0e3jj6vQzL33ksj4j-BmcDc0O8Vx2fcKoYjQWBeXjVvPxsagTnkjZbaCsXVxUSXmOkDaMnlIIh576vtnoi3y8cF6K_eUE0oz5hSbEoTyW5H99ug_-Woh4GvAAAA__89LnI5)**_ _****__****_

clean_body: But there’s one thing that keeps me up at night | | | | | This is President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House, Byron Donalds. I grew up in Brooklyn, New York, raised by a single mother who sacrificed everything for me and my siblings. I’ve had thick skin from a young age - so if it’s a radical-left news anchor trying to gaslight me for being an unapologetic Black MAGA Patriot, or House Democrats going low with pathetic slurs, I’ll never take my foot off the gas until the fight is won. I take that to heart even today as I continue the fight for the MAGA Movement, and I do it ALL for you. Look, I’m not easily frightened, but Democrats retaking the House Majority keeps me up at night. They’ve already begun building a war chest to sweep-up vulnerable Seats that they lost by a fraction of a percent, and MAGA Congressmembers are the FIRST on their target list. They know if we lose our Majority - President Trump’s America First Agenda WILL come to a screeching halt. I’m fighting for the MAGA House Majority every single day, but the only way I can continue my efforts is through the support of folks just like you. With the attacks from the radical-left, Fake News, and Democrats ratcheting up, I’ve never needed your support more. ** | | Thank you and God Bless, Byron Donalds ** | | | | | | Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress 138 Conant Street Beverly, MA 01985 The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: The Case for School Choice
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/greatchanges-11573718?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **What does it cost to send a child to public school in Hinds County every year? $5,000 per year? Or maybe $10,000? $15,000?**

Actually, according to data from the Mississippi Department of Education, when you divide the number of students attending school by the total expenditure, in 2023-24 Hinds County spent $16,589 per student.

**That is more than twice the average private school fees in our state.** Indeed, $16,589 is not far off what it would cost to send your child to one of the state’s top private schools.

**Now ask yourself if each child in Hinds County is getting a top education for that $16,589? Of course not.** A large chunk of the kids can’t read or do basic math. One in three of them regularly skip school.

**Why not give families in Hinds County the right to take a portion of that $16,589 and allocate it to a school of their choice?**

It’s not just Hinds County. The same kind of questions could be asked in Madison ($17,037 spent for every public school pupil per year) or Rankin ($15,198 per pupil per year), or from Canton ($18,683) or De Soto ($13,820).

Even if you take the Department of Education’s own more conservative figure for per pupil spending (which includes all the ‘no-show’ students), Mississippi still spends an average of $14,676 per student.

**Despite all that money, 4 in 10****fourth graders in Mississippi public schools cannot read properly.** Eight in 10 eighth grade kids in Mississippi were not proficient in math in 2022. One in 4 kids routinely skips school.

**Nor has $14,676 per student spending translated into better teacher pay.** Notwithstanding recent pay increases, our teachers still earn significantly less than they did in 2010, when you adjust for inflation.

**If you happen to be one of the fortunate families happy with the public education options available, great. No need to change and no one is proposing any changes that will affect you.** But why not allow those families unhappy with the way things are the ability to take their tax dollars to a school that best meets their needs?

**Suggesting this provokes outrage not from parents, but from various vested interests who like things the way they are.** They like a system that puts the $14,676 they get for your child into their administration budget, rather than the classroom.

We should not be surprised that many school superintendents support a system that means they make more than the Governor. That does not make their arguments against School Choice right.

**School Choice will not impoverish public schools.** The legislation that Speaker Jason White is proposing would allow families control over the state portion of funding, not locally raised revenues or federal dollars.

In Hinds County, for example, that would mean families being able to allocate no more than $6,700 of the $16,589 overall per pupil funding. (Rather than depleting Hinds County public schools’ budget, actually it would make Hinds County better off in terms of per pupil spend.)

**Giving families control over $6,700 of the state funds will not mean a flood of kids coming into your well-run school district.** Why not? Because the legislation proposed specifically gives school boards the final say on capacity and allows individual schools strong safeguards enabling them to say “no” to would be transferees with disciplinary issues.

What anti School Choice campaigners really fear is not the “wrong” kids coming to your school. **What they fear is that you****start wondering what the heck they’ve been doing with the $14,676 they get for your child or grandchild every year. **

All of the arguments we are now hearing against School Choice in Mississippi have been heard in each of the surrounding states that have since adopted School Choice.

**Alabama’s new Educations Savings Account program, which has just opened for applications, has been wildly oversubscribed.** The program provides $7,000 funding per student attending a participating private school, while those enrolled in home education programs are eligible for $2,000 per student.

**Arkansas allows all K-12 students access to an Education Savings Account from 2025, into which the state government pays the state portion of per pupil funding ($6,600 per year).** Families will be able to use this $6,600 money they are given to pay for their child education, including private school tuition. Arkansas also allows public to public school transfers, allowing districts to define capacity.

Louisiana’s GATOR program starts in 2025-26 and establishes an Education Savings Account for those on low incomes, with the details are still being finalized as the law only recently passed. **Louisiana already has public to public School Choice.**

Texas and Tennessee, too, are at this very moment debating legislation that would create a universal Education Savings Account for families in those states, too.

**None of the scare stories we now hear in Mississippi materialized in any of these neighboring states.** Instead, early evidence suggests School Choice has started to improve education outcomes.

**__Three cheers for Speaker Jason White and those bold conservative leaders in the legislature pushing for School Choice in our state!__**
---

---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell

name: Summer Lee
subject: Justice Democrats recruited me in 2021
body:
Justice Democrats needs your help to recruit the next generation of progressive leaders and transform the Democratic Party.
#
Hey Peter, this is Summer Lee.
Justice Democrats and the progressive movement helped me defeat Republican billionaires and win my primary last spring, just like in 2022 when we took down AIPAC... twice.
But AIPAC and their corporate Super PAC allies dropped over $25 million _— more money than ever before —_ in my friends Jamaal Bowman’s and Cori Bush’s primaries last year, unfortunately succeeding at ousting them from Congress.
**Our Squad may be two members smaller right now, but we can and will change that with your help.[Justice Democrats is recruiting working-class progressives to run for Congress — will you pitch in $5 or more toward their 2026 Candidate Recruitment Fund?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250118-1?refcode=em20250118-36337&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36337_1203867_tjIF5p&akid=36337%2E1203867%2EtjIF5p)**
AIPAC and its dark money super PAC funneled money from right-wing billionaires and corporate interests into these Democratic primaries in order to hurt our progressive movement — but it’s not just the Squad that’s under threat:_it’s our entire Party and democracy as we know it._
Working families and everyday people are constantly getting squeezed by the same greedy corporations and billionaires that the Democratic establishment has aligned themselves with and taken campaign contributions from.
It’s simple: If we’re going to win more elections and pass the bold, life-changing legislation that prioritizes people over profits, **the Democratic Party needs more working-class representation in the halls of Congress.**
I’m in the position I am today after Justice Democrats reached out to me in 2021 and said folks in the community nominated me to run for Congress. These people were grassroots organizers, union members, and everyday people working to create a more just world. They also made up the progressive coalition that helped me win my first race for Pennsylvania state representative and every race since.
I grew up working-class in the Mon Valley and saw generations of politicians ignore the working poor to serve wealthy elites. But every election I have run in since 2018 proves:**organized people can beat organized money.**
And when we win, we can deliver real results for our communities. In my first term in Congress, I was able to secure over $2 billion in investments in green energy jobs, housing, clean air & water, and lower costs for Western Pennsylvania.
Every community in this country deserves that sort of investment and a leader who will fight for it. That’s why we need more working-class champions alongside me and the rest of the Squad in Congress to take on corporate interests, challenge the Democratic Party’s status quo, and fight to bring tangible change people can feel in our communities.
**[Justice Democrats needs to raise $100,000 by February 1 to hire a new staff member and build the resources needed to find and support as many working-class congressional candidates as possible. Rush a contribution of any amount now to help them get it done!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250118-1?refcode=em20250118-36337&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36337_1203867_tjIF5p&akid=36337%2E1203867%2EtjIF5p)**
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250118-1?refcode=em20250118-36337&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36337_1203867_tjIF5p&akid=36337%2E1203867%2EtjIF5p)**
Thanks for powering our movement,
Summer Lee
PS —**[If you know of any local leaders in your community who you think should run, nominate them here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/38356?t=2&akid=36337%2E1203867%2EtjIF5p)** That’s how I met Justice Democrats and together, we helped build the grassroots movement to take on AIPAC and win in 2022!

clean_body: Justice Democrats needs your help to recruit the next generation of progressive leaders and transform the Democratic Party. Hey Peter, this is Summer Lee. Justice Democrats and the progressive movement helped me defeat Republican billionaires and win my primary last spring, just like in 2022 when we took down AIPAC... twice. But AIPAC and their corporate Super PAC allies dropped over $25 million — more money than ever before — in my friends Jamaal Bowman’s and Cori Bush’s primaries last year, unfortunately succeeding at ousting them from Congress. Our Squad may be two members smaller right now, but we can and will change that with your help. AIPAC and its dark money super PAC funneled money from right-wing billionaires and corporate interests into these Democratic primaries in order to hurt our progressive movement — but it’s not just the Squad that’s under threat:it’s our entire Party and democracy as we know it. Working families and everyday people are constantly getting squeezed by the same greedy corporations and billionaires that the Democratic establishment has aligned themselves with and taken campaign contributions from. It’s simple: If we’re going to win more elections and pass the bold, life-changing legislation that prioritizes people over profits, the Democratic Party needs more working-class representation in the halls of Congress. I’m in the position I am today after Justice Democrats reached out to me in 2021 and said folks in the community nominated me to run for Congress. These people were grassroots organizers, union members, and everyday people working to create a more just world. They also made up the progressive coalition that helped me win my first race for Pennsylvania state representative and every race since. I grew up working-class in the Mon Valley and saw generations of politicians ignore the working poor to serve wealthy elites. But every election I have run in since 2018 proves:organized people can beat organized money. And when we win, we can deliver real results for our communities. In my first term in Congress, I was able to secure over $2 billion in investments in green energy jobs, housing, clean air & water, and lower costs for Western Pennsylvania. Every community in this country deserves that sort of investment and a leader who will fight for it. That’s why we need more working-class champions alongside me and the rest of the Squad in Congress to take on corporate interests, challenge the Democratic Party’s status quo, and fight to bring tangible change people can feel in our communities. Thanks for powering our movement, Summer Lee PS — That’s how I met Justice Democrats and together, we helped build the grassroots movement to take on AIPAC and win in 2022! name: Michael Henry
subject: As New York’s next AG, I have a plan to stop the witch hunts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY
body:
As New York’s next AG, I have a plan to stop the witch hunts.
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b4693fdadc3f4beeb664dfbb299524c1&_e=fMqOxTLywLxJy2M2f0195S4NF9SqnbnajxKXcYXKwCm8AUVgaAzGG_zVqTQyWYp_jl_GjpRT8zt0ifOl_O7JFhXIKIlw77qIDVKYp3sG-V7fQoYh6sxo2VlY2y0HCzUrDaPZoRpkqGOhqd_8x4FHPFx6Fp6iLkv_sg01JX_gwx2yaQHkPeKdkNdeysZCdXC9lweumPeYHsvCBAA8wwQdkJf267mv2taHdwBd5q2ZAsrRAqcDQtqam8Qg_Dr0ONJpgcoWMhEt28vx7ZQi8iR4H9ZCPInydYpA-ZFDq16P_0Z8-ijzEKFHxggjBVDlvsKvg2xKgE8deeblI1Yle6OQTR4Fyrc9PqzRZZJmxSuIfE5KVzRvkJbrvhqPa6B8ZBiU)
---
Friend,
---
The upcoming inauguration of President Trump _should_ mark the beginning of a new chapter in American history.
---
**But sadly, when President Trump takes office, he’s immediately facing a $486 MILLION witch hunt led by my opponent, corrupt New York Attorney General Tish James.**
---
She’s announced that she’ll continue to pursue this wrongfully imposed fine even after President Trump takes office.
---
The worst part? The unconstitutional judgment against him is written in such a way that he has to pay interest on that massive sum...
---
**_...meaning he’s effectively being fined $112,000 _PER_ _DAY_ as President!_**
---
This kind of LAWFARE poses a grave threat to our free Republic, Friend.
---
_The Left couldn’t defeat President Trump at the ballot box, so corrupt radicals like Tish James are trying to stall his agenda by bleeding him dry._
---
She cares more about destroying her political enemies than going after the real criminals that are ravaging our state.
---
**That’s why I’m running to FIRE Tish James and end the politicization of the Office of Attorney General.**
---
_But our country cannot wait until 2026 to stop this $486 MILLION (and counting) scam_ ...
---

## Andrew Tate Is Not the Answer to Feminism
In a culture dominated by feminism, young men are starved for icons of masculinity. Young men crave heroes to imitate, but a neutered, castrated, effeminate society produces precious few, if any—and many of the heroes of history are hidden away and forgotten. Ever prescient, the author C.S. The Israeli government officially approved a ceasefire agreement with Hamas on Friday, putting a temporary pause on the 15-month conflict starting Sunday. Israeli forces are now set to withdraw from the Gaza Strip as both sides exchange hostages over the six-week period starting Sunday, according to multiple sources. Politicians are often compared to snakes, and there’s good reason: many are slithery, slimy, and will sink their teeth into your neck if given the chance. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
subject: The Fifth Circuit ruled against DACA— here’s how we’re fighting back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United We Dream Action; UnitedWeDreamAction
body:
This fight isn’t over. | | | We wanted to make sure you saw this, Peter: Yesterday, the Fifth Circuit Court ruled against DACA — but is still allowing renewals to be processed. DACA’s future is still in limbo, the only thing we know for certain is we’ll need to fight like hell to keep DACA protections in place. These attacks on DACA continue to be led by anti-immigrant courts and far-right elected officials hell-bent on destabilizing our communities and keeping us from thriving. **DACA was never more than a temporary solution,****Peter****. Now with only days before Trump is set to take office, promising the largest deportation effort in this county’s history, this only strengthens the urgency around our demands for permanent protections.** More than ever before, now we need Congress to step up and protect immigrants. **[Donate now to help UWDA prepare for the DACA fight ahead and win permanent protections for DACA recipients and all 11 million undocumented people.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr5dag1EP6sfSVmMPkcU_VYtohP8cbpEAMrVDbQ1O-p6-kE3ttdUBrzH3hJAoGFgQsykc19B1SCeuF1uAs-axMyTkkzO4gpxALTwmVA-XwZfaZ_Pa98VqOmQi0TfaY42QbV9sczmnQbSCgcjyAc7JLCvH0cgNDI6GKOX01VDcn_4uerdsCTpEXbHp9kEnOqi-Wuyy4NoP6GNECMApI2ucxBWTUN3Ng5IEL70DKzyVjsLrReNNALynrCQMfdD4aY6JapSsS7yGFeXioR2tGeJNpFJ8FeQi6M7QBQlyWVJJyQtrsjqAirthUgr7J3AfjlvdkUGFTfNwVODl56zYBy5nytJjUSagzQInzAU52A6kmBD1qpIjDB0XQcgfOGtxmbMuWY_EX4Z4jgJUruryPc7ADUw/4d9/e6uNBQgtSA6m5ahMFFZ0UQ/h0/h001.0lHaf_EJAIgnc8l3XSLTxT2BzpSxAE0iCaPG8SDA8xs)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr5dag1EP6sfSVmMPkcU_VYtohP8cbpEAMrVDbQ1O-p6-kE3ttdUBrzH3hJAoGFgQsUw01YoyJAaT39MurMgr64STrIhnng7LJiYDSV5GnC7769FfGqmoB4kSJigs_NEQdfTuJPl4l7J8uV5DfxFqxc_HzCw3QsK89IdUNOJJxRwJhifZoWBQzNNg2vyjmcWbkhSmkLDRFF3w474a552u5YGirLbmwMdWux0Tayssww-Q8jB54AzpGwGRdDQNgf4eysmbnncHomvWU5tGcLiwQTnMPN3bk1Gqw545JXEGI84CcJCrzHlTwQ-x06EtxjFH0R0lNlz-UBBPnLv7g3JsvtCC1CHrjhA9vq8ia_DvDjq4d_UDAcLyHeziRSkHsftjTweiItcKN8_AziZ6gW9ZmeaGT0-mibhXa-XN5_xyKBhz3mRczpd2M4zX-qj0XENNt/4d9/e6uNBQgtSA6m5ahMFFZ0UQ/h1/h001.j2nFH0Inn_nAT5s88WKgbI6WNq5rnKBUpSzQReZqh3Y)

They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days._
Let’s be clear: **DACA being shut down would be catastrophic.** Hundreds of thousands could lose their jobs and protections against deportation.
But with millions of others ineligible to even apply for DACA, our fight has always been for more expansive permanent protections.
This latest attack on DACA should serve as a reminder of the urgency around our demands for a pathway to citizenship: **we must be ready to take a bold, public stance to unapologetically declare immigrants are here to stay!**
Years of Congressional inaction and broken promises have led to this moment. **Congress cannot wait any longer and must act NOW to permanently protect our immigrant communities and families facing the threat of deportation.**
This is a critical moment for our movement, and impacted communities will be counting on UWDA to provide guidance, advocate for our demands, and help lead the way to secure permanent protections — but we can’t do this without you.
**[Donate now to support our fight for permanent protections for DACA recipients and all undocumented people:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr5dag1EP6sfSVmMPkcU_VYtohP8cbpEAMrVDbQ1O-p6-kE3ttdUBrzH3hJAoGFgQsykc19B1SCeuF1uAs-axMyfjhrH_cAzOHU44FPuoGpp9e2-tbn2q9L2srr_mR_vR3mXB7-J2ZCU3iq07iiK7RqrgzXNVwhjX8aCqlaD9S0TfrkU3ph8oczbE4_Qt0zQQsFP9csdaeJL5XokgcM-LGkI77Sf0ErpbHMyAZIUnYJ1njudcEfIFeBc5Pebs64VDehdwj9jjuwhj9FNcGs5bcu9AYncWUgroVAx7VqT4xSQSE-u4VPbnHr4mac03PAlCIAa_Xu0iTFwr4KOcwBPbdos6KDfMCdIgp3ETkS_psNIH5aFbPMpvkjTQzsiT7HsCcz2nE4alaoD_lWpN2PUlBwA/4d9/e6uNBQgtSA6m5ahMFFZ0UQ/h7/h001.OgB_7rxw-Dx8axviXQYvhUBSUY1QDjdZ2YInzcM0itw)**

clean_body: This fight isn’t over. | | | We wanted to make sure you saw this, Peter: Yesterday, the Fifth Circuit Court ruled against DACA — but is still allowing renewals to be processed. DACA’s future is still in limbo, the only thing we know for certain is we’ll need to fight like hell to keep DACA protections in place. These attacks on DACA continue to be led by anti-immigrant courts and far-right elected officials hell-bent on destabilizing our communities and keeping us from thriving. DACA was never more than a temporary solution,Peter. Now with only days before Trump is set to take office, promising the largest deportation effort in this county’s history, this only strengthens the urgency around our demands for permanent protections. More than ever before, now we need Congress to step up and protect immigrants. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. Let’s be clear: DACA being shut down would be catastrophic. Hundreds of thousands could lose their jobs and protections against deportation. But with millions of others ineligible to even apply for DACA, our fight has always been for more expansive permanent protections. This latest attack on DACA should serve as a reminder of the urgency around our demands for a pathway to citizenship: we must be ready to take a bold, public stance to unapologetically declare immigrants are here to stay! Years of Congressional inaction and broken promises have led to this moment. Congress cannot wait any longer and must act NOW to permanently protect our immigrant communities and families facing the threat of deportation. This is a critical moment for our movement, and impacted communities will be counting on UWDA to provide guidance, advocate for our demands, and help lead the way to secure permanent protections — but we can’t do this without you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. We know that DACA is right and legal.But even more importantly, we know that our love for our community and for each other is unbreakable. We’ll keep fighting for each other and see each other through this. I am here to stay. We at United We Dream Action are here to stay. And immigrants everywhere across America are here to stay. Thank you for standing with us, Carolina, United We Dream Action P.S. Follow us on: | | | | | Paid for by United We Dream Action; UnitedWeDreamAction.org; Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi (Personal Inbox)
subject: Thank you in advance for your first $5 donation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I wanted to let you know personally:

Your support is so vital to helping Democrats protect our progress and hold Donald Trump accountable.

When I think about my most important supporters, what comes to mind aren’t those who offered the biggest checks – but the loyal supporters who had my back when I needed them the most.

Truly, Peter, I wouldn’t be running for Congress today without supporters like you.

I hate to ask again, but I need you to hear this from me: I just checked my list of 2025 Democratic Members, and my team says we’re running behind our goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]

Peter, if we can’t gather another 5,000 Memberships before midnight, we won’t be on track to hit our goal and help Democrats reclaim our House Majority. Out of all my supporters, only the top 4% have made a contribution. So today, I’m personally asking you to join our best group of supporters: Can you chip in $5 before midnight to renew your 2025 membership, help Democrats retake the House Majority, and hold Trump accountable for his actions? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]

2025 DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP DRIVE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]
ID: 126020315 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]
CONTRIBUTION: UNCONFIRMED [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]
SUGGESTED DONATION: $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]

Chip in $5 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]

Chip in $24 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=24]

Chip in $100 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=100]
Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thank you in advance for chipping in today. It means so much to see your name among my supporters in this critical moment. RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

FROM REVOLUTION TO REPUBLIC

COTTAGE MEETINGS FOR TEENS

January 28 - April 22, 2025

Tuesdays at 11amPT/ 12pmMT/ 1pmCT/ 2pmET

What does freedom mean to you—and how can we ensure it thrives for future generations?

Just in time for the launch of our BRAND-NEW High School Credit-Earning Curriculum, Moms for America is thrilled to present
Cottage Meetings for Teens, hosted by veteran facilitator Tami Hirsch!

Building on Kimberly Fletcher’s foundational Revolution to Republic program, this interdisciplinary course weaves together
American history and classic literature to help teens explore the timeless themes of freedom and liberty. Together, they’ll
uncover the principles of representative government, individual rights, and religious freedom—core values enshrined in the
Declaration of Independence and the Constitution.

But freedom isn’t just a lofty ideal—it begins at home. By nurturing strong values and leadership within the family, we empower
teens to create freer communities, stronger states, and ultimately a thriving nation. This course is a powerful step toward
raising the next generation of leaders who understand, value, and protect the legacy of liberty.

Will your family take the first step in safeguarding freedom for the future?

Don’t miss this opportunity—sign up today to join the journey!

MOMMY DETECTIVE: Be the Mama Bear-GRRR!!

February 3 and 10, 2025

Tuesdays at 1pmPT/ 2pmMT/ 3pmCT/ 4pmET

Most Mamas worry about how and when to launch into full Mama Bear protection mode. They want to be kind and compassionate with
friends and co-workers, yet they must protect their children. When is it too much to demand your way? When should you stand up,
stand down, or walk away? How can you word your demands to save a friendship? How can you talk to your doctor without being
ordered out of the office? How can you help your child understand why you must stand up for your rights?

In this 2-part series, Debbie Jansen - The Mommy Detective - will present ten situations that require a Mama Bear Response. These
classes will equip you with practical skills to be an effective and protective Mama Bear, even during the most challenging times.

Register - BE THE MAMA BEAR [http://email.mg.momsforamerica.us/c/eJxsks1uqzoUhZ_GzBqBbTAMPChtSP9yq6TN7yQytqEGbHOMCcl5-qv0XF2dQYde8t5aa6-Pn5Sg--rcRcLHr-zX53u1J8djdg4ErSIicBQIq5kyVNczbfVQWce0dIqz2TgEkkYEERhBEqeB1Ex1Jy2HgdXytncrzcjmpMG8fMi2hzwvHv1_v_y1l5Qz3TNVm7-021hCiGApJkksSpTGooSyIijEgTRn5azR0njaOytG7pU1wRetqgRmpERxGEkuBeIVjiMo06TECGPGAkVhCOMwitIoDuM4nUUyRBnnHJWoShCRAIc_Buzol_f9ANA9gAWARadMO9NDPRjhZtxqAItv83feMd4qUwNYQMTjKBMikTFABbfGM-6fBUCPq1c_HVfz33njHPxs2vXbVQcdP_3Jr4yXzrCObmAxiMW23UcA5gfyT5kt49VLbdQ4ur3tIYDFYnP9WH6y-z1KjmX1trg-PxltP5q5Xokm5bvsJUweuJ7gpizwuBY1gPnL03W5myq_xnjeAVj4z8sTzuHvCcA8_9WGh4_pil6Wm_kIYL4zsnkooH9rlsu0fZ36qn8S-LDav58BLC5xc5nY8_pt_Q4XMhYtWmSKtMXugA-pvEf7Mbo8Rq_bxylNgs5-U9Z7k_TzD71d4CVJ-gbLBxlo6b-soKxXgXWqVoaWY9fefR8k6J09KyEdvb3q0QSOin5SXaeGhAAc1jf91kIw2NFxSf9UoYbz3WRdK13gKbf69CPfnkp_-p9AT28uf7R4pvDfAAAA__80Ew46]

THE HEALING OF AMERICA

February 6 - May 29, 2025

Thursdays at 5pmPT/ 6pmMT/ 7pmCT/ 8pmET

In the wake of the monumental 2024 election of Donald J. Trump, there’s no better time to embrace the principles of liberty and
take action to safeguard the future of our nation. Join Al & Juleen Jackson for Healing of America, a transformative 16-week
webinar series that explores the foundation of our republic, the structure of the Constitution, and the forces threatening our
freedoms. Discover practical strategies to overcome these challenges and heal America from the grassroots to the highest levels.

Through this series, you’ll gain a deeper understanding of the Constitution’s original intent, the ideals that make America
exceptional, and the steps needed to restore unity and strength across the nation. Whether you’re a seasoned patriot or new to
civic engagement, this is your opportunity to join a nationwide movement to preserve liberty for generations to come.

Don’t wait—reserve your spot today and be part of the solution. Together, we can protect and preserve our freedoms and rebuild

ADULT PREDATORS IN SCHOOLS: How Flipping & Training School Boards Could be the Answer to Stopping Predation

Monday, February 3, 2025

4pmPT/ 5pmMT/ 6pmCT/ 7pmET

Predation and abuse of children by school employees have become nation-wide issues. Since the beginning of 2024, Sherrie Conley,
who is a former Oklahoma State House Member, has compiled a list of Oklahoma cases reported over the last 14 years. However, she
had not realized the problem's magnitude until she started the Broken Trust project.

In addition to the obvious toll on student well-being, failure to protect children places a financial burden on taxpayers through
civil lawsuits against the districts. There's much work to be done, and reforming school boards could be the key to slowing it
down or even abolishing the predators from our schools.
