clean_body: 2025 is hitting the ground RUNNING! Register now for these exciting and inspiring upcoming webinars or events! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] Don't miss ANY of our inspirational and equipping webinars or in-person events! [] [-] FROM REVOLUTION TO REPUBLIC COTTAGE MEETINGS FOR TEENS January 28 - April 22, 2025 Tuesdays at 11amPT/ 12pmMT/ 1pmCT/ 2pmET What does freedom mean to you—and how can we ensure it thrives for future generations? Just in time for the launch of our BRAND-NEW High School Credit-Earning Curriculum, Moms for America is thrilled to present Cottage Meetings for Teens, hosted by veteran facilitator Tami Hirsch! Building on Kimberly Fletcher’s foundational Revolution to Republic program, this interdisciplinary course weaves together American history and classic literature to help teens explore the timeless themes of freedom and liberty. Together, they’ll uncover the principles of representative government, individual rights, and religious freedom—core values enshrined in the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution. But freedom isn’t just a lofty ideal—it begins at home. By nurturing strong values and leadership within the family, we empower teens to create freer communities, stronger states, and ultimately a thriving nation. This course is a powerful step toward raising the next generation of leaders who understand, value, and protect the legacy of liberty. Will your family take the first step in safeguarding freedom for the future? Don’t miss this opportunity—sign up today to join the journey! Register - COTTAGE MEETINGS FOR TEENS [] [] [] MOMMY DETECTIVE: Be the Mama Bear-GRRR!! February 3 and 10, 2025 Tuesdays at 1pmPT/ 2pmMT/ 3pmCT/ 4pmET Most Mamas worry about how and when to launch into full Mama Bear protection mode. They want to be kind and compassionate with friends and co-workers, yet they must protect their children. When is it too much to demand your way? When should you stand up, stand down, or walk away? How can you word your demands to save a friendship? How can you talk to your doctor without being ordered out of the office? How can you help your child understand why you must stand up for your rights? In this 2-part series, Debbie Jansen - The Mommy Detective - will present ten situations that require a Mama Bear Response. These classes will equip you with practical skills to be an effective and protective Mama Bear, even during the most challenging times. Register - BE THE MAMA BEAR [] [] [] THE HEALING OF AMERICA February 6 - May 29, 2025 Thursdays at 5pmPT/ 6pmMT/ 7pmCT/ 8pmET In the wake of the monumental 2024 election of Donald J. Trump, there’s no better time to embrace the principles of liberty and take action to safeguard the future of our nation. Join Al & Juleen Jackson for Healing of America, a transformative 16-week webinar series that explores the foundation of our republic, the structure of the Constitution, and the forces threatening our freedoms. Discover practical strategies to overcome these challenges and heal America from the grassroots to the highest levels. Through this series, you’ll gain a deeper understanding of the Constitution’s original intent, the ideals that make America exceptional, and the steps needed to restore unity and strength across the nation. Whether you’re a seasoned patriot or new to civic engagement, this is your opportunity to join a nationwide movement to preserve liberty for generations to come. Don’t wait—reserve your spot today and be part of the solution. Together, we can protect and preserve our freedoms and rebuild America’s greatness from the ground up. Register - HEALING OF AMERICA [] [] [] ENTREPRENEURSHIP FOR TEENS & TWEENS Monday, February 17, 2025 9amPT/ 10amMT/ 11amCT/ 12pmET What if your teen’s wild ideas could become the next big thing? 🚀 That’s exactly what we will be talking about in February’s Homeschool Mom2Mom! Join our hostess, Liz Ackerman, as she welcomes Sarah Hernholm, founder of WIT (Whatever It Takes), for an inspiring and practical webinar that will show you how to unlock the entrepreneurial mindset in your teens and tweens! In this engaging session, Sarah will reveal actionable strategies to help homeschool parents: Cultivate creativity and critical thinking 💡 Build executive functioning and problem-solving skills 🧠 Empower kids to turn ideas into action and step into leadership roles 🌟 Secure college credit for their students while doing all these things! Don’t miss this opportunity to inspire the next generation of innovators and changemakers! 👉 Register now and give your teen the tools they need to dream big and do even bigger! Register - TEEN ENTREPRENEURSHIP [] [] [] FIRST ANNUAL OHIO MOMS FOR AMERICA STATE CONFERENCE MARCH 21-23, 2025 The Amish Door Inn | Wilmot, Ohio Join us for a transformative weekend designed specifically for Ohio moms, but open to ALL moms! Pampering: Take time to relax, rejuvenate, and enjoy well-deserved self-care. Inspiration: Be empowered by an incredible lineup of speakers, including: Kimberly Fletcher – Moms for America Founder & President Debbie Jansen – Ohio Moms for America State Liaison Al & Juleen Jackson – A dynamic duo dedicated to strengthening families and preserving their freedom Tami Hirsch, Darbi Boddy, Tyler Ohta, Magistrate Erin Welch, Amie Williams –even more voices that will inspire and uplift! Purpose: This is more than an event—it’s a chance to connect with like-minded moms, recharge your spirit, and gain a fresh sense of purpose. Leave with practical tools, renewed energy, and a deeper commitment to advancing freedom in your home, your community, and our nation. Space is limited, so don’t wait to reserve your spot! Overnight accommodations are available onsite – the beautiful Amish Door Inn - to make your weekend as convenient and enjoyable as possible. Make this your time to be pampered, inspired, and purposeful. We can’t wait to see you there! Register - OHIO STATE CONFERENCE [] [] [] EXPOSING THE PLAYERS IN PUBLIC EDUCATION Monday, January 27, 2025 4pmPT/ 5pmMT/ 6pmCT/ 7pmET Discover the key players in public education beyond your local school board. Join this webinar as a school board member shares insights on who is shaping the decisions that affect your schools and your children. It's important to be aware of the significant forces working against parental rights and common-sense policies, and you have the right to know who they are. Register - EXPOSING THE PLAYERS [] [] [] ADULT PREDATORS IN SCHOOLS: How Flipping & Training School Boards Could be the Answer to Stopping Predation Monday, February 3, 2025 4pmPT/ 5pmMT/ 6pmCT/ 7pmET Predation and abuse of children by school employees have become nation-wide issues. Since the beginning of 2024, Sherrie Conley, who is a former Oklahoma State House Member, has compiled a list of Oklahoma cases reported over the last 14 years. However, she had not realized the problem's magnitude until she started the Broken Trust project. In addition to the obvious toll on student well-being, failure to protect children places a financial burden on taxpayers through civil lawsuits against the districts. There's much work to be done, and reforming school boards could be the key to slowing it down or even abolishing the predators from our schools. Register - STOPPING PREDATION [] BOOKMARK THIS PAGE! 👇👇👇👇👇 [] [] LIKE WHAT WE DO? Your tax-deductible gift to Moms for America® will help support us in our mission to Empower Moms, Promote Liberty, and Raise Patriots! DONATE TODAY [] Moms for America® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

subject: Here’s what we have on file for you:
body:
Your support during this moment could not be more important.
---
Derek, In just two days, Donald Trump will officially become president. His Republican Congress is already sworn in and ready to get to work on their far-right agenda. On top of that, Trump and his billionaire allies are preparing to do everything in their power to enact their harmful plans. That’s why it’s so important that on day one, we have the resources to mobilize and organize against any dangerous legislation they try to push. Our records show you haven’t made a donation this year, and we’d love to change that today. Here’s what we have on file for you: _**Democratic National Committee 2025 Donor Record**_ **Name:** Derek
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2025 Donor:** No! ❌
**Suggested Action:[Donate now to build a strong Democratic Party.**[
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250118_2583_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2583_22930333_c_TEFx&akid=2583%2E22930333%2Ec_TEFx)** As a key member of this grassroots team, your support during this moment could not be more important. By donating today, you’re sending a powerful message that you’re ready to hold Trump accountable, invest in state parties all over the country, win key statewide races in states like New Jersey and Virginia this year, win back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028. clean_body: Your support during this moment could not be more important. Derek, In just two days, Donald Trump will officially become president. His Republican Congress is already sworn in and ready to get to work on their far-right agenda. On top of that, Trump and his billionaire allies are preparing to do everything in their power to enact their harmful plans. That’s why it’s so important that on day one, we have the resources to mobilize and organize against any dangerous legislation they try to push. Our records show you haven’t made a donation this year, and we’d love to change that today. Here’s what we have on file for you: Democratic National Committee 2025 Donor Record Name: Derek Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com 2025 Donor: No! ❌ Suggested Action: As a key member of this grassroots team, your support during this moment could not be more important. By donating today, you’re sending a powerful message that you’re ready to hold Trump accountable, invest in state parties all over the country, win key statewide races in states like New Jersey and Virginia this year, win back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** We hope you’ll join us in this fight. Thank you. The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6e1ca2928aaf4444aa0a0b6bafd0168c&_e=r5Bo-Bb8_rRLPdXIA2HUO6_n7pEykE160ASKTUZokaKRLleZWCnGgGn3UVYwwoWDXpODaxd315eQGJXjUXAaIZOLRBU97pr1KfB14fDGTuohhuXcl-78mC2c8eenrLq5dHYbryRYaY1mJ_IUGhqnX7lO0GeDUlGWO07X9x7_1swIdwPH76B-jO2D3JbOjv4l0BCkGwCOov2Dre67jXttNQsM2TRaPbT_5OI0PIt_ct70ZmYB-XYt86jSx0_ML2PiIC77kIrjXAg7xJZ2j1PyqIZpV2h7WeSVFv4ZEF6qcqhev6w8ORnkCrwzdCbPI9ALtpzlXSju6ZOnFk3bN_kf8rkB6p6Mba_47-eGmtqaghIldKJobCZd66FR3HdWTJeJ)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6e1ca2928aaf4444aa0a0b6bafd0168c&_e=r5Bo-Bb8_rRLPdXIA2HUO6_n7pEykE160ASKTUZokaKRLleZWCnGgGn3UVYwwoWDXpODaxd315eQGJXjUXAaIZOLRBU97pr1KfB14fDGTuohhuXcl-78mC2c8eenrLq5dHYbryRYaY1mJ_IUGhqnX7lO0GeDUlGWO07X9x7_1swIdwPH76B-jO2D3JbOjv4l0BCkGwCOov2Dre67jXttNQsM2TRaPbT_5OI0PIt_ct4bbvdhbYPsnQCPaUDtL54cg1dnzlDntNmJRJlNkkySzfmttjC6XpNP0zq7tNd9NOXK2uUM-GVHjszhOeN-7vsx345Tjeq3FjijCZ8Z4fFk_qiyfRJhS34jSGT9dzKosZj09Gz24rhjuH_VM__CEQxQ)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And when it comes to staying ahead of _**Communist China**_ , this move from DJT would be an absolute game-changer. That being said, the people of Greenland are also yearning for leadership change after years of neglect and alleged abuses by the Danish state. _**Even Greenland 's prime minister is warming up to the idea of closer ties to the United States.**_

| **Meet Jim:** Congressman Jim Baird is a decorated Vietnam War Veteran and the proud representative for Indiana's 4th Congressional District in our nation's capital. A lifelong resident of West Central Indiana, Jim grew up on his family's farm and had the values of faith, family, and hard work instilled in him at an early age. He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. He fought in two of the deadliest battles of Operation Lam Son 719 and lost his left arm during a convoy ambush in March of 1971. In a true embodiment of American sacrifice and patriotism, Jim Baird has put his life on the line time and time again fighting communism abroad. His belief in the American Dream and our American way of life go far beyond words. For the entirety of his life, Jim has fought the good fight for our country both physically and spiritually. And he wears his love for the world's greatest country on his sleeve each and every day that he shows up for work in Washington, D.C. Previously, Jim Baird spent eight years in the Indiana House of Representatives serving District 44 from 2010 to 2018. Prior to that, he was Putnam County Commissioner from 2006 to 2010. A fiscal conservative and America First Republican, Jim is incredibly proud to fight every day in DC to advance the best interests of Indiana's families through Congress. A loving husband to his wife Danise, a devoted father to his children, and the world's best pop-pop to his grandkids, Jim spends most of his free time in the company of his loved ones or tending to the family farm.

name: Jenna Burns
subject: It’s basically a death sentence
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.
Dear Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16ab48bdd7924593b6a332661d92d4d2&_e=x-UPLfN7hGBfSs6oOBMGFYzBLfbxHhv5FW1-sk63PMkPs5qR3GuJnvolmT78TTWbjpqyU8hg5YvRZ-cMb8kfoy4NL5Mor5hCJVE-7SU1PT1oiCsrRxPsrhu9W9HfEw7vc7jW6v3SFESjOc4BUCZwPEBUsYFdS9RKuDseLGo34zJrlCERwETAyH5Q3v6LwDUEphOk-tk2rAKLWMuLJqAQt7Lwldo1Y30Jzmawx-p8_hP2q3nRb1WrU-9aARcRlA2qq1n5KyELGAN77y6gFqGJWgrJjD4vGO1jfvlZXOLzfADOp0nO0rMTCNu27kG_-3csblw5bxTNUicBpDncIFZhDl8VVfwEF6bMV11bMBOprLP9y5rbKAKpaiNOzma6VH2c)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16ab48bdd7924593b6a332661d92d4d2&_e=x-UPLfN7hGBfSs6oOBMGFYzBLfbxHhv5FW1-sk63PMkPs5qR3GuJnvolmT78TTWbjpqyU8hg5YvRZ-cMb8kfoy4NL5Mor5hCJVE-7SU1PT1oiCsrRxPsrhu9W9HfEw7vc7jW6v3SFESjOc4BUCZwPEBUsYFdS9RKuDseLGo34zJrlCERwETAyH5Q3v6LwDUEphOk-tk2rAKLWMuLJqAQt7Lwldo1Y30Jzmawx-p8_hNZVeFjkrVhPkQcjJQrotBhG0i-9iryXMW21HQENRfzOBP6Udt68voHW8TjPeFnaI3E9jX_SPZ6hKCanFZLDXcfJI1SpVVIWBT5prwsLHcC-IDB758ZPaCRhV1H-hUHGzfAQHQb9ljmdm94xfteDVZx)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16ab48bdd7924593b6a332661d92d4d2&_e=x-UPLfN7hGBfSs6oOBMGFYzBLfbxHhv5FW1-sk63PMkPs5qR3GuJnvolmT78TTWbjpqyU8hg5YvRZ-cMb8kfoy4NL5Mor5hCJVE-7SU1PT1oiCsrRxPsrhu9W9HfEw7vc7jW6v3SFESjOc4BUCZwPEBUsYFdS9RKuDseLGo34zJrlCERwETAyH5Q3v6LwDUEphOk-tk2rAKLWMuLJqAQt7Lwldo1Y30Jzmawx-p8_hMZ9utZVjIK-G07B3shDU_B2PbRHSpkHYrd_1PQq4vx6w6mL2VsXvOnrGuw2uV5Q0EsCqCZy5gx_Qu434XOY-zNLwKYP__CCMi436XkeILCWXQusNhkAkZKhpLUQ8WXI02ZRt83D79WoZygMi8BcZav)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16ab48bdd7924593b6a332661d92d4d2&_e=x-UPLfN7hGBfSs6oOBMGFYzBLfbxHhv5FW1-sk63PMkPs5qR3GuJnvolmT78TTWbjpqyU8hg5YvRZ-cMb8kfoy4NL5Mor5hCJVE-7SU1PT1oiCsrRxPsrhu9W9HfEw7vc7jW6v3SFESjOc4BUCZwPEBUsYFdS9RKuDseLGo34zJrlCERwETAyH5Q3v6LwDUEphOk-tk2rAKLWMuLJqAQt7Lwldo1Y30Jzmawx-p8_hO-Vfk23IXxtcGNjXaS0EkZ3mUWiiHMJSlZ9oPx8I9mdkcnuwolLmB7HVXO72Gu1A5Fozqz6P4fvEtOhiPhewOOlfnSk2Lmv0sI65f8DfhW4xo7UGeJSGXc43PV4APjF5jGEEZ7ka6b16Rlrj90Brgb)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16ab48bdd7924593b6a332661d92d4d2&_e=x-UPLfN7hGBfSs6oOBMGFYzBLfbxHhv5FW1-sk63PMkPs5qR3GuJnvolmT78TTWbjpqyU8hg5YvRZ-cMb8kfoy4NL5Mor5hCJVE-7SU1PT1oiCsrRxPsrhu9W9HfEw7vc7jW6v3SFESjOc4BUCZwPEBUsYFdS9RKuDseLGo34zJrlCERwETAyH5Q3v6LwDUEphOk-tk2rAKLWMuLJqAQt7Lwldo1Y30Jzmawx-p8_hM2vo5qAgE-2UtjJqt7uUXPR6gp8gVB-DEVsjIl3PTlXChKqjWyXp9rMMRw_trowr1z6tpimKoFv5zksGrg2IV4Z-9buQGt-SPtjTqyHAr6qDIcftiocoPJl0spMLJgdTnmdffWly3W6oLWfmHWjIvQ)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16ab48bdd7924593b6a332661d92d4d2&_e=x-UPLfN7hGBfSs6oOBMGFYzBLfbxHhv5FW1-sk63PMkPs5qR3GuJnvolmT78TTWbjpqyU8hg5YvRZ-cMb8kfoy4NL5Mor5hCJVE-7SU1PT1oiCsrRxPsrhu9W9HfEw7vc7jW6v3SFESjOc4BUCZwPEBUsYFdS9RKuDseLGo34zJrlCERwETAyH5Q3v6LwDUEphOk-tk2rAKLWMuLJqAQt7Lwldo1Y30Jzmawx-p8_hMVXw-M-jHLsm_0bzrTkvisBzNWZgHPHrFsLfDXk08HYcbHxdC3hyiQ6ssR5UarCBxWxHYbSOYg0Fz0-P1EsugK8BGuW43lPbK6awQymHBkCO93RuPi87rlT69mkfy7_3NLvAafotICzFs6iQDYpJvL)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16ab48bdd7924593b6a332661d92d4d2&_e=x-UPLfN7hGBfSs6oOBMGFYzBLfbxHhv5FW1-sk63PMkPs5qR3GuJnvolmT78TTWbjpqyU8hg5YvRZ-cMb8kfoy4NL5Mor5hCJVE-7SU1PT1oiCsrRxPsrhu9W9HfEw7vc7jW6v3SFESjOc4BUCZwPEBUsYFdS9RKuDseLGo34zJrlCERwETAyH5Q3v6LwDUEphOk-tk2rAKLWMuLJqAQt7Lwldo1Y30Jzmawx-p8_hMU-csSRcgvm-hPOxfDPgqolJifzK_T2QJRJEQwztfLLBZjzVmyNcvYinXT_MAUu14h6haj6A4LiH6lMSUQg7qT4IP_HNkZh7wkG-T1Q4wZOfDAnTVln4xfUHKyDFvYuiwIFQIKs4n570wVqUbsf7px)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Dear Patriot, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Thank you to my friends President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
President Biden and Vice President Harris have done more for the gun safety movement than
#

Friends -
Today, I want to thank President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris for all they did to protect our country from preventable gun violence during their administration.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250118-1-b&t=1&akid=9850%2E3935704%2EzetoAr)
President Biden and Vice President Harris have done more for the gun safety movement than any administration in history. In 2022, President Biden signed the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ into law—the most significant federal gun safety legislation passed in 30 years. He also established the first-ever federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention in 2023 and appointed Vice President Harris to lead this important office.
The Biden-Harris administration also worked to combat ghost guns and stabilizing braces, made gun trafficking and straw purchases a federal crime, and strengthened background checks on gun buyers under 21.
On a personal note, I am forever grateful to President Biden for his compassion and personal friendship to me in the darkest days of my recovery. He held my hand and gave me his “word as a Biden” that he and Jill would always be there for me—and they were. He was by my side when I returned to cast my first vote following the shooting, and I was proud to stand by his side throughout his presidency.
Our country is safer thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’ leadership, and I am forever grateful for their partnership over the last four years.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

**👋 Hey there, before you go...**

We are about to enter a new era of leadership when Donald Trump and JD Vance take office on Monday. The work ahead to protect our hard-earned gun safety progress won’t be easy, and that’s why we need your support today.

[**Will you please chip in $20 or more to join us in the fight to defend our gun safety movement from the MAGA right?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250118-1-b&t=2&akid=9850%2E3935704%2EzetoAr)

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: President Trump: “I definitely want to killcartels”
body:
| | | | | |
---
| Peter- This week, I had the honor of meeting with President Trump at Mar-a-Lago. President Trump is ready to lead, and turn his campaign promises into actual public policy the moment he is sworn in on Monday, January 20. It was a great meeting with President Trump on a wide range of topics. I want to focus this brief on an issue that is a top priority for both of us: destroying the Mexican drug cartels.
---
| | | |
---
| **PRESIDENT TRUMP: “I DEFINITELY WANT TO KILL CARTELS”**
---
| |
---
|
---
| Me: “Do you want to kill cartels?” President Trump: “I definitely want to kill cartels” That is the crux of my conversation with President Trump this past weekend at Mar-a-Lago. It confirmed what we heard President Trump commit to throughout this past campaign - that he would put the full weight and authority of his administration behind rooting out this premiere threat to American sovereignty and the American people. President Trump is aligned with the mission that I have been laying out the past few years, specifically related to targeting the cartels with military force. In fact, President Trump endorsed my proposal to authorize the use of military force against the drug cartels when it was introduced in 2023.
---
| [Breitbart: Exclusive – Trump Endorses Using Military to Crush Cartels: ‘I Would Do That’](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JHX25T9DC2W1AR61Y7W09D3R_0) Former President Donald Trump told Breitbart News exclusively that he supports a proposal from Reps. Michael Waltz (R-FL) and Dan Crenshaw (R-TX) that would authorize the use of military force against Mexican drug cartels to target the criminal enterprises and dismantle them. “I would do that,” Trump said when asked about the congressmen’s Authorization for the Use of Military Force (AUMF) legislation that they have recently proposed.
---
| It is refreshing to have an incoming President who takes this threat seriously. The Mexican drug cartels kill tens of thousands of Americans every year with fentanyl. They control vast amounts of territory on the border of the United States and use this control to facilitate the illegal immigration crisis. And I believe they represent the most present, near term, and geologically precarious threat to the United States. America cannot allow this threat to fester any longer. Joe Biden erased years of progress in combating the cartels by undoing President Trump’s policies enacted during his first term. Thankfully, President Trump is committed to not only re-implementing those policies but strengthening them through executive actions and laws like the ones I am putting forth in Congress. In order to give President Trump the legal authority to do what is necessary against the cartels, Congress must act. That’s why I am proposing a Select Committee to Combat the Mexican Drug Cartels.
---
|
---
| **HERE'S WHY WE NEED A SELECT COMMITTEE ON THE CARTELS**
---
| |
---
| [**READ MY OPED HERE**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JHX25T9DC2W1AR61Y7W09D3R_1)
---
| In a recent op-ed for Fox News, I outline my proposal to create a select committee to target the Mexican drug cartels. It will be the most effective way for Congress to pass the necessary policies to help President Trump carry out his mission against the cartels. As we have seen with slim majorities in Congress, it is difficult to get most policies to the floor for a vote let alone pass those policies. Too many committees with competing jurisdictions and conflicting priorities jam up Congress into a state of paralysis. We have a finite window of time to muscle meaningful legislation through Congress and to the president’s desk, and we cannot afford delay. A Select Committee to Combat the Mexican Drug Cartels would speed up the process. We have proven on the Cartel Task Force I chair that when there is a concerted and bipartisan group of lawmakers dedicated to the task of destroying the Mexican Drug Cartels, we can get our work done fairly efficiently. Our Task Force has produced serious policy solutions to combat the drug cartels in a short time period. The draw back of a Task Force is that we have no legislative authority or resources to turn these policy proposals into actual bills that get a vote on the floor. Just as the Select Committee on China passed serious legislation into law combating the Chinese Communist Party, the same will happen under a select committee on the cartels. I am pushing aggressively for this select committee to be organized at the beginning of this Congress so we can deliver the policy solutions President Trump will be eagerly awaiting the minute he sits down at the Resolute Desk.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8b13f2a6-c303-42cd-b454-c2ca31005292?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In this **[lost MAGA Moment,](https://substack.com/redirect/8b13f2a6-c303-42cd-b454-c2ca31005292?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Donald Trump invites Natalie Harp, a victim of medical malpractice, on stage to share her unbelievable story with the crowd during his 2019 speech at the Faith and Freedom Coalition.
This shows **[what kind of a man Trump really is](https://substack.com/redirect/8b13f2a6-c303-42cd-b454-c2ca31005292?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and you've probably NEVER seen it...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8b13f2a6-c303-42cd-b454-c2ca31005292?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I was the victim of medical error,... and left to die of cancer!" Harp explained. "First the medical establishment, they came by and saw me there, so they wrote me prescriptions for opioids and moved on..."
"But then an outsider, my Good Samaritan, President Donald J. Trump, he saw me there and he didn't walk by! He stopped! And he gave up his own quality of life so we can live and work and fight with dignity, because he believe in survival of the fighters, not the fittest!"
In May 2018, President Trump signed the "Right to Try Act" into law. This legislation allowed terminally ill patients who have exhausted all FDA-approved treatment options to access experimental drugs that have passed Phase I of FDA testing but have not yet been fully approved. The act aimed to bypass the need for FDA's "compassionate use" approval process, which, although highly effective with approval rates near 99%, was criticized for being too bureaucratic.
Trump's push for this was meant to give hope to terminally ill patients by providing them earlier access to potentially life-saving treatments.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8b13f2a6-c303-42cd-b454-c2ca31005292?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Why America's "Top Wine Explorer" Risked Death to Find A Lost French Grape
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/142be6fe-369b-4ca6-9e19-22326b693b57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
High in the rugged Andes Mountains lies a hidden treasure: a lost grape thriving in some of the world's most extreme vineyards. At over 8,000 feet, these grapes produce wines so bold, so rare, they've been called the best-kept secret in winemaking.
This is the story behind the **[Bonner Private Wine Partnership](https://substack.com/redirect/45b0c618-bdc6-41ff-a047-f8a34ead2d8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , where America's leading wine explorer uncovered these incredible wines--at great personal risk.
Now, you can taste the fruits of his discovery:
* **Extreme Altitude Flavors:** Bold, rich wines grown at 8,000-9,000 ft.
* **Exclusive Access:** Small-batch wines you won't find anywhere else.
* **Unparalleled Quality:** Handcrafted by family winemakers with generations of expertise.

These wines are nearly impossible to find in the U.S., but now they're available to you--**delivered right to your door.**
**[Click here to taste what others can't.](https://substack.com/redirect/45b0c618-bdc6-41ff-a047-f8a34ead2d8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/605e54c7-ddda-4a73-9abc-57ff05ea2c07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Protests erupt in Washington D.C. just days before Trump's inauguration
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/834041f1-ec4e-4e77-9569-86c99242650a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thousands are expected to gather in the nation's capital on Saturday for the People's March to protest President-elect Donald Trump and GOP policies ahead of his inauguration.
The event, **[organized by civil rights, racial justice, and reproductive health groups,](https://substack.com/redirect/2e3964b4-1d45-4824-b26e-dc4b36701d4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** anticipates 50,000 attendees at the National Park Service-permitted rally, **[the BBC reports.](https://substack.com/redirect/49043fcd-6a9b-42e0-bc4e-c4be6dda020b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Protesters, including members from Operation Free DC and The Women's March, oppose President Trump's polices that they claim threaten women's rights, immigrants, and the LGBTQ+ community.
The demonstration will start in D.C.**** and is part of a broader national protest movement, with similar events in cities nationwide, as a reaction to Trump taking office again.
* * *
# Thanking my longtime friend, President Donald J. Trump
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/00fa8e93-48cd-4575-b6c5-04c28812fdea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f61c9b62-3502-4034-960d-43c05dd1c54a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump posted a message of support for Giuliani, Sunday on Truth Social.
In these tumultuous times, when so many in the political press and within the Democrat Party seem to be teaming up against me, it's comforting to know that I have friends who stand by me, unconditionally. I want to take this moment to express my deepest gratitude to Donald J. Trump, a man I've known for decades, and who has recently shown his unwavering support by posting "SAVE RUDY" on Truth Social.
Firstly, let me say, Mr. President, your gesture means more to me than you could possibly know. It's not just about the post; it's about the message it sends. It's about loyalty, something that's been the bedrock of our relationship from the very start. When I was the Mayor of New York City, you were there whenever we needed you. You understand the city's pulse, just as I did. We've walked through the streets of Manhattan together, not just as two New Yorkers, but as friends who shared a vision for a better, safer city...

body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250118-1188-foote&t=1001&akid=1188%2E342411%2EPSJdTx ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter, it's the
Squad!

We want to reach out to ask you of one simple favor:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250118-movement.ZlxjhI&refcode=em20250118-1188&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1188%2E342411%2EPSJdTx ]Can you chip in $4 — $1 per Squad member — to help us start strong
before the new administration takes office in just two days.

Small-dollar donations like yours have powered our Squad for the last six
years. Unlike the far-right, we don’t rely on Super PACs or mega-donors.
Our movement is built by everyday people like you.

In just two days, we’ll need to re-focus our efforts on fighting back
against Trump’s divisive agenda and protecting our communities. Your
donation will help send a message to the Trump administration that our
Squad isn’t going anywhere.

If everyone reading this gave $4, we’d surpass our January goal and keep
Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida fully supported.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250118-movement.ZlxjhI&refcode=em20250118-1188&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1188%2E342411%2EPSJdTx ]Our Squad is counting on us. Will you chip in $4 to ensure our Squad
can keep up the fight for us in Congress?

subject: They’re already planning for 2026…
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQhdoBGIy40AgghIwqDZUa3R19AtTiwiTMlWRz8aH_nk2yU3pcP0Yhza2QLjQ)

They’re coming for us.
House Majority PAC, the Democrats’ Super PAC, has launched their 2026 Recruitment Fund, and I’m one of their targets.
This is the same group that spent nearly $200 million in the last election cycle to flip the House.
With us holding a razor-thin majority, they’re determined to work twice as hard to defeat me and take back control.
I am committed to fighting for southern Minnesota’s values and protecting our conservative voice in Washington. But to stay ahead of their plans, I need your support now. **[Please make a contribution to help me protect Minnesota’s 1st District and keep us safe from the radical Left in 2026.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQhdoBGIy40AgghIwqDZUa3R19AtTiwiTMlWRz8aH_nk2yU3pcP0Yhza2QLjQ)**

name: Troy Downing
subject: Biden’s Energy Disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
President Trump’s term can't start soon enough

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._f4lFJyvOyb2Q)
---
Peter, January 20th can’t come fast enough.

Even with just a couple of days left of his presidency, Joe Biden is enforcing radical liberal environmentalist policies that will hamper our energy sector. With just days left of his presidency, he has banned almost ALL new offshore oil and gas drilling. Energy independence is one of the most important issues, and Joe Biden is setting us back by signing these policies.

When President Trump starts his term, he will work to unwind all of this, and I’ll be happy to support him every step of the way. However, we’ll still need help to pass our Pro-America energy policies. **[**Will you chip in to support our mission of energy independence?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ SUPPORT OUR MISSION](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-gzrVy4fYguaNrxQiQ)

Thank you for standing with Republicans,
Troy Downing

As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | [CONTRIBUTE TO SUPPORT MY SON RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100597334/523285443/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250118_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmUwZTQ0Ni1iNWQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IVKy-eDpNKhRZT6hJQmp6jXjyWklNgod6nizelFtsHo=)
---
I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House.

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. **He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage.**

Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

**My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter.**

And I know that those experiences drive him _every single time_ he walks into his office in D.C.

[Peter, I know I’m biased, but there is truly no better person than Ritchie to represent NY-15. So if you can afford it, today I’m hoping you could make a $3 donation to continue supporting him. I know he would appreciate it so much. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100597335/523285445/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250118_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmUwZTQ0Ni1iNWQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IVKy-eDpNKhRZT6hJQmp6jXjyWklNgod6nizelFtsHo=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: | Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. = I’m personally reaching out today on behalf of my son, who’s working so hard right now to give Americans like me a voice in Congress. As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | = I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House. His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage. Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today. My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter. And I know that those experiences drive him every single time he walks into his office in D.C. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much, Debra | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=. Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

A candid post on why your support matters to me, the Qasim Rashid Show Episode 154, Christian nationalism is here, traveling to California to support LA fire victims, and the "ceasefire" deal, and UnitedHealth exploits cancer patients (again).
Let's dive into our weekly recap of _Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid_.
* * *
## Important Call to Action
Semafor reports that the Washington Post's traffic has plummeted from 24M daily visits in 2021 to just 3M in 2024. They've also lost more than 10% of their paid subscribers. Now they're changing their tagline from "Democracy Dies in Darkness" to "Riveting Storytelling for all of America."
My call to action -- rather than fall for the rebrand of a company still owned by a billionaire who is censoring criticism of himself and of Donald Trump -- invest instead in writers and activists funded by We the People:
* If you cancelled your Washington Post subscription, I welcome your subscription to _[Let's Address This](https://substack.com/redirect/bdf4b201-ed5a-49cd-a654-d27d107b9751?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ with Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/redirect/bdf4b201-ed5a-49cd-a654-d27d107b9751?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* If you want a human rights lawyers to shed light on the key issues that impact us all, I invite your subscription to _[Let's Address This](https://substack.com/redirect/bdf4b201-ed5a-49cd-a654-d27d107b9751?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ with Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/redirect/bdf4b201-ed5a-49cd-a654-d27d107b9751?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* And if you want to create a future where absolute justice matters, I need you to subscribe to _[Let's Address This](https://substack.com/redirect/bdf4b201-ed5a-49cd-a654-d27d107b9751?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ with Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/redirect/bdf4b201-ed5a-49cd-a654-d27d107b9751?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Thank you. ❤️✊🏽

* **Sunday:**[Why Your Support Matters To Me](https://substack.com/redirect/158bffb1-23f0-4b89-aba2-e065846a9e45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): My sincere ask of you to complete one, two, or all three calls to action I list

* **Monday:** [Christian Nationalism Isn't Coming--It's Here](https://substack.com/redirect/8c612a60-c94a-4511-b2e6-9634e452b31b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): The Trump admin plans to decimate the wall that separates religion and state--we cannot let them

* **Wednesday:[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/d9612e9c-8769-41ed-95e7-324a3bb79954?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Resilience in the Face of Adversity](https://substack.com/redirect/9bc3bcc2-86ea-4eeb-a77a-04496548108c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): The stories behind the LA fire victims, and how you can help those suffering
* **Thursday:**["Ceasefire" Deal As Israel Keeps Bombing Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/a55e61c0-3be1-45f8-8872-6c606fe8f8c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Netanyahu blames Hamas for thwarting a deal, while refusing to offer evidence of wrongdoing

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Farms and Freeways 🚜
body:
|
#
Big news, team. I’ve just been named to the House Agriculture and Transportation and Infrastructure Committees – _or in layman's terms, the committees on farms and freeways. _ | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100597706/523286506/-1606559029?refcode=em-1.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGUwZTQ0Ni1iNWQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hpyFF9ZBL2xztcV24Mk27xrS0g6L63sDkYm1n2a9u3s=) **McDonald Rivet appointed to House Committees on Agriculture and Transportation**
---
These committee assignments offer us incredible opportunities to make progress both right here in MI-08 and across the nation.
On the campaign trail, the number one thing I heard from our community was about how hard it is for folks to keep up with rising costs, and my top priority in Congress is to make things a little bit easier for Mid-Michiganders. These committee assignments put me in a great position to do that.
Whether it's securing funding for our local farmers or repairing the roads you take your kids to school on – I’m committed to ensuring working families have what they need to thrive.
I look forward to keeping you updated on our progress. Our work is made possible by our coalition standing with us.
More soon,
Kristen

name: John Fetterman
subject: where I stand on health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I will support any legislation that gets us closer to the goal of universal health care coverage.
#
Derek, have you seen the news about Republicans in Congress? Apparently the spending cuts they want aren’t possible without cutting health care from the people who need it most! 🤯
**I want to make it clear where I stand: I believe that health care is a basic, fundamental human right, not a privilege.**
In the richest nation on earth, I believe we have a moral duty to guarantee quality health care coverage for every American, and end the disgusting practice of corporations profiting from people’s health and well-being.
That’s why I will support any legislation that gets us closer to the goal of universal health care coverage, and *oppose* legislation that rips health care away from folks who already have it.
[**If you agree we should be looking to ensure access to care for every American, not taking it away, will you sign on to my petition today? We need to show Republicans in Congress that voters do not want to see their health care cut.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/2025-health-care-petition?source=em20250118-9805&akid=9805%2E434096%2EYte2kt)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/2025-health-care-petition?source=em20250118-9805&akid=9805%2E434096%2EYte2kt)**

clean_body: I will support any legislation that gets us closer to the goal of universal health care coverage. Derek, have you seen the news about Republicans in Congress? Apparently the spending cuts they want aren’t possible without cutting health care from the people who need it most! 🤯 I want to make it clear where I stand: I believe that health care is a basic, fundamental human right, not a privilege. In the richest nation on earth, I believe we have a moral duty to guarantee quality health care coverage for every American, and end the disgusting practice of corporations profiting from people’s health and well-being. That’s why I will support any legislation that gets us closer to the goal of universal health care coverage, and oppose legislation that rips health care away from folks who already have it. John ❤️ John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Attitude Matters—Here’s How It Can Change Your Life
body:
How My Father's Journey Taught Me About Faith and Resilience
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f4a7902e76d94b2eb4513297a854b5ef&_e=x8KKV1qYoM8gkOx_T3fhNQoc9VH9rUSWRthrAUTMTFZEcN9O8Bfduuu2Hk4FkmXqCoq74ffmJmr3lkLOcET2DzoXGPUmZvoxayE-JNRLjqnrmRiA3M83kJToFI2EcxObCv6cbpBE8yUrFrEpTIRMZZjcaaWN41dJVxCub0QGWc1xr9F4PQuMezAlzF-eZcBiMuRGL5eDj7ve6Y-VYihhyMRn8MbSOz-V-6ltzQpCy-9Jeu8HGntFBhbeHchHblnAJCBhlUeLBCBX1e3Uo_JYTepdjPgEkvQZeCjE5oboLZTRfkWWJ2uH3hgMLrZqTwMT6RaxQZz_jzhbWXuzMNUyXoSbl_EmKWhwUC2HJg7Xy3K02p2JY_ZbrXVbcqaENTf-Gm9Yse0BNBZU70QGbE_o5Q%3D%3D)
---
Peter, Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return? _When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!_ _When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious! **But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days. And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history. This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f4a7902e76d94b2eb4513297a854b5ef&_e=x8KKV1qYoM8gkOx_T3fhNQoc9VH9rUSWRthrAUTMTFZEcN9O8Bfduuu2Hk4FkmXqCoq74ffmJmr3lkLOcET2DzoXGPUmZvoxayE-JNRLjqnrmRiA3M83kJToFI2EcxObCv6cbpBE8yUrFrEpTIRMZZjcaaWN41dJVxCub0QGWc1xr9F4PQuMezAlzF-eZcBiMuRGL5eDj7ve6Y-VYihhyMRn8MbSOz-V-6ltzQpCy-9Jeu8HGntFBhbeHchHblnASJ47sTS_JOyT2pUdBjz8Sxq7EYdx-g9dyb4oAIhYfXo9D2-cRkkYR2JeD7thCaFX9M105PbT1pmoehGaAyAaFF2lyAHdnyQaq4gDIBNiXP_Lrnoq46fZeG6D2IqunK-tNE7sbLsThME6qFk3UchWVw%3D%3D)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free! You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f4a7902e76d94b2eb4513297a854b5ef&_e=x8KKV1qYoM8gkOx_T3fhNQoc9VH9rUSWRthrAUTMTFZEcN9O8Bfduuu2Hk4FkmXqCoq74ffmJmr3lkLOcET2DzoXGPUmZvoxayE-JNRLjqnrmRiA3M83kJToFI2EcxObCv6cbpBE8yUrFrEpTIRMZZjcaaWN41dJVxCub0QGWc1xr9F4PQuMezAlzF-eZcBiMuRGL5eDj7ve6Y-VYihhyMRn8MbSOz-V-6ltzQpCy-9Jeu8HGntFBhbeHchHblnAK9QX2ovEvrCxLBc8dqPU87tetWNWebhYQeIbP10Me-r0Lgwk9NphVOiUYEUPvd6x6gL-PTP1TYTD_llAVGN6-76GgBycQ--r89dEFGY0UCJDMcbBudB4Um-UIg3NryNrim92JxjnlZbCahoufJmuJQ%3D%3D) One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest. Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=01adf30ba1b644c5872cfeefc56fcc54&_e=LmZylNYNvfrJYcM1-bZoINoQ-ZN4J4zP7NIvKcwgjT1dKWJZApZPuodrvsiOXLFt3nDxoBlCyttyDZ3lWqP28q3lm6Jzskteccd7aSpeHLws1ds_ych-Ek8iZpM8rrHr9eUxAwrVUCoszDleBGuyURxxl9NxSrR35lKoybJ4006CvV4tckwls-dqn9OtZhx_BIPCp5Ju3DMVyCqSPqJyQtdREl4fLVuCHn1yZtd7oN5Jr5ZgulTw3F7FJy6WzEJTYdbW5dMi7ZfexCvzoXq_6bsf69HmIZwFcDeG1WGlwq4zKypEMAcVSrhVx_xmqfVl1VNanCSJVdYJDw5naJqTkAksAhRziw15tTaqM6tdr3f0LAv94-vPLmYjS7gGma55HVSEmRewXn4oQsPFQOczgosNNGIdlJ7mfReJVYTvbQ0%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=01adf30ba1b644c5872cfeefc56fcc54&_e=LmZylNYNvfrJYcM1-bZoINoQ-ZN4J4zP7NIvKcwgjT1dKWJZApZPuodrvsiOXLFt3nDxoBlCyttyDZ3lWqP28q3lm6Jzskteccd7aSpeHLws1ds_ych-Ek8iZpM8rrHr9eUxAwrVUCoszDleBGuyURxxl9NxSrR35lKoybJ4006CvV4tckwls-dqn9OtZhx_BIPCp5Ju3DMVyCqSPqJyQtdREl4fLVuCHn1yZtd7oN5Jr5ZgulTw3F7FJy6WzEJTBrtzr2OyXh7_2xPW-YpuRSEHChqRfPKLdmWaYNdAlvEFKwjZRxzhXnavtCiQhYjlVf32tLIEDk7cLU7nqaSIkuRsT2zOL2tyekTgbkJ-M8coXICVQ6ANksSRT5yPcSCcfha23bmp5yUTA_QIC-RpuA15xffPO97QonaWKo509JU%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=01adf30ba1b644c5872cfeefc56fcc54&_e=LmZylNYNvfrJYcM1-bZoINoQ-ZN4J4zP7NIvKcwgjT1dKWJZApZPuodrvsiOXLFt3nDxoBlCyttyDZ3lWqP28q3lm6Jzskteccd7aSpeHLws1ds_ych-Ek8iZpM8rrHr9eUxAwrVUCoszDleBGuyURxxl9NxSrR35lKoybJ4006CvV4tckwls-dqn9OtZhx_BIPCp5Ju3DMVyCqSPqJyQtdREl4fLVuCHn1yZtd7oN5Jr5ZgulTw3F7FJy6WzEJTWvBRZyTFQNkAl96nGHz2p8AHnkSIcTxSjvxLWqHIlWiNfGf1RB6XpjN_oqViTt-meGeQar0bf3k67H2sAzmcEs6OiwX8kSnUWA96c5fLG2mR6os8zmAQ_6BVzBw3VjNRhPfwFj_P9tv8MDO96MnPBHPop6hB-GLRMRquEAbmRKo%3D)**

| | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=01adf30ba1b644c5872cfeefc56fcc54&_e=LmZylNYNvfrJYcM1-bZoINoQ-ZN4J4zP7NIvKcwgjT1dKWJZApZPuodrvsiOXLFt3nDxoBlCyttyDZ3lWqP28q3lm6Jzskteccd7aSpeHLws1ds_ych-Ek8iZpM8rrHr9eUxAwrVUCoszDleBGuyURxxl9NxSrR35lKoybJ4006CvV4tckwls-dqn9OtZhx_BIPCp5Ju3DMVyCqSPqJyQtdREl4fLVuCHn1yZtd7oN5Jr5ZgulTw3F7FJy6WzEJTjZdGYZG-1kK8o5STK59KCbsV_3j7ECKuN2xffbNjXAQJFt3QkW8ClF-pQsmLcygjGPDPAkrADYdk7BDzhqz5FEMrXk5RqsDmYYVG3O9ZUPdOFCuCj9dTgZt6PIGTH_56qXKyvB_z4tzlLBmF5T-JQzkDbY44Zzt_KI2okXZ-sjI%3D)

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: I’m a dairy farmer, not a career politician
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots
body:
I know what it’s like to get up for work at 3:30 am, trudge through feet of snow to feed my herd, and make difficult decisions to keep my farm afloat while providing for my family and employees.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85307?refcode=em20250118-8728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8728%2E614464%2ENCCSf_)
Peter,
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a dairy farmer.**
I know what it’s like to get up for work at 3:30 am, trudge through feet of snow to feed my herd, and make difficult decisions to keep my farm afloat while providing for my family and employees. That’s exactly why I decided to run for Elise Stefanik’s seat and why I’m asking for your support today.
**[This is the closest House majority ever, so this race presents a real opportunity—and the work we do in the early days of the campaign will play a vital role in our success. Can I count on you to split $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us prepare for this special election and flip NY-21 blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85307?refcode=em20250118-8728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8728%2E614464%2ENCCSf_)**
**[CHIP IN NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85307?refcode=em20250118-8728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8728%2E614464%2ENCCSf_)**
The North Country doesn’t need another career politician who isn’t even from our district and is just using us to further their political ambitions. Now more than ever, we need a leader who understands the issues families face on a daily basis. In Congress, my sole focus will be to deliver results for the North Country and tackle these issues, but I need your help to get there.
**[This special election is our first opportunity to fight back and flip a seat, so we need all hands on deck. Will you split $10 between me and Heartland Patriots to join our team and help us start our campaign off strong?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85307?refcode=em20250118-8728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8728%2E614464%2ENCCSf_)**
