[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85308?refcode=em20250118-8728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=8728%2E614464%2ENCCSf_) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85308?refcode=em20250118-8728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=8728%2E614464%2ENCCSf_) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85308?refcode=em20250118-8728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=8728%2E614464%2ENCCSf_) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85308?refcode=em20250118-8728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=8728%2E614464%2ENCCSf_) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85308?refcode=em20250118-8728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=8728%2E614464%2ENCCSf_) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85308?refcode=em20250118-8728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=8728%2E614464%2ENCCSf_) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85307?refcode=em20250118-8728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8728%2E614464%2ENCCSf_)

subject: Why Did Our Children Leave Connecticut?
body:
Because the Democrats Have Destroyed Economic Opportunity

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..Q9WgGJThaR_lZFCw8iErP26zpLrPx-gs3bZKX76HQ60?) for more
---
# [ Why Did Our Children Leave Connecticut?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=155101700&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1MTAxNzAwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzcyMTc3OTMsImV4cCI6MTczOTgwOTc5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.oiv091j76qb66MvagNRDntsVS2qELLNKbPc88_vd24A)
### Because the Democrats Have Destroyed Economic Opportunity
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| Jan 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=155101700&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1MTAxNzAwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNzIxNzc5MywiZXhwIjoxNzM5ODA5NzkzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzY1MjAxIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.jc9M-ZCpJ9d9EHQjPFvS-fFV-vpz4Tr4-HxUjggItik&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=155101700&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1MTAxNzAwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzcyMTc3OTMsImV4cCI6MTczOTgwOTc5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.oiv091j76qb66MvagNRDntsVS2qELLNKbPc88_vd24A&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=155101700&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1MTAxNzAwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzcyMTc3OTMsImV4cCI6MTczOTgwOTc5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.oiv091j76qb66MvagNRDntsVS2qELLNKbPc88_vd24A)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvamZiZW50aXZlZ25hL3Avd2h5LWRpZC1vdXItY2hpbGRyZW4tbGVhdmUtY29ubmVjdGljdXQ_.W-Ik9JVL6bU0im18Eo209l3zS56ZcjQN-qp7riWJzpI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/why-did-our-children-leave-connecticut?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

January 18, 2025
Discussion among Connecticut seniors like me invariably drifts towards our children and grandchildren with a common theme - everyone must experience inconvenient travel for family reunions because our children have left the state.
Why?
Because the Democrats have destroyed our once job-creating economy with high taxes to finance the public sector with high wages, huge pensions and Cadillac health care coverage.
While Governor Ned Lamont likes to pose as a fiscal conservative, he allowed state employee wages to increase [by 33%](https://substack.com/redirect/1dd1a949-f633-4504-836e-bd5cb783ca0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), from $3.4 billion to $4.5 billion. As pension obligations increase with wages, the taxpayers' bill to fund these pensions ballooned by[ $9 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/1dd1a949-f633-4504-836e-bd5cb783ca0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), from $34 billion to $43 billion.
And since our legislature is now in session to craft a new biannual budget, the [fleecing of the taxpayers ](https://substack.com/redirect/fb91ce53-dd21-4c01-976d-4e5107c732ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)will continue.
After the state income tax passed in 1991, a 1993 referendum was held that placed [caps on government spending](https://substack.com/redirect/f04db8e6-818a-420a-a010-1b1e821b258b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It passed by 80%. Further fiscal ["guardrails"](https://substack.com/redirect/55e48df6-b77a-4cc5-bb98-8f320ac85cfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) were placed on spending in 2017.
But loopholes and bond issues enabled our political class to increase spending anyway. In 1990, the annual budget totaled $8 billion. By 2024, it was $24 billion. Yet, Connecticut's population barely grew and has actually decreased in the past five years. We lost one electoral vote in the 2000 census and will probably lose another one in 2030.
The state's deterioration is visible everywhere. Poverty is rife in our once-vibrant cities. Crime is out of control. Education has suffered, and one student is even suing the Hartford school system because [she was unable to read](https://substack.com/redirect/7ec401e5-091c-4c68-a74e-ef2813ab66a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) even though she graduated from high school!
Police enforcement of our traffic laws has diminished. Our leaders sat by while venture capitalists took over our hospitals and bankrupted them, while CEOs made [hundred-million-dollar salaries.](https://substack.com/redirect/bdc4f42e-3317-4855-8685-ea3c88d5547a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Health care is an overpriced disaster.
Energy costs are out of control because inefficient policies implemented to mollify the climate change lobby caused the Democrats to use our utilities as tax collection agencies ("public benefits charges").
The purpose of our state government has become to give fat salaries and pensions to useless bureaucrats and educrats while satisfying liberal activists with too much time on their hands.
Public services? Affordability? Forgettaboutit.
Administrators at UConn are raking in huge six-figure salaries.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/056cb974-a6d7-4662-a3ad-dc1c1a15eab6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And these people also get [lavish pensions](https://substack.com/redirect/189a8ea0-9583-4621-aba5-07cf4c08c15c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). More than forty UConn professors and administrators have pensions that exceed $150,000 annually. And these pensions have annual cost of living adjustments meaning they increase every year.
Yet the main demand of the liberals in this legislative session is "Tax the rich." But who are the rich? Is some doctor working eighty hours a week making $300,000 a year taking care of the sick rich? Is some lawyer working seventy hours a week making $400,000 a year fighting for his clients rich?
How do this doctor and lawyer pay for their retirement? They must save and invest into 401Ks.
But let's go back to the UConn administrator who makes the same salary and then retires at 60 with a $150,000 pension that increases every year according to the cost of living. And let's assume this averages 3% a year. By the time this administrator is 90 (quite common now a days, especially for women), the taxpayers of Connecticut will be on the hook to pay this person $375,000 a year! Not to mention funding this person's health insurance. Connecticut educrats do not enroll in Medicare Advantage plans.
Now let's return to our "rich" doctor and lawyer. How much money would these individuals have to save to retire at 60 with a similar pension from their savings? The answer is around $10,000,000. And that does not cover health insurance nor does this account for the vagaries of finance such as a stock market correction or high inflation.
So, who is really "rich" here? The answer is the retired Connecticut state employee with a six-figure pension that increases with inflation. Every two weeks, a fat check comes in the mail, and he never sees a significant health care bill.
To add insult to injury, these pensions are only 55% funded, up from 50%. The reason is that the fiscal guardrails forced tax revenue from stock market gains into the pension fund.
Yet Democratic leaders such as former Norwalk mayor Alex Knopp want to [eliminate these guardrails](https://substack.com/redirect/f36ac111-5981-4ed6-aeec-77d139fcd5fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) supposedly to help our poorer citizens.
But the Democrats are more interested in fleecing our poorer citizens with gambling and by encouraging marijuana use, all of which is taxed to fund these pensions.
The Connecticut Lotto preys on our less affluent citizens. There is even a new app, Jackpocket, that fleeces people with greater efficiency. The casinos are only taxed on slot machine revenue, the preferred gambling method of the poor. Legalized marijuana dispensaries have gravitated to poor neighborhoods and our Emergency Rooms are flooded with young people having psychotic breakdowns caused by marijuana products with 25% concentrations of THC. Recently legalized sports betting is causing a rash of credit card defaults, bankruptcy and domestic violence.
And what is [Senator Blumenthal's response?](https://substack.com/redirect/c2540fec-d05a-474a-bdf4-6e925013d828?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) To mandate changes in the algorithms of the software of the betting sites!
Connecticut has become a parody of responsible governance.
Why is this? Because the Democrats won the election. A coalition of liberal activists, government workers, pensioners and Trump-hating affluent white suburbanites combined to make Connecticut the only state in the country where the Democrats increased their margins in both the Assembly and State Senate.
So, we can all sit in traffic and suffer flight delays when we visit our children and grandchildren during the holidays. That's what we voted for. That's what we got.

Why? Because the Democrats have destroyed our once job-creating economy with high taxes to finance the public sector with high wages, huge pensions and Cadillac health care coverage. While Governor Ned Lamont likes to pose as a fiscal conservative, he allowed state employee wages to increase , from $3.4 billion to $4.5 billion. As pension obligations increase with wages, the taxpayers' bill to fund these pensions ballooned by, from $34 billion to $43 billion. And since our legislature is now in session to craft a new biannual budget, the continue. After the state income tax passed in 1991, a 1993 referendum was held that placed . It passed by 80%. Further fiscal were placed on spending in 2017. But loopholes and bond issues enabled our political class to increase spending anyway. In 1990, the annual budget totaled $8 billion. By 2024, it was $24 billion. Yet, Connecticut's population barely grew and has actually decreased in the past five years. We lost one electoral vote in the 2000 census and will probably lose another one in 2030. The state's deterioration is visible everywhere. Poverty is rife in our once-vibrant cities. Crime is out of control. Education has suffered, and one student is even suing the Hartford school system because even though she graduated from high school! Police enforcement of our traffic laws has diminished. Our leaders sat by while venture capitalists took over our hospitals and bankrupted them, while CEOs made Health care is an overpriced disaster. Energy costs are out of control because inefficient policies implemented to mollify the climate change lobby caused the Democrats to use our utilities as tax collection agencies ("public benefits charges"). The purpose of our state government has become to give fat salaries and pensions to useless bureaucrats and educrats while satisfying liberal activists with too much time on their hands. Public services? Affordability? Forgettaboutit. Administrators at UConn are raking in huge six-figure salaries. | | ---|---|--- And these people also get . More than forty UConn professors and administrators have pensions that exceed $150,000 annually. And these pensions have annual cost of living adjustments meaning they increase every year. Yet the main demand of the liberals in this legislative session is "Tax the rich." But who are the rich? Is some doctor working eighty hours a week making $300,000 a year taking care of the sick rich? Is some lawyer working seventy hours a week making $400,000 a year fighting for his clients rich? How do this doctor and lawyer pay for their retirement? They must save and invest into 401Ks. But let's go back to the UConn administrator who makes the same salary and then retires at 60 with a $150,000 pension that increases every year according to the cost of living. And let's assume this averages 3% a year. By the time this administrator is 90 (quite common now a days, especially for women), the taxpayers of Connecticut will be on the hook to pay this person $375,000 a year! Not to mention funding this person's health insurance. Connecticut educrats do not enroll in Medicare Advantage plans. Now let's return to our "rich" doctor and lawyer. How much money would these individuals have to save to retire at 60 with a similar pension from their savings? The answer is around $10,000,000. And that does not cover health insurance nor does this account for the vagaries of finance such as a stock market correction or high inflation. So, who is really "rich" here? The answer is the retired Connecticut state employee with a six-figure pension that increases with inflation. Every two weeks, a fat check comes in the mail, and he never sees a significant health care bill. To add insult to injury, these pensions are only 55% funded, up from 50%. The reason is that the fiscal guardrails forced tax revenue from stock market gains into the pension fund. Yet Democratic leaders such as former Norwalk mayor Alex Knopp want to supposedly to help our poorer citizens. But the Democrats are more interested in fleecing our poorer citizens with gambling and by encouraging marijuana use, all of which is taxed to fund these pensions. The Connecticut Lotto preys on our less affluent citizens. There is even a new app, Jackpocket, that fleeces people with greater efficiency. The casinos are only taxed on slot machine revenue, the preferred gambling method of the poor. Legalized marijuana dispensaries have gravitated to poor neighborhoods and our Emergency Rooms are flooded with young people having psychotic breakdowns caused by marijuana products with 25% concentrations of THC. Recently legalized sports betting is causing a rash of credit card defaults, bankruptcy and domestic violence. And what is To mandate changes in the algorithms of the software of the betting sites! Connecticut has become a parody of responsible governance. Why is this? Because the Democrats won the election. A coalition of liberal activists, government workers, pensioners and Trump-hating affluent white suburbanites combined to make Connecticut the only state in the country where the Democrats increased their margins in both the Assembly and State Senate. So, we can all sit in traffic and suffer flight delays when we visit our children and grandchildren during the holidays. That's what we voted for. That's what we got. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Joseph Bentivegna 541 Cromwell Avenue, Rocky Hill, CT 06067 ? ?

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Pete Hegseth hearing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2227%2E135344%2EW8aWEq)

Hello,
As you know, last week was just my second week in the Senate. There's no Spring Training or warmup period - you just jump right into serious work. And last week, I had my first of five cabinet confirmation hearings. First one up was Pete Hegseth, nominee for Secretary of Defense.
I wanted to talk to you a little bit about my approach to that hearing, and how it fits with how you'll see me focus my time and efforts in the Senate.
When something comes up, I am going to ask myself:
Is it tactical or strategic? Meaning, is it something short-term and for shock value but probably won't last -- or is it strategic and long-term? And then, is it reversible or irreversible? Will it cause damage that can’t be reversed with a new Administration?
So in our hearing, the questions I focused on were ones that were **strategic and irreversible** that Pete Hegseth could do as Secretary of Defense. Something like using the military inside the United States, in law enforcement roles, and in ways that make Americans afraid of their own military, that violates the Constitution or taints the military as the apolitical institution that we all want. As a Democratic Senator elected on the same ticket as President-elect Trump, I respect that Pete Hegseth and I will disagree on policy -- but there shouldn’t be any flexibility around respecting the Constitution.
[**Here is my line of questioning to Pete Hegseth. I hope you'll watch it to get a sense of how I'll approach my work going forward.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3586?t=2&akid=2227%2E135344%2EW8aWEq)
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3586?t=3&akid=2227%2E135344%2EW8aWEq)
This is just the first of these confirmation hearings. Later in the week, I questioned both the nominees for Secretary of Homeland Security and Director of the Office of Management and Budget. Still to come are nominees for the Secretary of Veterans Affairs and Secretary of Agriculture.
In each, I will continue to press nominees on the oaths they intend to swear to the Constitution – not to the President or their political party.
Thank you,
Elissa Slotkin
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan25.mLp_Iw&refcode=em250118-1&t=4&akid=2227%2E135344%2EW8aWEq)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your recurring contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $10 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3243?c0=ebs-em-jan25.ld21Cu&refcode=em250118-1&t=5&akid=2227%2E135344%2EW8aWEq)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan25.mLp_Iw&refcode=em250118-1&t=6&akid=2227%2E135344%2EW8aWEq)**
---
****

name: The Last BlackOut
subject: Is this THE REAL reason for the assassination attempt?
body:
All I can say is, thank God he survived...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19884/6374453/2c5f5085a3f88d6ec68218939360dba5ff305441/008e12f08148aa7d26f7ad053a6e7c7d39935eac)
---
| | |
---
_January 18th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
Dear Patriot, The assassination attempt against president Trump sent shockwaves through this country. All I can say is, thank God he survived. But if you’re like me, you’re wondering how this could have happened. Was it just incompetence? Or is there something more sinister going on? Can president Trump even _trust_ the Secret Service anymore? These are questions we may never get straight answers to. But one thing is for sure... The global elites CANNOT let Trump win. So the question is... Why? Why are they SO desperate to keep Trump out of the White House? And more importantly... the forces behind the assassination attempt... whoever they are... will they try again? **[Watch this video to find out...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19884/6374453/2c5f5085a3f88d6ec68218939360dba5ff305441/008e12f08148aa7d26f7ad053a6e7c7d39935eac)**

subject: Your signature needed (re: pardons for Jan. 6 insurrectionists)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100601637/523297681/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzUwZmZhNi1iZGQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jBA_PiyY8dsEovP5YrO5vInam4BSBl1-1ySUdn6Pvo=)
Friend,

On January 6, 2021, Donald Trump sent an armed mob to the United States Capitol in an attempt to overturn the election.

Over 170 police officers were injured, and multiple even lost their lives.

Most of those responsible for this deadly day have faced legal consequences for their actions, but now it looks like Trump may be pardoning his fellow insurrectionists:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100601638/523297682/308368532?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzUwZmZhNi1iZGQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jBA_PiyY8dsEovP5YrO5vInam4BSBl1-1ySUdn6Pvo=&emci=067bb589-79d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4750ffa6-bdd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=26828920) **Trump Again Hints at Jan. 6 Pardons, Including for Attacks on Police**
---

Trump has made it clear that he intends to reward those who attempted to dismantle our democracy and overturn the will of the American people.

We’re calling on 43614 grassroots Democrats to stand against this EXTREME attack on our democracy by adding their names to our urgent petition.

[**SIGNATURE NEEDED: sign your name if you agree that those convicted of crimes related to January 6 should not be pardoned.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100601639/523297683/308368532?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzUwZmZhNi1iZGQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jBA_PiyY8dsEovP5YrO5vInam4BSBl1-1ySUdn6Pvo=&emci=067bb589-79d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4750ffa6-bdd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=26828920)

Hey everyone,
If you’ve been hearing about something called the “Department of Government Efficiency” and have no idea what that is, stay tuned. We’re about to break it down for you.
**What exactly is the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)?**
After the election, Trump announced his plan to create a commission to advise the White House on how to “restructure” federal agencies and maximize government efficiency.
Headed by Elon Musk (ew) and Vivek Ramaswamy, DOGE would work outside of government to help cut government spending.
**If you’re thinking that doesn’t sound so bad, just wait. Here’s the scam:**
DOGE’s main priority will be widespread deregulation, corporate favoritism, and eliminating government accountability.
One of Musk’s plans to cut spending is to eliminate the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), which protects consumers from predatory financial practices. _Corporations view the CFPB as an obstacle to maximizing profits while ultimately harming the rest of us._ Getting rid of such a critical federal bureau would be a gift to big banks, shady loan companies, and Musk’s billionaire besties.
**_On top of that, critical programs like housing assistance, veterans’ healthcare, and education spending are on the chopping block thanks to DOGE._**
So what can we do?
[We’re calling on EVERYONE to add their name to our petition demanding that Congress oppose the creation of DOGE. subject: New era, same mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [unitethecountry
body:
Our work begins now — are you with us? | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100601928/523298630/1113648782?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2MDIzNzdlLWJkZDUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Nv92OCqRWBqUu7ZNUF6K-tV5eb4battjSa2UNwAM5bo=&emci=d3b60f2f-f5d4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=e602377e-bdd5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=16951753)
---
Peter, As we step into 2025, I want to quickly share where Unite the Country is headed, the challenges we face, and how we plan to rise to this moment. The truth is, we’re entering a new political era. With Donald Trump returning to the Oval Office, we’re looking at an administration already breaking promises before the ink on the inaugural invitations has dried. All of a sudden, lowering the cost of eggs will be “very hard” for our incoming president. The Panama Canal and Greenland are now a “national security interest.” And for everything from Obamacare to Social Security to reproductive freedom, the future hangs in the balance like never before. For the past five years, Unite the Country has been out on the front lines, working to elect Democrats across the country while championing the historic progress they’ve made. Together, we’ve raised and deployed over $100 million to promote Democratic values and run campaigns that have consistently outperformed expectations. **Now, with Donald Trump back in power, our mission is clear: hold this administration accountable for every broken promise, every failed policy, and every attempt to roll back the progress we’ve made.** We are ready to challenge his agenda and ensure the voices of the American people are heard — and we need you with us in this next phase. **That’s why in 2025, we’re embracing a bold and unrelenting mission:** **1\. Expose the truth:** We’ll expose Trump’s lies and corruption, and highlight the real impact of his Project 2025 policies on American families and communities. **2\. Listen and learn:** Through new research and outreach, we’ll work to understand how to strengthen the Democratic Party’s connection with voters ahead of the next election, laying the groundwork for a resounding Democratic victory at the ballot box. **3\. Lead the charge:** Unite the Country will stand at the forefront of holding Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable and ensuring that democratic values remain a priority for our nation. Look, we know the road ahead won’t be easy — Trump has vowed retribution and retaliation against anyone who dares speak out against him. But with your support, we’ll confront these challenges head-on, call out Trump’s failures, and ensure the promises made to the American people aren’t forgotten or ignored. **[If you’re reading this email, it’s because you’ve stood with us in the past and supported our vital work. Today, I’m asking you to chip in just $3 — one for each of our 2025 priorities — to help fuel our fight on the long road ahead. clean_body: Our work begins now — are you with us? | Peter, As we step into 2025, I want to quickly share where Unite the Country is headed, the challenges we face, and how we plan to rise to this moment. The truth is, we’re entering a new political era. With Donald Trump returning to the Oval Office, we’re looking at an administration already breaking promises before the ink on the inaugural invitations has dried. All of a sudden, lowering the cost of eggs will be “very hard” for our incoming president. The Panama Canal and Greenland are now a “national security interest.” And for everything from Obamacare to Social Security to reproductive freedom, the future hangs in the balance like never before. For the past five years, Unite the Country has been out on the front lines, working to elect Democrats across the country while championing the historic progress they’ve made. Together, we’ve raised and deployed over $100 million to promote Democratic values and run campaigns that have consistently outperformed expectations. Now, with Donald Trump back in power, our mission is clear: hold this administration accountable for every broken promise, every failed policy, and every attempt to roll back the progress we’ve made. We are ready to challenge his agenda and ensure the voices of the American people are heard — and we need you with us in this next phase. That’s why in 2025, we’re embracing a bold and unrelenting mission: 1\. Expose the truth: We’ll expose Trump’s lies and corruption, and highlight the real impact of his Project 2025 policies on American families and communities. 2\. Listen and learn: Through new research and outreach, we’ll work to understand how to strengthen the Democratic Party’s connection with voters ahead of the next election, laying the groundwork for a resounding Democratic victory at the ballot box. 3\. Lead the charge: Unite the Country will stand at the forefront of holding Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable and ensuring that democratic values remain a priority for our nation. Look, we know the road ahead won’t be easy — Trump has vowed retribution and retaliation against anyone who dares speak out against him. But with your support, we’ll confront these challenges head-on, call out Trump’s failures, and ensure the promises made to the American people aren’t forgotten or ignored. = = = From all of us at Unite the Country: Thank you, Peter. Together, we’ll hold Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable in this new era and continue fighting for the future we all deserve. With gratitude, Steve Schale CEO, Unite the Country | Unite the Country is fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable, expose his broken promises, and protect the progress we’ve made over the past four years — but we can’t do it without you! At this critical moment in American history, we’re calling on every Democrat to join Unite the Country in this fight. = | = = Follow along: Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. ---
Peter,
---
From the bottom of my heart... _THANK YOU_.
---
Thanks to the generosity of Americans like you who contributed to my Legal Defense Trust, I have great news to share with you.
---
I have reached a resolution of the litigation with the Plaintiffs that will result in a satisfaction of the Plaintiffs’ judgment.
---
__This resolution does not involve an admission of liability or wrongdoing by any of the Parties. I am satisfied with and have no grievances relating to the result we have reached.__
---
**I have been able to retain my New York co-op and Florida Condominium and all of my personal belongings. No one deserves to be subjected to threats, harassment, or intimidation.**
---
This litigation has taken its toll on all parties. This whole episode was unfortunate.
---
I and the Plaintiffs have agreed not to ever talk about each other in any defamatory manner, and I urge others to do the same.
---
Make no mistake: I could not have done this without the contributions you made to my Legal Defense Trust. Your support served as a reminder that America is home to the most generous souls on the planet.
---
_While this case has been settled, I still have outstanding legal expenses and one remaining case in Arizona set to go to trial in 2026._
---
But with you by my side, I am confident we will win.
---

clean_body: Thanks to your support, I’ve saved my home. | Peter, From the bottom of my heart... THANK YOU. Thanks to the generosity of Americans like you who contributed to my Legal Defense Trust, I have great news to share with you. I have reached a resolution of the litigation with the Plaintiffs that will result in a satisfaction of the Plaintiffs’ judgment. This resolution does not involve an admission of liability or wrongdoing by any of the Parties. I am satisfied with and have no grievances relating to the result we have reached. I have been able to retain my New York co-op and Florida Condominium and all of my personal belongings. No one deserves to be subjected to threats, harassment, or intimidation. This litigation has taken its toll on all parties. This whole episode was unfortunate. I and the Plaintiffs have agreed not to ever talk about each other in any defamatory manner, and I urge others to do the same. Make no mistake: I could not have done this without the contributions you made to my Legal Defense Trust. Your support served as a reminder that America is home to the most generous souls on the planet. While this case has been settled, I still have outstanding legal expenses and one remaining case in Arizona set to go to trial in 2026. But with you by my side, I am confident we will win. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

name: A.G. Holder
subject: Peter: Key state-level fights we’re watching
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Read this update to stay in the know →
|
---

Hi Peter,
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: **There is no “off year” in the fight for fair electoral maps.**
With the consequential 2024 presidential election in our rearview, 2025 is a crucial year to put in the work that will advance the fight for our democracy in 2026, 2028, and beyond.
**In fact, we’ve already got our eyes on a handful of key advocacy efforts coming up this year in multiple states across the country.** Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, is currently litigating in five states to dismantle illegal gerrymanders and protect fair maps. Meanwhile, we’re preparing to stop potential efforts by Republicans to steal more congressional seats through extreme gerrymandering — including in Ohio, where new congressional maps will be drawn this year. And we must stay ready to protect the 2030 Census from efforts to tamper with it, to ensure an accurate count and fair representation.
**There’s plenty of work lying ahead — and I know that with your help, we’ll be able to do whatever it takes in 2025 to ensure fair electoral maps for years to come.[Chip in now to fund our work to stop gerrymandering and defend fair elections.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100602848/523301027/358328389?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGAhead_email_20250118-AOTL-Tier1-AGAhead_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250118-AOTL-Tier1-AGAhead_&utm_campaign=AGAhead&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2NTBmZmE2LWJkZDUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QJ6S2trvyo7oquRM1-1qe1sg0G5RfOkxIqfsxNkTFf4=)**

Here are some of the key fights we’re eyeing this year — including court cases that our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), is actively involved in that _**could affect the makeup of up to eight or even nine districts**_ and where we must make sure voters are fairly represented:
* **In Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana,** plaintiffs supported by the NRF will be fighting to protect Black opportunity districts that came about as a result of our landmark victory before the U.S. Supreme Court in _Allen v. Milligan_.
* **In Texas,** the NRF continues to support a case involving Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, challenging the state’s congressional and legislative maps.
* **In Florida,** we are awaiting a decision from the state supreme court that could restore a Black opportunity district in Jacksonville.

In addition to our affiliate, NRF’s, court cases, we are gearing up for new maps in key states, including:
* **In Ohio,** we’re gearing up for a new congressional map to be drawn this year — the latest step in a years-long battle for fair maps in the state that has seen far-right partisans continue to mislead Ohioans about the redistricting process and manipulate maps despite the redistricting reforms passed by voters in 2015 and 2018.
* **And in New Hampshire,** with a Republican majority in the state legislature, we need to be vigilant about any attempts to alter the maps and steal more congressional seats — like Republicans did in North Carolina.

**We must stay ready to mobilize against power grabs in these states and across the country.** The work we put in during the weeks and months ahead could make a massive difference in fair representation. We must not wait, we must not waver — the stakes are simply too high.
[**Please, Peter, make a contribution to power the movement for fair maps throughout 2025 and the years ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100602855/523301034/358328389?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGAhead_email_20250118-AOTL-Tier1-AGAhead_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250118-AOTL-Tier1-AGAhead_&utm_campaign=AGAhead&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2NTBmZmE2LWJkZDUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QJ6S2trvyo7oquRM1-1qe1sg0G5RfOkxIqfsxNkTFf4=)
Thanks for everything you do. We’ll be in touch soon with further updates about these state-level battles and many more.
Sincerely,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

subject: Justice Allison Riggs
body:
Directly support Justice Riggs today |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100602919/523301388/126959580?refcode=WUEFH142_20250118_RiggsSplit_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055617&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDYwMDc4Ni1iZWQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I3x1p4O0i9HxlFt-0OklPnbqXWRCE2km_eRa7lxmDh8=) I'll get right to it, Peter. If you haven't heard the news out of North Carolina, an anti-choice extremist running for the state Supreme Court is denying his electoral loss by asking the state to throw out more than 60,000 ballots. Not one _,_ but _two recounts_ have confirmed that pro-choice champion **Justice Allison Riggs** won this race.

Among the 60,000 ballots being challenged are ballots from Republican and Democrat elected officials, service members, _and even Justice Riggs' parents_.

There are currently five lawsuits tied up in court about this blatantly anti-democratic attempt by North Carolina conservatives to overturn a free and fair election. Justice Riggs' campaign needs urgent help to keep fighting these legal challenges. **[Will you split a donation between Justice Allison Riggs and EMILYs List today, so we can help secure this and other victories for pro-choice champions nationwide?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100602920/523301389/126959580?refcode=WUEFH142_20250118_RiggsSplit_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055617&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDYwMDc4Ni1iZWQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I3x1p4O0i9HxlFt-0OklPnbqXWRCE2km_eRa7lxmDh8=)** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100602921/523301390/126959580?refcode=WUEFH142_20250118_RiggsSplit_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055617&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDYwMDc4Ni1iZWQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I3x1p4O0i9HxlFt-0OklPnbqXWRCE2km_eRa7lxmDh8=)

Recounts are a normal part of the electoral process that allows for transparency and promotes public confidence in our electoral systems. Throwing out ballots a candidate doesn't want counted is not.

We won't stand for anti-democracy extremists trying to seize office by circumventing the will of the people. North Carolinians voted to elect a pro-choice leader to the state's highest court. Our job is to make sure that leader has the resources to win in court, too.

clean_body: Directly support Justice Riggs today | = I'll get right to it, Peter. If you haven't heard the news out of North Carolina, an anti-choice extremist running for the state Supreme Court is denying his electoral loss by asking the state to throw out more than 60,000 ballots. Not one , but two recounts have confirmed that pro-choice champion Justice Allison Riggs won this race. Among the 60,000 ballots being challenged are ballots from Republican and Democrat elected officials, service members, and even Justice Riggs' parents. There are currently five lawsuits tied up in court about this blatantly anti-democratic attempt by North Carolina conservatives to overturn a free and fair election. Justice Riggs' campaign needs urgent help to keep fighting these legal challenges. = | = Recounts are a normal part of the electoral process that allows for transparency and promotes public confidence in our electoral systems. Throwing out ballots a candidate doesn't want counted is not. We won't stand for anti-democracy extremists trying to seize office by circumventing the will of the people. North Carolinians voted to elect a pro-choice leader to the state's highest court. Patriot,
---
From the bottom of my heart... _THANK YOU_.
---
Thanks to the generosity of Americans like you who contributed to my Legal Defense Trust, I have great news to share with you.
---
I have reached a resolution of the litigation with the Plaintiffs that will result in a satisfaction of the Plaintiffs’ judgment.
---
__This resolution does not involve an admission of liability or wrongdoing by any of the Parties. I am satisfied with and have no grievances relating to the result we have reached.__
---
**I have been able to retain my New York co-op and Florida Condominium and all of my personal belongings. No one deserves to be subjected to threats, harassment, or intimidation.**
---
This litigation has taken its toll on all parties. This whole episode was unfortunate.
---
I and the Plaintiffs have agreed not to ever talk about each other in any defamatory manner, and I urge others to do the same.
---
Make no mistake: I could not have done this without the contributions you made to my Legal Defense Trust. Your support served as a reminder that America is home to the most generous souls on the planet.
---
_While this case has been settled, I still have outstanding legal expenses and one remaining case in Arizona set to go to trial in 2026._
---
But with you by my side, I am confident we will win.
---

clean_body: Thanks to your support, I’ve saved my home. Thanks to your support, I’ve saved my home. | Patriot, From the bottom of my heart... THANK YOU. Thanks to the generosity of Americans like you who contributed to my Legal Defense Trust, I have great news to share with you. I have reached a resolution of the litigation with the Plaintiffs that will result in a satisfaction of the Plaintiffs’ judgment. This resolution does not involve an admission of liability or wrongdoing by any of the Parties. I am satisfied with and have no grievances relating to the result we have reached. I have been able to retain my New York co-op and Florida Condominium and all of my personal belongings. No one deserves to be subjected to threats, harassment, or intimidation. This litigation has taken its toll on all parties. This whole episode was unfortunate. I and the Plaintiffs have agreed not to ever talk about each other in any defamatory manner, and I urge others to do the same. Make no mistake: I could not have done this without the contributions you made to my Legal Defense Trust. Your support served as a reminder that America is home to the most generous souls on the planet. While this case has been settled, I still have outstanding legal expenses and one remaining case in Arizona set to go to trial in 2026. But with you by my side, I am confident we will win. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Team Tina
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek**
body:
|
---
Peter, we just wanted to bump Tina’s message in your inbox. Her latest budget and plan for Oregon reflect the priorities we hold dear: affordable housing, accessible healthcare, high-quality education, and protecting our values and personal freedoms. This vision is our pathway to success, but we need strong, grassroots support statewide in order to get this done. [_**Will you add your name right now to support our budget priorities and pass our legislative priorities to make real progress for everyday Oregonians?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100603867/523304267/1558463657?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGZiYTgxYy1jMmQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Fy3glKUq929pp00fbdFe_x53ceCMYX5250g7OtB8dk=&emci=c44401c1-38d4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6dfba81c-c2d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=15353729) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100603868/523304268/1558463657?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGZiYTgxYy1jMmQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Fy3glKUq929pp00fbdFe_x53ceCMYX5250g7OtB8dk=&emci=c44401c1-38d4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6dfba81c-c2d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=15353729)

Thanks for all you do,
Team Tina
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tina Kotek <info@tinafororegon.com>
Date: Thu, Jan 16, 2025
Subject: Dedication, strategy, stubborn focus

Hey there, Peter,
This week I outlined my vision and priorities in my annual State of the State speech. My focus is clear and unwavering — it’s all about making real strides on issues that matter most to Oregonians.
You know me, I don’t shy away from our biggest challenges. I’m always in for the long haul to drive results for our whole state. These issues don’t have quick fixes. They need dedication, strategy, and stubborn focus.
As we look ahead, I’m laser-focused on getting closer to an Oregon where:
🏡No one has to live in a tent on a sidewalk. This means addressing the housing and homelessness crises head-on and tackling these challenges with everything we’ve got.
🧑⚕️Everyone can find and afford the health care they need. We must ramp up our mental health and substance abuse treatment capacity, ensuring trained professionals are ready and available to address behavioral health needs.
📚 Every child has a safe place to receive a high-quality public education. We need to build on our work in education and make sure every kid in Oregon has what they need to shine.
🏛️ We stand up for our values. Protecting reproductive rights, the environment, immigrants, and civil rights is simply non-negotiable.
[_**That’s the roadmap — and we need focused effort and teamwork to get this done. I'm so proud to have you in this fight with me. Can I count on you to lend your support for this vision? Add your name today!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100603869/523304269/1558463657?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGZiYTgxYy1jMmQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Fy3glKUq929pp00fbdFe_x53ceCMYX5250g7OtB8dk=&emci=c44401c1-38d4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6dfba81c-c2d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=15353729)
[I'M IN!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100603870/523304270/1558463657?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGZiYTgxYy1jMmQ1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Fy3glKUq929pp00fbdFe_x53ceCMYX5250g7OtB8dk=&emci=c44401c1-38d4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6dfba81c-c2d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=15353729)

We’re looking forward to receiving your responses.

clean_body: | Peter, we just wanted to bump Tina’s message in your inbox. Her latest budget and plan for Oregon reflect the priorities we hold dear: affordable housing, accessible healthcare, high-quality education, and protecting our values and personal freedoms. This vision is our pathway to success, but we need strong, grassroots support statewide in order to get this done. | Thanks for all you do, Team Tina \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Tina Kotek <info@tinafororegon.com> Date: Thu, Jan 16, 2025 Subject: Dedication, strategy, stubborn focus Hey there, Peter, This week I outlined my vision and priorities in my annual State of the State speech. My focus is clear and unwavering — it’s all about making real strides on issues that matter most to Oregonians. You know me, I don’t shy away from our biggest challenges. I’m always in for the long haul to drive results for our whole state. These issues don’t have quick fixes. They need dedication, strategy, and stubborn focus. As we look ahead, I’m laser-focused on getting closer to an Oregon where: 🏡No one has to live in a tent on a sidewalk. This means addressing the housing and homelessness crises head-on and tackling these challenges with everything we’ve got. 🧑⚕️Everyone can find and afford the health care they need. We must ramp up our mental health and substance abuse treatment capacity, ensuring trained professionals are ready and available to address behavioral health needs. 📚 Every child has a safe place to receive a high-quality public education. We need to build on our work in education and make sure every kid in Oregon has what they need to shine. 🏛️ We stand up for our values. Protecting reproductive rights, the environment, immigrants, and civil rights is simply non-negotiable. We’re looking forward to receiving your responses. Thanks for taking the time! — Team Tina | Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. Can you chip in any amount now to support her work? | = Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=bI3jTS4MyOqV9KDiRlR8XC5JvStYMYH62YvEvOy08SSJOAuip%2BLZsn5YAIZixvURCsvW%2FGpLKSApLR2azGzJh9Ms98lkKPt9aylncYvYOmSxnwlhkk3v5E%2B5S%2FkOklInDBXCzC%2BTCZXJuDqOkGMoKABw38qKw7in6rMTo0kVtUMP4AZRaJKXcKu0wyBYp13rzG0Rmn5rJtJadaYBV8A8dPPNbgl18wNjXVV2V%2FTgmuZCGIKZaT3BboQ8Z2vBEK%2BI59sQGIOJRkkxFJEQmAD6nXnrfiukjSaGWl%2FbXFvjqsXQzFOwT2HIQXUrLk8Sy%2FCyrgCBxGAHoOtYzc1Aut7J30OEOcFqjXqorVUA8QfVVvAKCiuhilqUQftVrpdBgEolv7IixOahKLSyurx9rGewH3euLRDBcqrn2tb6Yr%2FlsgPTYHzlLSBF91RdqPNznFiO]

# [#]
In just two days, Donald Trump will officially become the 47th President of the United States.

Be it his threats to cut social security or privatize the postal service, we’re building up our resources now to be a strong wall against his MAGA agenda and fuel our voter outreach efforts like never before to grow our ground-level support.

The best way we can prepare for the challenges that lie ahead sits with you.

By making a recurring monthly contribution, be it $5 or even $25, you’re allowing us to create our budgets with confidence and invest in on-the-ground voter efforts early.

If 50 of my top supporters step up with a recurring contribution of $ or more, we’ll have a solid foundation to deal with the challenges to come. Will you maximize your impact by making a monthly donation to our cause today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-jan25?amount=]

MAKE A RECURRING DONATION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-jan25?amount=]

DONATE JUST TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-jan25?amount=]

— Dr. Raul Ruiz
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

body:
This move will reshape the entire internet.

There’s no sugarcoating it, Peter.
**Mark Zuckerberg has just handed Meta to the far right.** Meta will now eliminate fact-checking and allow political misinformation to run rampant on its platforms.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250118-1?refcode=em20250118-1649&amount=5&refcode2=1649_587540_3HI_ni&akid=1649%2E587540%2E3HI_ni)
That’s right – the same people trying to ban books, roll back LGBTQ+ rights, and control women’s bodies now have even more influence over how information flows in our democracy.
For years now, Trump and the far right have accused Meta, the trillion-dollar company that runs Facebook and Instagram of unconstitutional censorship, due to their efforts to curb hate speech and disinformation on their platforms. And now, it seems that Zuckerberg has folded – just days before Trump’s inauguration.
We can do better. Together, we can elect young, progressive leaders who are in touch, mobilize to support policies that move us forward, and ensure that these leaders have the resources they need to take on the establishment.

**Stand for Truth — Stand with COURIER**
Trump takes office Monday, and Big Tech and corporate media are already falling in line.
[**We need your help to fight back. Help us hit our $50,000 goal to fund fearless, factual reporting that holds the far-right accountable.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100604282/523305562/-1581427288?refcode=20250118-EM-Inauguration1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjgzZGM2ODYtYzNkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qA_n85ZhN8LQ0E_XneO6S9mckEW9v30nQbTSQ3KTQlo=) **[Chip in $25 Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100604283/523305563/-1581427288?refcode=20250116-Meta_LGBTQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjgzZGM2ODYtYzNkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qA_n85ZhN8LQ0E_XneO6S9mckEW9v30nQbTSQ3KTQlo=)**
---
Peter,
Here is the latest chilling signal that corporate media and Big Tech are ready to fall in line behind Trump and the far right.
According to news reports, Mark Zuckerberg, Jeff Bezos, and Elon Musk—three of the wealthiest and most powerful men in the world—will have front-row seats at Monday’s inauguration.
These men control the platforms that dominate how Americans get their news—and their actions show their loyalties lie with power and profit, not the truth.
Here’s what we mean:
* **Mark Zuckerberg** gave Meta a MAGA makeover, dismantling protections against hate speech and catering to Trump and the far right.
* During the election, **Jeff Bezos** killed _The Washington Post_ ’s endorsement of Kamala Harris. Now, his company is vying for billions in Trump administration contracts.
* **Elon Musk** funneled $250 million into Trump’s campaign and now oversees a government agency that could shape federal spending.

**Peter, COURIER exists to do what these billionaires won’t: tell the truth, hold power accountable, and fight back against the far-right’s agenda.**
While platforms like Facebook and X cave to far-right pressure, our 11 local newsrooms are delivering factual, fearless journalism directly on the platforms where disinformation spreads. But we don’t have their billions.
**That’s why we’ve set an urgent goal to raise $50,000 by the end of January to fund our work in this critical moment.**
[**Can you chip in $25 today to help us counter their influence and defend the truth?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100604284/523305564/-1581427288?refcode=20250118-EM-Inauguration1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjgzZGM2ODYtYzNkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qA_n85ZhN8LQ0E_XneO6S9mckEW9v30nQbTSQ3KTQlo=)
**[Chip in $25 now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100604285/523305565/-1581427288?refcode=20250118-EM-Inauguration1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjgzZGM2ODYtYzNkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qA_n85ZhN8LQ0E_XneO6S9mckEW9v30nQbTSQ3KTQlo=)**
Your support makes it possible to reach voters with the truth when it matters most—especially as others remain too scared or compromised to act.
Thank you for standing with us in the fight for democracy.
In solidarity,
The COURIER Team

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Hegseth isn’t up to the job. Period.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Several direct and damaging lines of inquiry from Democrats — especially those from VoteVets members — tell you all you need to know.
#
Peter, nothing we saw at his confirmation hearing should convince anyone that Pete Hegseth is the right person to lead the Department of Defense.
The softball questions Hegseth got from his buddies on the Republican side show us that they’re likely to railroad him through. But several direct and damaging lines of inquiry from Democrats — especially those from VoteVets members — tell you all you need to know.
Take Senator Duckworth, for example. Tammy Duckworth flew Black Hawks with the National Guard in Iraq. She lost both of her legs after she was shot down in combat. Today, she drilled into Hegseth for his opposition to women serving in combat roles. She challenged him to identify at least one international security agreement, and how many nations were members of ASEAN — just a small part of his potential portfolio as SECDEF.
**Hegseth could not do it.**
Or Senator Slotkin. Elissa Slotkin served three tours in Iraq with the CIA before serving in the State Department and Department of Defense. She pressed Hegseth on his commitment to the Constitution — and whether he would be willing to defy Trump should he issue any unlawful orders.
**Hegseth dodged.**
In an interview, Senator Mark Kelly, who flew 39 combat missions as a Naval Aviator in the Gulf War, put it best: “No job is more important to our national security than Secretary of Defense. Nothing I’ve seen about Pete Hegseth’s record indicates he’s qualified.”
It matters having the right people in the right jobs. We are all better off because Senators Duckworth, Slotkin, and Kelly serve in the U.S. Senate. **Pete Hegseth is in no way ready to serve as Secretary of Defense.** If he is confirmed it is not just our Troops that will be in harm’s way — every American will be less safe.
We’re going to do everything we can to prevent it, but the odds are against us. We need you with us.

clean_body: Several direct and damaging lines of inquiry from Democrats — especially those from VoteVets members — tell you all you need to know. Peter, nothing we saw at his confirmation hearing should convince anyone that Pete Hegseth is the right person to lead the Department of Defense. The softball questions Hegseth got from his buddies on the Republican side show us that they’re likely to railroad him through. But several direct and damaging lines of inquiry from Democrats — especially those from VoteVets members — tell you all you need to know. Take Senator Duckworth, for example. Tammy Duckworth flew Black Hawks with the National Guard in Iraq. She lost both of her legs after she was shot down in combat. Today, she drilled into Hegseth for his opposition to women serving in combat roles. She challenged him to identify at least one international security agreement, and how many nations were members of ASEAN — just a small part of his potential portfolio as SECDEF. Hegseth could not do it. Or Senator Slotkin. Elissa Slotkin served three tours in Iraq with the CIA before serving in the State Department and Department of Defense. She pressed Hegseth on his commitment to the Constitution — and whether he would be willing to defy Trump should he issue any unlawful orders. Hegseth dodged. In an interview, Senator Mark Kelly, who flew 39 combat missions as a Naval Aviator in the Gulf War, put it best: “No job is more important to our national security than Secretary of Defense. Nothing I’ve seen about Pete Hegseth’s record indicates he’s qualified.” It matters having the right people in the right jobs. We are all better off because Senators Duckworth, Slotkin, and Kelly serve in the U.S. Senate. Pete Hegseth is in no way ready to serve as Secretary of Defense. If he is confirmed it is not just our Troops that will be in harm’s way — every American will be less safe. We’re going to do everything we can to prevent it, but the odds are against us. We need you with us. body:
When 1 in 6 Marylanders lack access to affordable internet, we must do what we can to close the gap. This is a good sign of progress, but there is work ahead of us.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100605162/523309283/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNThhMTcxMGEtYzZkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3TGYfvEpCimlFv_pWb-vVEhOOha2s7YMl4SIRvmPxIU=)
---
| Peter,

This week, Governor Wes Moore signed an executive order expanding broadband infrastructure across the state of Maryland. This is a long-awaited bipartisan effort that will drive access to critical infrastructure in education and affordable healthcare and create good-paying jobs.

I’ve spent a part of my career advocating for rural communities across the country, including expanding broadband access. When 1 in 6 Marylanders lack access to affordable internet, we must do what we can to close the gap. This is a good sign of progress, but there is work ahead of us.

[_**In Congress, I remain committed to working with local, state, and federal stakeholders to create an economy that works for everyone. I hope I can count on your support as we work together to drive common sense, common ground solutions.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100605168/523309291/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNThhMTcxMGEtYzZkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3TGYfvEpCimlFv_pWb-vVEhOOha2s7YMl4SIRvmPxIU=)

name: Progressive Virginians for Alex Bastani
subject: Join the Fight for a Fairer Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Virginians for Alex BastaniP
body:
Together, we can rewrite the rules to work for the people, not the powerful, and build a Virginia where everyone has a fair shot.

| | | | |
---
| | | | | My friends,
I’m writing to you today with a simple message: **I’m running for the Democratic Nomination for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia** , and I need you with me in this fight. Together, we can rewrite the rules **to work for the people, not the powerful** , and build a Virginia where everyone has a fair shot.
Let me tell you why I’m running. I’m not a politician, and I’m not here to do the bidding of corporate donors. In fact, I refuse to take their money. For over 30 years, **I’ve fought for working families as a** **union leader, attorney, and advocate**. I’ve seen how the system is rigged against everyday Virginians, the ones who play by the rules but can’t seem to get ahead. I’ve stood on picket lines, battled corporate greed, and worked to level the playing field for those who need it most.
Now, I’m stepping up to take this fight to Richmond. I’m running to bring **universal healthcare** **to Virginia** so no one has to choose between seeing a doctor and paying the rent. I’m running to **raise the minimum wage to $20** an hour because full-time work should mean more than barely scraping by, we need to cancel the term 'working poor'. I’m running to **repeal the so-called “Right to Work”** law, which has silenced workers for far too long, and to deliver real student debt relief for every Virginian, whether you went to college, trade school, or an apprenticeship.
But here’s the thing, I can’t do this alone.This campaign isn’t powered by corporate PACs or backroom deals; it’s powered by people like you. People who believe in fairness, justice, and a government that works for all of us.
**Will you join me in this fight?** Please sign up to get friends and family to sign my petition to get on the ballot!. [**Join our petition team by clicking HERE.**](https://progressivevirginiansforalexbastani.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5f516fc098ca6ecf04d23d982&id=b5ff74ee87&e=8587d34f43)
This is our moment to push back against business as usual. Let’s get to work.
---
[Help Fund the Change](https://progressivevirginiansforalexbastani.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5f516fc098ca6ecf04d23d982&id=394d87960b&e=8587d34f43)
| | | | | With gratitude and determination,
Alex Bastani
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia

---
| | | | | [](https://progressivevirginiansforalexbastani.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5f516fc098ca6ecf04d23d982&id=836e9f52f8&e=8587d34f43)

name: Josh Harder
subject: I’m so excited about this!
body:
Let me explain.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100605971/523311728/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ3MGU5YmMtYzZkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1n9c11g-6_z4HOcuXeTHS5xeQRVe1q0DHgAmzUCcI4=) | Hi Peter, Did you see this email from my team? **We’re launching a new _Founding Donor Club_ to fuel our campaign to victory this cycle - and I’m super excited about it!** This is by far the best way to help Democrats like me hold our toss-up seats. When we have early and consistent monthly support, we can build our budgets and start our important organizing earlier than ever. The truth is, we’d rather have 100 supporters who can give a small monthly gift of $5 than when we see a rush of help at the very end of the campaign. Winning campaigns start organizing early and don’t stop. Plus - I don’t want to spam your inbox for donations. This new donor club will allow me to fund our campaign without taking corporate PAC money or constantly asking for your support - and I promise I will only send you the most important updates moving forward! **[But in order for this to be successful, I need your help. Will you please join my new Founding Donors Club by making a small, recurring donation of $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100605972/523311729/2678108?&recurring=auto&refcode=E12000-20250118-RecurringDonors2-SL-CampaignFinance&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ3MGU5YmMtYzZkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1n9c11g-6_z4HOcuXeTHS5xeQRVe1q0DHgAmzUCcI4=)** Together, I know we can do this - we have to hold this seat! Thank you for your generosity and support, \- Josh
**—FORWARD MESSAGE—** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100605973/523311730/-1860252395?refcode=E12000-20250118-RecurringDonors2-header-CampaignFinance&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ3MGU5YmMtYzZkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1n9c11g-6_z4HOcuXeTHS5xeQRVe1q0DHgAmzUCcI4=) Peter, Here’s the deal — our district is one of the most competitive in the country. We flipped 15 points redder! And unlike other campaigns that rely on corporate PAC money, we rely on grassroots supporters like you to fund our campaign. **Now that Josh represents a Trump district, we know the GOP is going to pour millions of dollars into our race - more than they ever have before! So we need early and consistent support from our grassroots team to fight back.** That’s why we’re excited to announce Josh’s new _Founding Donor Club_ \- a group of early supporters committed to helping Josh defend this seat! We need to start the hard work of winning votes ASAP, and your early and recurring donations will help us make that a reality. This is the BEST way to support Democrats like Josh right now. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100605974/523311731/2678108?&recurring=auto&refcode=E12000-20250118-RecurringDonors2-SL-CampaignFinance&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ3MGU5YmMtYzZkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1n9c11g-6_z4HOcuXeTHS5xeQRVe1q0DHgAmzUCcI4=)** [JOIN THE CLUB »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100605975/523311732/2678108?&recurring=auto&refcode=E12000-20250118-RecurringDonors2-SB-CampaignFinance&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ3MGU5YmMtYzZkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1n9c11g-6_z4HOcuXeTHS5xeQRVe1q0DHgAmzUCcI4=) Josh may not have millions of dollars from corporate PACs and special interests, but he does have this incredible team of grassroots donors who chip in $5 or $10 at a time to help him defy the odds time and time again. **With our race now one of the most competitive in the entire country, we’re not backing down. Instead, we’re getting more energized and more organized.** Josh’s new _Founding Donor Club_ is going to be essential to our success and fuel our campaign every step of the way. But we need supporters like you who are willing to be a part of our grassroots movement. **[So instead of emailing you a million times asking for support, we’re just asking you to do your part now by chipping in a few bucks a month - and we’ll make sure you only get the most important updates from our campaign!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100605976/523311733/2678108?&recurring=auto&refcode=E12000-20250118-RecurringDonors2-SL-CampaignFinance&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ3MGU5YmMtYzZkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1n9c11g-6_z4HOcuXeTHS5xeQRVe1q0DHgAmzUCcI4=)** So what do you say? Can we count on you to join our _Founding Donor Club_ today? Thank you for being a part of this! \- Team Harder
---

clean_body: Let me explain. | = | Hi Peter, Did you see this email from my team? We’re launching a new Founding Donor Club to fuel our campaign to victory this cycle - and I’m super excited about it! This is by far the best way to help Democrats like me hold our toss-up seats. When we have early and consistent monthly support, we can build our budgets and start our important organizing earlier than ever. The truth is, we’d rather have 100 supporters who can give a small monthly gift of $5 than when we see a rush of help at the very end of the campaign. Winning campaigns start organizing early and don’t stop. Plus - I don’t want to spam your inbox for donations. This new donor club will allow me to fund our campaign without taking corporate PAC money or constantly asking for your support - and I promise I will only send you the most important updates moving forward! = Together, I know we can do this - we have to hold this seat! Thank you for your generosity and support, \- Josh —FORWARD MESSAGE— = Peter, Here’s the deal — our district is one of the most competitive in the country. We flipped 15 points redder! And unlike other campaigns that rely on corporate PAC money, we rely on grassroots supporters like you to fund our campaign. Now that Josh represents a Trump district, we know the GOP is going to pour millions of dollars into our race - more than they ever have before! So we need early and consistent support from our grassroots team to fight back. That’s why we’re excited to announce Josh’s new Founding Donor Club \- a group of early supporters committed to helping Josh defend this seat! We need to start the hard work of winning votes ASAP, and your early and recurring donations will help us make that a reality. This is the BEST way to support Democrats like Josh right now. = = Josh may not have millions of dollars from corporate PACs and special interests, but he does have this incredible team of grassroots donors who chip in $5 or $10 at a time to help him defy the odds time and time again. With our race now one of the most competitive in the entire country, we’re not backing down. Instead, we’re getting more energized and more organized. Josh’s new Founding Donor Club is going to be essential to our success and fuel our campaign every step of the way. But we need supporters like you who are willing to be a part of our grassroots movement. = So what do you say? Can we count on you to join our Founding Donor Club today? Thank you for being a part of this! \- Team Harder *

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: [Response Needed] Before the inauguration on Monday:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Take just a couple minutes of your time today and fill our pre-inauguration survey
#
Friend — With Trump’s inauguration less than 48 hours away, we want to check in with our supporters and gauge your priorities.
[**Head to our pre-inauguration survey here and let us know how you’re feeling at this important time for our nation >>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/inauguration_2025_survey/?source=em250118-1-150&akid=5456%2E196590%2E8UEGCJ)
[TELL US WHAT YOU THINK](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/inauguration_2025_survey/?source=em250118-1-150&akid=5456%2E196590%2E8UEGCJ)
We know there will be many challenges in the years ahead
From immigration, to the cost of living, to abortion rights and much more, the issues we care about are about to come front and center as Donald Trump takes power and attempts a right-wing transformation of America.
And that’s not to mention the continued threats to our democracy that the MAGA extremists have made — limiting ballot access, purging the federal government, and attacking our most basic constitutional rights to name a few.
We’re going to have to work together, as a movement, to fight back and lay the groundwork for a progressive political comeback. And in order to do that, we need to know where our grassroots supporters stand and what we can do together in the coming days and months.
[**So please, take just a couple minutes of your time today and fill out our pre-inauguration survey. Mandela and our entire team will be checking this link to see how folks respond.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/inauguration_2025_survey/?source=em250118-1-150&akid=5456%2E196590%2E8UEGCJ)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/inauguration_2025_survey/?source=em250118-1-150&akid=5456%2E196590%2E8UEGCJ)
Thanks so much for providing your feedback. We look forward to reading your responses.
The team at The Long Run PAC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5456%2E196590%2E8UEGCJ). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=5456%2E196590%2E8UEGCJ)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=5456_196590_8UEGCJ&akid=5456%2E196590%2E8UEGCJ)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=5456%2E196590%2E8UEGCJ)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

The GOP Congressional Majority in 2025 is the smallest it has ever been since 1931.

| Just like Trump's tiny hands, Trump's grasp on Congress is soooo tiny.
It didn't have to be this way though, Republican strategists warned Trump that if he made any more cabinet appointments from the House he could lose his majority. But did he listen to the experts?
