name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Why we need Christian attorneys
body:
Most Christians don’t realize this...| | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=846de7614a3241be87a4536d99a3daf4&_e=pngdR0fDokfTcS9QZLuUajuFjyQ3BqF64AfHal0UrMAo6tDaBGoMRQJV6A7x2HBmKxrS1__quXQR76DnY1B1r7wNdWR4PGdpsGsfrQ0TRIwtUNsOdiuZWnOpeNbHX8GZsmr2ccdOth_8jfoChOlMyWD7rKbJlTLd3N3eQqUeKpRklGQcmbrfmirZWwRgmmGlCfDYQr2mmvvpAg3Ewk-2OfXo9hPFvfAgJoMO7Gvhtub6O38LnDQIP-PQXn9eRzU-gJYxdoOPMJz-ks7gxu2URjd6xnPiXl6PBt9rtzl2DEB6Krbg5lsxNgKG_8cGAWDA)
---
Fellow Christian, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Fellow Christian, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=846de7614a3241be87a4536d99a3daf4&_e=pngdR0fDokfTcS9QZLuUajuFjyQ3BqF64AfHal0UrMAo6tDaBGoMRQJV6A7x2HBmKxrS1__quXQR76DnY1B1r7wNdWR4PGdpsGsfrQ0TRIwtUNsOdiuZWnOpeNbHX8GZsmr2ccdOth_8jfoChOlMyWD7rKbJlTLd3N3eQqUeKpSDDFOrGeVGIyc6L5AVftNxCZKv4TeRWz0QF02viqFds_hwOjeYWA6nAzVgi2w2JBKzkJP7V6S9Bnxx4ua6XS3KaBRTLyx8c457gGd6byMfJt1i62KXLmbtF53QULf2mD8BWWY_vtHQ5kiAPaJRoRIf)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=846de7614a3241be87a4536d99a3daf4&_e=pngdR0fDokfTcS9QZLuUajuFjyQ3BqF64AfHal0UrMAo6tDaBGoMRQJV6A7x2HBmKxrS1__quXQR76DnY1B1r7wNdWR4PGdpsGsfrQ0TRIwtUNsOdiuZWnOpeNbHX8GZsmr2ccdOth_8jfoChOlMyWD7rKbJlTLd3N3eQqUeKpRQvKcKnM_MU3TR41SR0QiEMLItYxWCoTh0We3KQeE1vlQKQgDzD18BRpvPF6g5JPjtyaKc3XDKtnI4vo2l6bV7Gvw3jETj2LH8tD8WaMgTj4Rd2MN_Ku2zAtlk3rak-OZg60WbNLb8Cjivfx9BnpGf)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Fellow Christian, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=846de7614a3241be87a4536d99a3daf4&_e=pngdR0fDokfTcS9QZLuUajuFjyQ3BqF64AfHal0UrMAo6tDaBGoMRQJV6A7x2HBmKxrS1__quXQR76DnY1B1r7wNdWR4PGdpsGsfrQ0TRIwtUNsOdiuZWnOpeNbHX8GZsmr2ccdOth_8jfoChOlMyWD7rKbJlTLd3N3eQqUeKpR6EF7pYV8xI2EiYiMOdHilm3No6GzGbrSHHG8HxWaDRoZOXJv_Kys5OOhlx271b0tqjhk6auwZ1ngBx5Dd91S_q7KkjRN412cvpSX6uIXG-LYFBgnniqctLNDH-gmlXFXNoTJVprOM8jEUqVTVROmG)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=846de7614a3241be87a4536d99a3daf4&_e=pngdR0fDokfTcS9QZLuUajuFjyQ3BqF64AfHal0UrMAo6tDaBGoMRQJV6A7x2HBmKxrS1__quXQR76DnY1B1r7wNdWR4PGdpsGsfrQ0TRIwtUNsOdiuZWnOpeNbHX8GZsmr2ccdOth_8jfoChOlMyWD7rKbJlTLd3N3eQqUeKpTd8SRVVSxKDXasYPPrjgJzSy89VEFccxGbq5PMeTGAm461CRVfFadorep2KQJtyamZn1gG0CyigOntBoGpxt5vX9m2JgOPwJSxrBdpkKvcLClyMJ3sFz0SfZBMG6dpFYbMEIslWrAUaLLOq107cHYe)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=846de7614a3241be87a4536d99a3daf4&_e=pngdR0fDokfTcS9QZLuUajuFjyQ3BqF64AfHal0UrMAo6tDaBGoMRQJV6A7x2HBmKxrS1__quXQR76DnY1B1r7wNdWR4PGdpsGsfrQ0TRIwtUNsOdiuZWnOpeNbHX8GZsmr2ccdOth_8jfoChOlMyWD7rKbJlTLd3N3eQqUeKpR8anHReKAzxum_S1_mbzCMDh0sieoNrVu6y5HSjV3Qt1ek89T6xExD16k5ZWyd_VY7jIayScvVk3oqCi35pXDeUTh-apcucluQZmdR96451z-NrYmdI79oJtZBl4CreWHM-LDGENUIibnJxESVvFDd)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo
Executive Director & CEO
Christian Legal Society
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=846de7614a3241be87a4536d99a3daf4&_e=pngdR0fDokfTcS9QZLuUajuFjyQ3BqF64AfHal0UrMAo6tDaBGoMRQJV6A7x2HBmKxrS1__quXQR76DnY1B1r7wNdWR4PGdpsGsfrQ0TRIwtUNsOdiuZWnOpeNbHX8GZsmr2ccdOth_8jfoChOlMyWD7rKbJlTLd3N3eQqUeKpRtxTvGlGTnP_qVhqzk0wUwP3YlsfrCEJseIVPIZJ-xq2kiU87bRlMn0y-Ylt3Z_XCR6E2zN8lxRFdf99UqzfuFj8qXsWPKx5fHxTanOlWB_2NAYZxyBKhKliNBouUxdGghIX9xf392CxNMqth03FSh)

I took a moment to reflect on our journey together this morning.
It’s been tough at times but also incredibly SUCCESSFUL!
From the very moment I stepped off the golden staircase in Trump Tower with Melania to announce I was running for President in 2016...
The deep state couldn’t believe that a businessman was running for president. They thought I had no chance of winning, but of course, we proved them wrong.
During my first term, we made the economy stronger than anyone ever thought possible. And then, Joe Biden came in and destroyed it.
I saw the direction our great country was headed, and I couldn’t just sit back and watch. That’s when I made the decision to run for President again - for a third time.
Endless attacks, witch hunts, and fake news came pouring in the moment I announced.
The radical left knew they couldn’t beat me fairly, so they tried to stop me at every turn.
But we still won. And now here we are, just days from my inauguration as the 47th President of the United States.
**Before I take office, I have one important question for you: WHAT WOULD YOU LIKE ME TO DO ON MY FIRST DAY IN OFFICE?**
**_[You can submit your response through this link. I’ve even included a few options for you, just in case you’re short on time.>](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOpCAQhp8GbxgoFPXgoWc77mE3k032NHPZIJTTdEAdQE2__QbT6WP99aW-v5RfnZ0ePWneCMDNmkgAiLgQgO-Pw4ft7n_9pJ-i_qDf8t3XeQs_nugOL3jWin2Gv_V-n97jn-6iL1-_33b-wtNjxRf8lJbolXU5ba6F6cVkWFVgzxvRAEgJdXHrgbUda1rVdJxxaFHqyUxSdG0rRhw7XdgeGNSM85a3taxZybp6RCWZNhUz2FWkYqenVB6D1YrHdKgQlsWXevGF628prfEsNhAYIuotYHnYOaDJBIEhhc2vdFbJLrNyVC_e25QQ6X3SBAa30jXElZ4aGnByqDMa6Q40jvmuGLbk_8VlCxqJuM7aEZA58mjs5om4juGZJAx5PgIvQm_Wwzpno2xIxb7ON3LpvYf_AQAA___rKYmX)_**

[SUBMIT RESPONSE](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOpCAQhp8GbxgoFPXgoWc77mE3k032NHPZIJTTdEAdQE2__QbT6WP99aW-v5RfnZ0ePWneCMDNmkgAiLgQgO-Pw4ft7n_9pJ-i_qDf8t3XeQs_nugOL3jWin2Gv_V-n97jn-6iL1-_33b-wtNjxRf8lJbolXU5ba6F6cVkWFVgzxvRAEgJdXHrgbUda1rVdJxxaFHqyUxSdG0rRhw7XdgeGNSM85a3taxZybp6RCWZNhUz2FWkYqenVB6D1YrHdKgQlsWXevGF628prfEsNhAYIuotYHnYOaDJBIEhhc2vdFbJLrNyVC_e25QQ6X3SBAa30jXElZ4aGnByqDMa6Q40jvmuGLbk_8VlCxqJuM7aEZA58mjs5om4juGZJAx5PgIvQm_Wwzpno2xIxb7ON3LpvYf_AQAA___rKYmX)
I hope it’s not too much to ask, but please submit your response before the day ends.
Thank you!

clean_body: I want you to read my reflection before I'm president again. | | | | I took a moment to reflect on our journey together this morning. It’s been tough at times but also incredibly SUCCESSFUL! From the very moment I stepped off the golden staircase in Trump Tower with Melania to announce I was running for President in 2016... The deep state couldn’t believe that a businessman was running for president. They thought I had no chance of winning, but of course, we proved them wrong. During my first term, we made the economy stronger than anyone ever thought possible. And then, Joe Biden came in and destroyed it. I saw the direction our great country was headed, and I couldn’t just sit back and watch. That’s when I made the decision to run for President again - for a third time. Endless attacks, witch hunts, and fake news came pouring in the moment I announced. The radical left knew they couldn’t beat me fairly, so they tried to stop me at every turn. But we still won. And now here we are, just days from my inauguration as the 47th President of the United States. Before I take office, I have one important question for you: WHAT WOULD YOU LIKE ME TO DO ON MY FIRST DAY IN OFFICE? I hope it’s not too much to ask, but please submit your response before the day ends. Thank you! Donald J. name: Gay Valimont
subject: Even Ivanka Knows: We Need a Change in Politics
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
Dear Friend, As we reflect on the current political climate, **it's telling when even those closest to the former president recognize the shortcomings of his administration's approach**. Ivanka Trump’s recent remarks and actions demonstrate a _clear discomfort_ with the divisive politics her father championed. _**Project 2025 is around the corner, and we must act now.**_ My name is Gay Valimont, candidate for FL-1, mailing you to express the**urgency of this election, and the need for** _**YOUR HELP**_**. April 1st is closing in.**
---
---
**This speaks volumes.** If someone in his inner circle can see the damage caused by these policies, it’s time for us to ask: _why are career politicians in Florida’s 1st District still clinging to these outdated, harmful agendas?_ Our district deserves better. We need leaders who prioritize unity, compassion, and common sense over division and spectacle. That’s why I’m running to represent Florida’s 1st District—because our community deserves a representative who listens, leads with integrity, and fights for all of us, not just the politically connected. **[If we do not raise $1500 by the end of today, our weekly goal hangs in the balance, and will derail all of our progress. name: Newsletter via Our Revolution
subject: Organizing in The New Trump Era
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Fight Trump & The Oligarchs | Our 2025 Plan of Action | DNC
Leadership Elections | 2025 Downballot Elections | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

On Monday, Trump and the Oligarchs will take control of our government.
Progressives need to be ready.

The Oligarch’s Mission: Plunder our tax dollars by privatizing our
government and selling-off agencies and public assets to the highest
bidder, gutting regulations for corporations and rolling back protections
for working people; and slashing taxes for the rich by cutting public
programs.

This week, in the Senate, we heard directly from Trump’s wealthy, far
right political picks —

Hedge fund executive Scott Bessent (Treasury) said NO to raising the
minimum wage, while vowing to expand Trump’s tax cuts for the rich; Oil &
Gas CEO Chris Wright (Energy) denied the climate crisis and pledged to
double down on drilling; and billionaire Doug Burgum (Interior) vowed to
hand over our public lands to Big Oil.

In addition to extremist political appointees, Trump will start sowing
policy chaos on Day 1, pledging to sign 100 Executive Orders to try to
undermine the progress we’ve made on climate, healthcare, taxing the rich,
and much more.

★ ★ ★

We’re getting ready for the fight of our lives, and it starts with our
2025 3-Point Action Plan:

OUR MISSION: This moment calls for a total reboot. We’re fighting for our
future by mobilizing a Citizen Army of grassroots activists to fight back
against Trump and the Oligarchs, seizing the reins of the Democratic
Party, and electing the next generation of Progressives in hundreds of
down-ballot races across the country.

★ ★ ★

Since the holidays, over 30,000 Our Revolution supporters have shown
they’re ready to fight — participating in organizing meetings, strategy
huddles, and taking strategic actions to get ready for Trump’s Second
Term.

Despair is not an option. Our Citizen Action Team is preparing for battles
ahead in 2025. We need to know you’re with us. Sign here to show our
activists that you have our backs.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21142?t=1011&akid=7556%2E5885482%2E8S7Iad ]PLEDGE TO SUPPORT OUR GRASSROOTS ARMY

★ ★ ★

WORKING TO TRANSFORM THE PARTY

“The Democratic Party cannot win back the working class without first
addressing its own structural decay,” Our Revolution leader Joseph
Geevarghese wrote in a recent [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20791?t=1012&akid=7556%2E5885482%2E8S7Iad ]Common Dreams opinion piece.

“The party has grown too reliant on corporate donors, consultants, and
top-down strategies that ignore the real needs of working people,” he
said. “It’s unlikely that the insiders who built a system that enriches
themselves—guaranteeing profits whether the party wins or loses—will
willingly dismantle it.”

★ ★ ★

In looking at the contest for DNC chair and reforming the party’s
operations, Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21143?t=1013&akid=7556%2E5885482%2E8S7Iad ]Sludge his goal
is: “Organizing in, dirty money out.”

Larry sees an opportunity for us to organize and win in “more than 3,000
counties nationwide where there is virtually no Democratic Party
presence.” This is fertile ground for progressives to take over — but it’s
just the start.

Looking at the totality of the party and its failures, the prescription is
clear: Cut off the party’s reliance on corporate donors, abandon the
consultant-driven strategies that fail working people, and rebuild a Party
that serves the grassroots base.

★ ★ ★

That’s why Our Revolution - working in coalition with progressive allies -
organized a LIVE [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21144?t=1014&akid=7556%2E5885482%2E8S7Iad ]DNC Candidate Forum this week.

More than 25,000 Our Revolution supporters engaged with over a dozen
candidates running for key DNC Leadership positions, including Chair
candidates like Ken Martin and Ben Wikler, and Our Revolution leaders
running for Vice Chair positions such as Jane Kleeb, Jim Zogby, and
others.

This was an important event to give the grassroots a say in the party
election process because as we know — just 448 voting members of the DNC
will choose the new leadership — despite it being the rank-and-file
volunteers who do the work to mobilize voters each election cycle and
build the party in their counties and states.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese opened the forum by
summarizing the state of the party after the November election.

The Democratic Party has “ceased to be the party of the working class —
MAGA won voters who make less than $100k a year. The Democratic Party also
lost young people, voters of color, and women.

“Let me put it another way,” Joseph said, “the Democratic Party is now the
party of the college educated suburban elite. At the end of the day, the
corporate hacks who got the party in trouble in the first place aren’t
going to be the ones to save us.”

Read more about our DNC candidate forum in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21145?t=1015&akid=7556%2E5885482%2E8S7Iad ]Common Dreams.

★ ★ ★

Robert Borosage wrote about our candidate forum in the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21146?t=1016&akid=7556%2E5885482%2E8S7Iad ]The Nation,
zeroing in on the most important issue to our members: Banning Dark Money
from Democratic Primaries.

Borosage reported that while Chair candidate Ken Martin used the forum to
state his commitment to rooting out Corporate Money from the party, other
candidates were less clear.

For example, when Ben Wikler, Wisconsin State Chair, was asked directly
about outside money on our call, he claimed the party “couldn’t do
anything because it can’t pass laws—but this was, if not disingenuous,
clearly wrong,” Borosage wrote. “For example, the chair of the DNC could
ostracize pollsters, ad producers and consultants who work with outside
groups to attack Democratic candidates.”

Borosage also noted how State Parties “can ban outside PAC money and
enforce that ban by disqualifying any candidate that benefited from such
spending.”

★ ★ ★

Coming out of our DNC Candidate Forum, we are proud to announce the
endorsement of Our Revolution leaders for Vice Chair positions in the
party: Shasti Conrad, James Zogby, and Michelle Deatrick - and Jane
Fleming Kleeb for ASDC Chair.

Shasti is the Washington State Party Chair and worked on both of Bernie’s
presidential campaigns, Jane is an Our Revolution founding board member
and Nebraska Party Chair, Michelle is an Our Revolution Michigan leader
and DNC Climate Council Chair, and Jim, also Our Revolution founding board
member who has been working to transform the party for three decades.

★ ★ ★

So far, more than 10,000 grassroots volunteers, donors and local leaders
have signed on demanding new DNC leadership sign on to these critical
party reforms.

Some of our progressive allies in Congress are also calling on DNC
candidates to commit to these reforms, including Pramila Jayapal and Greg
Casar — the new chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus.

We need a massive groundswell of demand ahead of the Feb. 1st DNC election
— urging party leaders and candidates to reject corporate money, increase
transparency and accountability and rebuild a multiracial, working-class
base.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21147?t=1017&akid=7556%2E5885482%2E8S7Iad ]SIGN THE PETITION

★ ★ ★

On Thursday, Jan. 30th, Our Revolution is turning out our supporters to
make our voices heard during the last official DNC Candidate Forum in
Washington DC.

If you live in or around DC - the District of Columbia, Maryland, or
Virginia - join us to make our voices heard again before the DNC votes on
Feb 1st. Our movement for change must have a presence every step of the
way in the DNC election process.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21148?t=1018&akid=7556%2E5885482%2E8S7Iad ]SIGN UP TO JOIN US IN DC!

★ ★ ★

BUILDING PROGRESSIVE POWER IN 2025

2025 isn’t an off-year for elections -- in fact, there are thousands of
races at the state and local level with progressives running for mayor,
city council, state offices, and more.

Our goal is to build power. Our movement elected a progressive voting bloc
in Congress with the Progressive Caucus — and this year is a chance to do
the same in cities and counties across the country.

Proof of concept: In St. Louis, Our Revolution Board Member Megan Green
ran for city alderman and realized she needed allies serving alongside her
to move a progressive agenda. So she partnered with Our Revolution and ran
progressive slates over multiple cycles, creating a governing majority in
the city — from mayor to council and more.

If progressives are going to build power in the United States, we have to
return to our roots and do it from the bottom up.

If you’re a candidate running for election or re-election, join Megan
Green and the Our Revolution Political Team for a 2025 Candidate Meetup to
learn about our endorsement process and how we support candidates with
strategic resources to win elections and build power for the long haul.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21149?t=1019&akid=7556%2E5885482%2E8S7Iad ]REGISTER HERE (ANNOUNCED CANDIDATES ONLY)

We know that despair is not an option. Our Citizen Action Team is

Sign here to show our activists that you have our backs.

Progressives need to be ready. The Oligarch’s Mission: Plunder our tax dollars by privatizing our government and selling-off agencies and public assets to the highest bidder, gutting regulations for corporations and rolling back protections for working people; and slashing taxes for the rich by cutting public programs. This week, in the Senate, we heard directly from Trump’s wealthy, far right political picks — Hedge fund executive Scott Bessent (Treasury) said NO to raising the minimum wage, while vowing to expand Trump’s tax cuts for the rich; Oil & Gas CEO Chris Wright (Energy) denied the climate crisis and pledged to double down on drilling; and billionaire Doug Burgum (Interior) vowed to hand over our public lands to Big Oil. In addition to extremist political appointees, Trump will start sowing policy chaos on Day 1, pledging to sign 100 Executive Orders to try to undermine the progress we’ve made on climate, healthcare, taxing the rich, and much more. ★ ★ ★ We’re getting ready for the fight of our lives, and it starts with our 2025 3-Point Action Plan: OUR MISSION: This moment calls for a total reboot. We’re fighting for our future by mobilizing a Citizen Army of grassroots activists to fight back against Trump and the Oligarchs, seizing the reins of the Democratic Party, and electing the next generation of Progressives in hundreds of down-ballot races across the country. ★ ★ ★ Since the holidays, over 30,000 Our Revolution supporters have shown they’re ready to fight — participating in organizing meetings, strategy huddles, and taking strategic actions to get ready for Trump’s Second Term. Despair is not an option. Our Citizen Action Team is preparing for battles ahead in 2025. We need to know you’re with us. Sign here to show our activists that you have our backs. [ ]PLEDGE TO SUPPORT OUR GRASSROOTS ARMY ★ ★ ★ WORKING TO TRANSFORM THE PARTY “The Democratic Party cannot win back the working class without first addressing its own structural decay,” Our Revolution leader Joseph Geevarghese wrote in a recent [ ]Common Dreams opinion piece. “The party has grown too reliant on corporate donors, consultants, and top-down strategies that ignore the real needs of working people,” he said. “It’s unlikely that the insiders who built a system that enriches themselves—guaranteeing profits whether the party wins or loses—will willingly dismantle it.” ★ ★ ★ In looking at the contest for DNC chair and reforming the party’s operations, Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen told [ ]Sludge his goal is: “Organizing in, dirty money out.” Larry sees an opportunity for us to organize and win in “more than 3,000 counties nationwide where there is virtually no Democratic Party presence.” This is fertile ground for progressives to take over — but it’s just the start. Looking at the totality of the party and its failures, the prescription is clear: Cut off the party’s reliance on corporate donors, abandon the consultant-driven strategies that fail working people, and rebuild a Party that serves the grassroots base. ★ ★ ★ That’s why Our Revolution - working in coalition with progressive allies - organized a LIVE [ ]DNC Candidate Forum this week. More than 25,000 Our Revolution supporters engaged with over a dozen candidates running for key DNC Leadership positions, including Chair candidates like Ken Martin and Ben Wikler, and Our Revolution leaders running for Vice Chair positions such as Jane Kleeb, Jim Zogby, and others. This was an important event to give the grassroots a say in the party election process because as we know — just 448 voting members of the DNC will choose the new leadership — despite it being the rank-and-file volunteers who do the work to mobilize voters each election cycle and build the party in their counties and states. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese opened the forum by summarizing the state of the party after the November election. The Democratic Party has “ceased to be the party of the working class — MAGA won voters who make less than $100k a year. The Democratic Party also lost young people, voters of color, and women. “Let me put it another way,” Joseph said, “the Democratic Party is now the party of the college educated suburban elite. At the end of the day, the corporate hacks who got the party in trouble in the first place aren’t going to be the ones to save us.” Read more about our DNC candidate forum in [ ]Common Dreams. ★ ★ ★ Robert Borosage wrote about our candidate forum in the [ ]The Nation, zeroing in on the most important issue to our members: Banning Dark Money from Democratic Primaries. Borosage reported that while Chair candidate Ken Martin used the forum to state his commitment to rooting out Corporate Money from the party, other candidates were less clear. For example, when Ben Wikler, Wisconsin State Chair, was asked directly about outside money on our call, he claimed the party “couldn’t do anything because it can’t pass laws—but this was, if not disingenuous, clearly wrong,” Borosage wrote. “For example, the chair of the DNC could ostracize pollsters, ad producers and consultants who work with outside groups to attack Democratic candidates.” Borosage also noted how State Parties “can ban outside PAC money and enforce that ban by disqualifying any candidate that benefited from such spending.” ★ ★ ★ Coming out of our DNC Candidate Forum, we are proud to announce the endorsement of Our Revolution leaders for Vice Chair positions in the party: Shasti Conrad, James Zogby, and Michelle Deatrick - and Jane Fleming Kleeb for ASDC Chair. Shasti is the Washington State Party Chair and worked on both of Bernie’s presidential campaigns, Jane is an Our Revolution founding board member and Nebraska Party Chair, Michelle is an Our Revolution Michigan leader and DNC Climate Council Chair, and Jim, also Our Revolution founding board member who has been working to transform the party for three decades. ★ ★ ★ So far, more than 10,000 grassroots volunteers, donors and local leaders have signed on demanding new DNC leadership sign on to these critical party reforms. Some of our progressive allies in Congress are also calling on DNC candidates to commit to these reforms, including Pramila Jayapal and Greg Casar — the new chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. We need a massive groundswell of demand ahead of the Feb. 1st DNC election — urging party leaders and candidates to reject corporate money, increase transparency and accountability and rebuild a multiracial, working-class base. Our movement for change must have a presence every step of the way in the DNC election process. Our goal is to build power. Our movement elected a progressive voting bloc in Congress with the Progressive Caucus — and this year is a chance to do the same in cities and counties across the country. Proof of concept: In St. Louis, Our Revolution Board Member Megan Green ran for city alderman and realized she needed allies serving alongside her to move a progressive agenda. So she partnered with Our Revolution and ran progressive slates over multiple cycles, creating a governing majority in the city — from mayor to council and more. If progressives are going to build power in the United States, we have to return to our roots and do it from the bottom up. name: Katie Porter
subject: An extra layer of dread
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39394%2E3422442%2EqZb3Nw)
Derek,
Many Sunday’s come with that feeling of dread for Monday. But tomorrow’s Sunday is going to feel extra... scary.
It’s easy to feel sad, upset, and scared for Donald Trump’s inauguration. I feel it too. When he first won in 2016, I felt such a deep sense of despair. But after wallowing for a bit, I decided to get off the sidelines and run for Congress in my Republican-held district. I wasn’t the only one--all across the country, folks who were new to politics stepped up. From school board races to Congress, in 2018 we elected record numbers of women, people of color, and candidates who didn’t fit the “traditional mold.”
In 2025, we can’t stop fighting. There’s too much at stake.
Taking on Trump feels overwhelming, I get it. But we can all do a small part to better our community.
If you have this Monday off from work in honor of Martin Luther King Jr. Day, consider spending some time in service to others. Below are a few opportunities for Californians to get involved.
* If you are located in **Orange County** , you can use [**this link to find volunteer opportunities**](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21387?t=2&akid=39394%2E3422442%2EqZb3Nw).
* If you’re located in the **Bay****Area** , you can check out [**this link for volunteer opportunities and community events.**](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21389?t=3&akid=39394%2E3422442%2EqZb3Nw)
* If you’re located in **San Diego** , [**you can find volunteer opportunities at this link.**](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21390?t=4&akid=39394%2E3422442%2EqZb3Nw)

**Thank you for all that you do, let’s keep up the fight.**
**— Katie Porter**

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250118-39394&amounts=&t=5&refcode2=39394_3422442_qZb3Nw&akid=39394%2E3422442%2EqZb3Nw)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=39394%2E3422442%2EqZb3Nw).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Another Immigration Bill Passes the House
body:
Well, it looks like House Democrats are at it again, folks. On Thursday, a majority of them voted against a bill that seeks to deport immigrants convicted of horrific crimes like sexual assault, domestic violence, and child abuse. Yes, you heard that right. For the second time, they’ve decided to stand in opposition to legislation [...] | [](http://trk.libertyledger.-ZNTDYslw)

[](http://trk.libertyledger.)

# **[Another Immigration Bill Passes the House](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjEwMTM0OCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDE4LTUwN2UwODM4ZWQ0MTQwMzA5NTkyNDhlOTM1MTNhMjAzIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiIiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wYXRyaW90bmV3c2ZlZWQuY29tL2FpYnB0aC8_c2V5aWQ9NDY0MzMifQ/es0klBztuUb1DqAlrz8Dsg)**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parades on Blue’s Clues are unacceptable
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=637dd5f751b14a2c8374a0a593b3ee92&_e=aZq806LR5EPl5M3oxFQMoBs2LA10yTmlhTdyS1bClQqKSsNsx1LcPDr_UcKxjIuXVb26hm8QkeMwxrRr9pnEiwK-lNK55hEt9kh9VplmA2CZ0L1ZAYJlALehenGBpkccVRsfowUY0JcI5UwLbHtClEejTjAoJ2M3qm1hWCx82ivEX-twno_9lmoX9MdLzVBez5b6wXxlHo04kdWOHLDwwf_6lJRhR7ozJkmpRovL1sWpzc7bVKnm_-KonO_xfvNHeUpqwDnBxg2UKZ5sM1dITeIRzrfkCfPdE9eoUoxgRs4xDMPlAXVofXid8BB34h-7-hH7w_PricYXESFn_f-ht-3_OVIB4iy2XKSxNP7bIF7Zvlmy5r4z8Z2fjwME0yCj)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=637dd5f751b14a2c8374a0a593b3ee92&_e=aZq806LR5EPl5M3oxFQMoBs2LA10yTmlhTdyS1bClQqKSsNsx1LcPDr_UcKxjIuXVb26hm8QkeMwxrRr9pnEiwK-lNK55hEt9kh9VplmA2CZ0L1ZAYJlALehenGBpkccVRsfowUY0JcI5UwLbHtClEejTjAoJ2M3qm1hWCx82ivEX-twno_9lmoX9MdLzVBez5b6wXxlHo04kdWOHLDwwf_6lJRhR7ozJkmpRovL1sX-7zIsq89y6AZEj4fAG8UE3pjDVlm1FGHu1QB6ocOte3E7SoNAb040kI33SjpM3IepTr7j7CVjqpiE4r5ss-ey1XU6fplkhiXLSuLrP2ZX_dj5Cg2HqdTSJULlMYzocHjFCQAJslvtzKo8dx4SL-5P)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=637dd5f751b14a2c8374a0a593b3ee92&_e=aZq806LR5EPl5M3oxFQMoBs2LA10yTmlhTdyS1bClQqKSsNsx1LcPDr_UcKxjIuXVb26hm8QkeMwxrRr9pnEiwK-lNK55hEt9kh9VplmA2CZ0L1ZAYJlALehenGBpkccVRsfowUY0JcI5UwLbHtClEejTjAoJ2M3qm1hWCx82ivEX-twno_9lmoX9MdLzVBez5b6wXxlHo04kdWOHLDwwf_6lJRhR7ozJkmpRovL1sW2Sb-VlB-W8sI7Va0T-3spi5snYDkIH-2CaHTuU_tO_TbXJnBBxAp6J0Oj1B4ClcluN2mtqpKTEfgDwUGsaRRqgcaOyBlpPow6_vQTRs15NcNprWMwfsw8SsGSydk8K20kTQSwcC10CATJo7ZbUxFr) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=637dd5f751b14a2c8374a0a593b3ee92&_e=aZq806LR5EPl5M3oxFQMoBs2LA10yTmlhTdyS1bClQqKSsNsx1LcPDr_UcKxjIuXVb26hm8QkeMwxrRr9pnEiwK-lNK55hEt9kh9VplmA2CZ0L1ZAYJlALehenGBpkccVRsfowUY0JcI5UwLbHtClEejTjAoJ2M3qm1hWCx82ivEX-twno_9lmoX9MdLzVBez5b6wXxlHo04kdWOHLDwwf_6lJRhR7ozJkmpRovL1sWAkpnimsvX6YFWY-RZ7QrjvzR6OPVtpNJEDtaMo4s3HA8Ttz_T7xdsT2miFxGftJuTJGwJsBrLsghuEgrkqmp09gvlP4lxLQL710I85EVPxdG6vF2tfUKNXGI75J5JUM__bkXuEZFsbAEzCXsjaYEc)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=637dd5f751b14a2c8374a0a593b3ee92&_e=aZq806LR5EPl5M3oxFQMoBs2LA10yTmlhTdyS1bClQqKSsNsx1LcPDr_UcKxjIuXVb26hm8QkeMwxrRr9pnEiwK-lNK55hEt9kh9VplmA2CZ0L1ZAYJlALehenGBpkccVRsfowUY0JcI5UwLbHtClEejTjAoJ2M3qm1hWCx82ivEX-twno_9lmoX9MdLzVBez5b6wXxlHo04kdWOHLDwwf_6lJRhR7ozJkmpRovL1sVMVCgexg3eMYiv1DE7adYonw30WBqk7fu_cetqwEgpb_o80OvpEKr9DyMmbFBSh9-vQHuemDbvjVudLbqJshfUmgcoE4WYS0jj4Went47VO8ny-8BRBMSHAQKovYFiyUPdyMLFU6sCuAj0Jp0sFIoz)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

name: The Collective PAC

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. | | Peter, BIG NEWS:

**Rep. Terri Sewell (AL-07) has made HISTORY by becoming the FIRST Black woman to serve in a leadership position on the influential House Ways and Means Committee in the _236 years_ since it was established.**
**[We want to show Rep. Sewell how much we appreciate her dedication and leadership, and congratulate her on this monumental achievement. Will you sign this card today and help us reach our goal of 10,000 signatures?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_iXaEBE6RoEOjHEa7LfvrWykv6vdrLKQF4UMure8PaduRpBERccSbozgRuBgYISKjXEPZQxmFMR0_nlnU9XCqaOJHaIXxJMkYI6JpqvzknlqslQ5gQf4oSTgmXfJC5D2NO9kZoPyx-JIw2O4v3swAWOTBKUmaSXeHEdk-pfznZYjoxcRiF0fZSJ5NsnhzWlljQSa665mQZ_zcYs9hQjgkgI3BNlXfhmlnuuq_LkGTIeZphouPDWS4-XqWJ6gqRKETIA0FecycFa2Md5zxYUZbMwMzlAvR59lpXbKa8eZsVfCIoYTX4dpg8Yh4xs0XdzIHhi2hygkR1FIXCObbI-xVh7JjfGD0OuC0O8q-thEBaVg/4d9/5xSHBfmrTlWxippeha2s6w/h1/h001.Bowgv4sQMiqt_WToldgfUs8fCdsdsr8b5UlxaJPXOBk)** | | [SIGN THE CARD!](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_iXaEBE6RoEOjHEa7LfvrWykv6vdrLKQF4UMure8PaduRpBERccSbozgRuBgYISKjXEPZQxmFMR0_nlnU9XCqaOJHaIXxJMkYI6JpqvzknlqslQ5gQf4oSTgmXfJC5D2NO9kZoPyx-JIw2O4v3swAWOTBKUmaSXeHEdk-pfznZYqSIbDQCDaPGD8NqxOLGjtEj0AlwnU6DATnjjn-lNI8k4tk4YZXjDOTFIcPFlJwJLVlAZNvdW5yWZ0Oxi_xR_hnHE-1fxe4zmFFZ1YCJfjeh-r1KJPAe5U-ksB61EiV4g2s0UFDm2iAr2wxDuYOoVSHgg9NPEaygdPu3ETHGSLyhjv1EgK1aC55tS6Y3LkU1NQ/4d9/5xSHBfmrTlWxippeha2s6w/h2/h001.dh7HuF6NlxsPE_rSlrjyEojItYdF3D2ByYofitd1FWc)

Rep. Sewell’s groundbreaking leadership comes at a crucial time, and as Ranking Member of the Oversight Subcommittee, she’ll fight to protect programs like Social Security and Medicare and ensure that our tax system benefits all Americans, not just billionaires and big corporations.

This groundbreaking moment is proof of the progress we’re making towards building Black political power across the country and ensuring that a government by the people represents _all_ the people.

Join us in celebrating this milestone and showing Rep. Sewell our support as she continues to fight for our future — **[click here to join us in congratulating Rep. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Your 2025 Priorities Survey Attached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
As we enter an important election year here in Virginia, I want to make sure that my campaign is focused on the issues that matter most to you.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100608757/523321164/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVkMWEyN2UtZDFkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fo97eVILIyrKFgcLW12N5Lqa6JH3ajWslf-vDQZPdJI=)
---
| Peter,

As we enter an important election year here in Virginia, I want to make sure that my campaign is focused on the issues that matter most to _**you.**_

That’s why, every few months, my team and I reach out to get a better sense of the priorities and concerns that are shaping our communities. And with November 2025 just months away, I’m asking for your input once again.

As I've traveled across Virginia, I’ve had the chance to hear directly from voters about the issues that are on their minds as we approach November. **_But I want to make sure I’m reaching everyone—and that’s where your voice matters most._ By taking just a few minutes to fill out our 2025 Priorities Survey, you’ll help me understand what’s important in your community.**

**We’re aiming to get at least 25 responses from folks in your town—and your feedback would really help guide our efforts moving forward.**
---
| [TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100608759/523321166/1444005210?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVkMWEyN2UtZDFkNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fo97eVILIyrKFgcLW12N5Lqa6JH3ajWslf-vDQZPdJI=&emci=616fa9b8-e6d4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=15d1a27e-d1d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8470899)
---
Your responses will have a real impact on shaping our agenda for 2025. Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts—it means the world to me and my team.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Abigail

clean_body: As we enter an important election year here in Virginia, I want to make sure that my campaign is focused on the issues that matter most to you. | = | Peter, As we enter an important election year here in Virginia, I want to make sure that my campaign is focused on the issues that matter most to you. That’s why, every few months, my team and I reach out to get a better sense of the priorities and concerns that are shaping our communities. And with November 2025 just months away, I’m asking for your input once again. As I've traveled across Virginia, I’ve had the chance to hear directly from voters about the issues that are on their minds as we approach November. But I want to make sure I’m reaching everyone—and that’s where your voice matters most. By taking just a few minutes to fill out our 2025 Priorities Survey, you’ll help me understand what’s important in your community. We’re aiming to get at least 25 responses from folks in your town—and your feedback would really help guide our efforts moving forward. | Your responses will have a real impact on shaping our agenda for 2025. Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts—it means the world to me and my team. Looking forward to hearing from you! Abigail * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =
