name: George Whitesides
subject: I need your input to inform my work in Congress.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100611027/523329335/-2002425095?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2QyNDRiNS1lN2Q1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCFP2nPEZL6yGWlVgW0whjnYmZ1zawhGOniNNRLk7D8=)
Peter,

These first few weeks in Congress have been a whirlwind.

After I was sworn in, we hardly had a moment to get acclimated before confronting two of the largest wildfires in Los Angeles County history.

It's not lost on me that one of my very first acts in Congress was helping our community rebound from a historic natural disaster, but this is precisely what I’m here for, Peter. And I’m ready to use every lever at my disposal to continue to support and uplift the 27th district.

[**I’m coming to you today with my first survey since being sworn into Congress. Will you take just a minute to share your priorities for 2025 and beyond?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100611028/523329336/2123953302?refcode=em-1.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2QyNDRiNS1lN2Q1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCFP2nPEZL6yGWlVgW0whjnYmZ1zawhGOniNNRLk7D8=&emci=b1d244b5-e7d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b7d244b5-e7d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=36198509)
| ****[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100611029/523329337/2123953302?refcode=em-1.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2QyNDRiNS1lN2Q1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCFP2nPEZL6yGWlVgW0whjnYmZ1zawhGOniNNRLk7D8=&emci=b1d244b5-e7d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b7d244b5-e7d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=36198509)****
---

I’m laser-focused on making good on everything we talked about on the campaign trail – fighting for good local jobs, lowering costs, building safe communities, and safeguarding reproductive freedom and Social Security.

The best way to do that is with your ongoing input.

[**I’m counting on 1,000 supporters to take my 2025 priorities survey. The more people that respond, the better. Share your thoughts today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100611030/523329338/2123953302?refcode=em-1.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2QyNDRiNS1lN2Q1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCFP2nPEZL6yGWlVgW0whjnYmZ1zawhGOniNNRLk7D8=&emci=b1d244b5-e7d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b7d244b5-e7d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=36198509)
****[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100611031/523329339/2123953302?refcode=em-1.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2QyNDRiNS1lN2Q1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCFP2nPEZL6yGWlVgW0whjnYmZ1zawhGOniNNRLk7D8=&emci=b1d244b5-e7d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b7d244b5-e7d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=36198509)****
---

Thank you,

George

name: Ted, All On The Line
subject: They want to throw out over 60,000 votes in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
The state supreme court’s Republican majority is once again threatening democracy.
|
---

Peter, I started with All On The Line as a volunteer in North Carolina back in 2019, and I’ve seen far-right extremists go to great lengths to manipulate maps and overturn the will of the people here. But what’s happening in the Tar Heel state right now may be a new low:
**The Washington Post: “GOP-led N.C. Supreme Court blocks finalizing election for Democratic justice”**
**To understand the context of our state supreme court’s behavior, we have to go back a few years.**
In 2022, our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, won a case called _Harper v. Hall_ in front of the North Carolina Supreme Court. This case struck down the legislature's gerrymandered congressional and state legislative maps, and was monumental in our fight against gerrymandering and for protecting North Carolinians’ ability to exercise their right to be heard.
But just weeks later — as soon as Republicans took back the majority on the court — they showed their extremist colors by agreeing to reconsider the ruling. By April 2023, the court had overturned the landmark decision, saying that the judicial branch could not weigh in on partisan gerrymandering.
As Attorney General Eric Holder said at the time, **“Make no mistake, this moment is the result of a concerted effort by too many in the Republican Party to bend — even break — the rules of our democracy in order to unfairly gain and then hold onto power.”**
Then, given carte blanche, the legislature quickly went right back to their extreme gerrymandering ways. Lawmakers rammed through a new map that gives the GOP a significant advantage. North Carolina’s congressional map went from a 50-50 partisan split to Republicans claiming 71% of the seats in 2024.
That brings us to the present day, and what’s making headlines nationwide: **the state supreme court’s Republican majority is once again threatening democracy — now by blocking the certification of an election where Associate Justice Allison Riggs defeated her GOP challenger.** The right-wing candidate is baselessly trying to invalidate more than 60,000 North Carolinians' ballots in order to claim victory.
_Why are they going all-out to try to secure this seat?_ Well, earlier in the campaign, the Republican candidate said he wanted to ensure there’s a conservative majority on the court for the upcoming redistricting cycle.
**We aren’t standing by while the very foundations of our democracy are threatened. In the face of attacks like these, All On The Line is mobilizing grassroots activists in North Carolina and across the nation to fight for fair elections and fair maps.**
[**Please rush a donation to power our work today. Every dollar counts in ensuring we have the resources to safeguard our democracy — and that democracy is worth fighting for.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100611046/523329414/358328389?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_NCStory_email_20250118-AOTL-Tier1-NCStory-Ted_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250118-AOTL-Tier1-NCStory-Ted_&utm_campaign=NCStory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkMzk0MTkxLWU3ZDUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1weZ0PU8WyZtLu7S1WI6pCiEHQA-8qNBYQ59It9cZaM=)
Thank you,
Ted Corcoran

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Thoughts on the Department of Government Efficiency, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Complete the DOGE survey today

|
---
| | | **Waste

Fraud

Inefficiency**

Peter, our House Majority was elected on the back of our beliefs in creating a small government that works for the people of this great country.

Cutting wasteful government spending and slimming down our bloated federal government is no small task, _but it 's what we were elected to do._

**HUGE news, team: Senator Kirsten Gillibrand is our new DSCC Chair!**

For _years_ , Senator Gillibrand has been a fearless force for good. We're THRILLED to welcome her leadership as we work together to take back the Senate and stop Trump's agenda. She's ready to make an impact, and we're so thankful for her commitment.

**We're asking Democrats across the country to sign on to our Congratulations Card for Senator Gillibrand -- but as of right now, your signature is missing! We can't send it until we have 50,000 commitments, so please:**

**[Click here to congratulate Senator Kirsten Gillibrand on being named the new DSCC Chair! >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20965?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250118-SignTheCard-NewChairCongratsCard-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250118-SignTheCard-NewChairCongratsCard-Pros-sl1&akid=19377%2E9716520%2EABLUCE)**

You’re the only reason I won this election.

This week, we witnessed the kind of political theater that Washington loves; the democrats were utterly humiliated by Trump's new team of spartans. Trump has chosen some of the brightest stars for his Cabinet, and they've more than proven their mettle during the Senate confirmation hearings. I'm talking, of course, about Pete Hegseth, Pam Bondi, and Kristi Noem - three individuals who not only demonstrated their qualifications but also showed the Democrats a thing or two about toughness and resilience.
Let's start with Pete Hegseth, Trump's pick for Secretary of Defense. The Democrats tried to throw everything at him - from personal smears to questioning his credentials. But Hegseth, a decorated combat veteran and a voice of reason on Fox News, stood firm. ...

name: Elect State Dems (via DLCC.org)
subject: If you want to fight against the MAGA machine in Washington, read this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Your support has an outsized impact at our ballot level and could be the difference between flipping chambers or losing power in places like your community. Will you help elect state Dems? | | |
---
| |
---|---
**If you only have time for three takeaways from this email, here they are:**
1. Trump takes office in TWO days, and Republicans are already working to implement their extreme, hateful agenda nationwide.
2. State Democrats are preparing to strengthen the blue firewall to block MAGA extremism and protect our fundamental freedoms in the states, but they need your support to expand Democratic power.
3. We must rush resources to state Dems _now_ so they are ready to execute a winning strategy, compete against the GOP, and secure victories in upcoming races – these early investments will shape our work for the next four years.

**[Help Elect State Dems »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPfr0A4dBpd_CC4Uqnpn8KTZkmqvNdwi20Te-XaTYQJmHs84Z-RvxR_HFoseAy5sC7A6nt9xiXH3BXtTJqpEUm5ilNAJ3mGcQLDffIEm-nPOT0hu9GOTSey4uU4LtV15juHpuf7sg93_T-YenNtFHwFrdgPPlSxD94-_mV7WenoVyLAce7rAqe6vH7jWMRvyIa4TNHAqnUaj9SrwAhJVOxxpq2ZpONxCtcrrAFqKFTMk1xw8eKqFnzt6mFInvrwDzREF7Xfn_u4rOe1F3A3bZ9-SA6xD4UOkL6oTZfwaBqJMVzM8gkiIj9WTtEHWdvDBTn33f5jOnqkiypSvpqKI_Ate1eAYmrMNye1v8fKSSr2lCk5ceobhAsEB1IpE9aSKEHZokQ2xcvjIUXJo8m2t9msSyI1DRemJca_xLY14Z_jRHFaPSal5BX3gHS78JHGTR9KQs47cqBfNn8rP84tobIQBDP6eQsk3JJ7wZPxNeA8-vO2-xKesnVKy35QMrFlk_VAbtzQ8sTdy-q8YRiQ_Xw3rGqgP7ysG0FlSYhgHhfBz9kAVovSy_ddLJ4Vh07bOsRHRBpOpWT_UY8QZXiK5sOrH2aHsmMrezcyRDX9XAqukp4/4d9/29_vwnEZSVKy2YGsXWJQMg/h0/h001.f9TSaZL_aoOSDen0wB9sIMIZmZM0qSnIryW_SIyxhF4)** Your donation today might seem like a small drop in the bucket against the MAGA machine in Washington, **but your support has an outsized impact at our ballot level and could be the difference between flipping chambers or losing power in places like your state.** [Will you chip in $7 right now and help Dems get a head start in the fight against the Republican takeover in our state legislatures? clean_body: Your support has an outsized impact at our ballot level and could be the difference between flipping chambers or losing power in places like your community. Will you help elect state Dems? | | | | | ---|--- If you only have time for three takeaways from this email, here they are: 1. Trump takes office in TWO days, and Republicans are already working to implement their extreme, hateful agenda nationwide. 2. State Democrats are preparing to strengthen the blue firewall to block MAGA extremism and protect our fundamental freedoms in the states, but they need your support to expand Democratic power. 3. We must rush resources to state Dems now so they are ready to execute a winning strategy, compete against the GOP, and secure victories in upcoming races – these early investments will shape our work for the next four years. Your donation today might seem like a small drop in the bucket against the MAGA machine in Washington, but your support has an outsized impact at our ballot level and could be the difference between flipping chambers or losing power in places like your state. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | With you in this fight, Team DLCC | Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc.org. We’re disappointed but not surprised...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22772%2E4449941%2ErM7OHA)
---
**We’re disappointed but not surprised...** [ ]() Americans are FURIOUS with Trump for scheming to pardon January 6th insurrectionists despite the fact that they tried to overthrow our government.

If we can show MASSIVE public outrage over this move, we can force Trump to walk back his promise.

**So we need input from all Democrats ASAP:** | **[_Do you support pardoning January 6th insurrectionists?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20250118_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22772%2E4449941%2ErM7OHA)** | [NO, I DO NOT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20250118_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22772%2E4449941%2ErM7OHA)
---
[YES, I ABSOLUTELY DO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20250118_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=22772%2E4449941%2ErM7OHA)
[I’M UNSURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20250118_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=22772%2E4449941%2ErM7OHA)
***YOU MUST RESPOND WITHIN 5 MINUTES AFTER OPENING THIS MESSAGE***
We look forward to reading your responses,

_\- Fight For Reform_
